authors_text: Enze Xie,Wenhai Wang,Zhiding Yu,Anima Anandkumar,Jose M. Alvarez,Ping Luo
title: SegFormer: Simple and Efficient Design for Semantic Segmentation with Transformers
title_zh: SegFormer：使用 Transformer 进行简单高效的语义分割设计
abstract: We present SegFormer, a simple, efficient yet powerful semantic segmentation framework which unifies Transformers with lightweight multilayer perception (MLP) decoders. SegFormer has two appealing features: 1) SegFormer comprises a novel hierarchically structured Transformer encoder which outputs multiscale features. It does not need positional encoding, thereby avoiding the interpolation of positional codes which leads to decreased performance when the testing resolution differs from training. 2) SegFormer avoids complex decoders. The proposed MLP decoder aggregates information from different layers, and thus combining both local attention and global attention to render powerful representations. We show that this simple and lightweight design is the key to efficient segmentation on Transformers. We scale our approach up to obtain a series of models from SegFormer-B0 to SegFormer-B5, reaching significantly better performance and efficiency than previous counterparts. For example, SegFormer-B4 achieves 50.3% mIoU on ADE20K with 64M parameters, being 5x smaller and 2.2% better than the previous best method. Our best model, SegFormer-B5, achieves 84.0% mIoU on Cityscapes validation set and shows excellent zero-shot robustness on Cityscapes-C. Code will be released at: github.com/NVlabs/SegFormer.
summary: We present SegFormer, a simple, efficient yet powerful semantic segmentation framework which unifies Transformers with lightweight multilayer perception (MLP) decoders. SegFormer has two appealing features: 1) SegFormer comprises a novel hierarchically structured Transformer encoder which outputs multiscale features. It does not need positional encoding, thereby avoiding the interpolation of positional codes which leads to decreased performance when the testing resolution differs from training. 2) SegFormer avoids complex decoders. The proposed MLP decoder aggregates information from different layers, and thus combining both local attention and global attention to render powerful representations. We show that this simple and lightweight design is the key to efficient segmentation on Transformers. We scale our approach up to obtain a series of models from SegFormer-B0 to SegFormer-B5, reaching significantly better performance and efficiency than previous counterparts. For example, SegFormer-B4 achieves 50.3% mIoU on ADE20K with 64M parameters, being 5x smaller and 2.2% better than the previous best method. Our best model, SegFormer-B5, achieves 84.0% mIoU on Cityscapes validation set and shows excellent zero-shot robustness on Cityscapes-C. Code will be released at: github.com/NVlabs/SegFormer.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 SegFormer，一个简单、高效但功能强大的语义分割框架，它将 Transformer 与轻量级多层感知 (MLP) 解码器结合起来。 SegFormer 有两个吸引人的功能：1）SegFormer 包含一个新颖的分层结构 Transformer 编码器，可输出多尺度特征。它不需要位置编码，从而避免了位置代码的插值，当测试分辨率与训练分辨率不同时，位置代码的插值会导致性能下降。 2）SegFormer避免了复杂的解码器。所提出的 MLP 解码器聚合来自不同层的信息，从而结合局部注意力和全局注意力来呈现强大的表示。我们证明，这种简单且轻量级的设计是 Transformers 高效分割的关键。我们扩展了我们的方法，以获得从 SegFormer-B0 到 SegFormer-B5 的一系列模型，与以前的同行相比，获得了显着更好的性能和效率。例如，SegFormer-B4 在具有 64M 参数的 ADE20K 上实现了 50.3% mIoU，比之前的最佳方法小 5 倍，好 2.2%。我们最好的模型 SegFormer-B5 在 Cityscapes 验证集上达到 84.0% mIoU，并在 Cityscapes-C 上表现出出色的零样本鲁棒性。代码将发布在：github.com/NVlabs/SegFormer。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SegFormer，一种结合Transformer与轻量级MLP解码器的语义分割框架，旨在提升分割效率与性能。
AI.motivation: 传统分割模型常因复杂结构或位置编码限制导致效率低下，且在不同分辨率下性能不稳定，需简化设计以实现高效分割。
AI.method: 设计分层Transformer编码器输出多尺度特征并去除位置编码，搭配MLP解码器聚合跨层信息，结合局部与全局注意力机制。
AI.result: SegFormer-B4在ADE20K上达50.3% mIoU（参数64M），较先前方法小5倍且精度高2.2%；SegFormer-B5在Cityscapes验证集达84.0% mIoU，且具优良零样本鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: SegFormer通过简单高效的架构设计，在语义分割任务中实现了优于现有方法的性能与效率平衡。

SegFormer has two appealing features: 1) SegFormer comprises a novel hierarchically structured Transformer encoder which outputs multiscale features. We scale our approach up to obtain a series of models from SegFormer-B0 to SegFormer-B5, reaching significantly better performance and efficiency than previous counterparts. For example, SegFormer-B4 achieves 50.3% mIoU on ADE20K with 64M parameters, being 5x smaller and 2.2% better than the previous best method. Our best model, SegFormer-B5, achieves 84.0% mIoU on Cityscapes validation set and shows excellent zero-shot robustness on Cityscapes-C. authors_text: Siddharth Divi,Habiba Farrukh,Berkay Celik
title: Unifying Distillation with Personalization in Federated Learning
title_zh: 将联邦学习中的精炼与个性化相结合
abstract: Federated learning (FL) is a decentralized privacy-preserving learning technique in which clients learn a joint collaborative model through a central aggregator without sharing their data. In this setting, all clients learn a single common predictor (FedAvg), which does not generalize well on each client's local data due to the statistical data heterogeneity among clients. In this paper, we address this problem with PersFL, a discrete two-stage personalized learning algorithm. In the first stage, PersFL finds the optimal teacher model of each client during the FL training phase. In the second stage, PersFL distills the useful knowledge from optimal teachers into each user's local model. The teacher model provides each client with some rich, high-level representation that a client can easily adapt to its local model, which overcomes the statistical heterogeneity present at different clients. We evaluate PersFL on CIFAR-10 and MNIST datasets using three data-splitting strategies to control the diversity between clients' data distributions. We empirically show that PersFL outperforms FedAvg and three state-of-the-art personalization methods, pFedMe, Per-FedAvg, and FedPer on majority data-splits with minimal communication cost. Further, we study the performance of PersFL on different distillation objectives, how this performance is affected by the equitable notion of fairness among clients, and the number of required communication rounds. PersFL code is available at https://tinyurl.com/hdh5zhxs for public use and validation.
summary: Federated learning (FL) is a decentralized privacy-preserving learning technique in which clients learn a joint collaborative model through a central aggregator without sharing their data. In this setting, all clients learn a single common predictor (FedAvg), which does not generalize well on each client's local data due to the statistical data heterogeneity among clients. In this paper, we address this problem with PersFL, a discrete two-stage personalized learning algorithm. In the first stage, PersFL finds the optimal teacher model of each client during the FL training phase. In the second stage, PersFL distills the useful knowledge from optimal teachers into each user's local model. The teacher model provides each client with some rich, high-level representation that a client can easily adapt to its local model, which overcomes the statistical heterogeneity present at different clients. We evaluate PersFL on CIFAR-10 and MNIST datasets using three data-splitting strategies to control the diversity between clients' data distributions. We empirically show that PersFL outperforms FedAvg and three state-of-the-art personalization methods, pFedMe, Per-FedAvg, and FedPer on majority data-splits with minimal communication cost. Further, we study the performance of PersFL on different distillation objectives, how this performance is affected by the equitable notion of fairness among clients, and the number of required communication rounds. PersFL code is available at https://tinyurl.com/hdh5zhxs for public use and validation.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习（FL）是一种去中心化的隐私保护学习技术，客户通过中央聚合器学习联合协作模型，而无需共享数据。在此设置中，所有客户端都会学习单个通用预测器 (FedAvg)，由于客户端之间的统计数据异质性，该预测器不能很好地概括每个客户端的本地数据。在本文中，我们使用 PersFL（一种离散两阶段个性化学习算法）解决了这个问题。在第一阶段，PersFL 在 FL 训练阶段找到每个客户的最佳教师模型。在第二阶段，PersFL 将来自最佳教师的有用知识提炼到每个用户的本地模型中。教师模型为每个客户端提供了一些丰富的高级表示，客户端可以轻松地适应其本地模型，从而克服了不同客户端存在的统计异质性。我们使用三种数据分割策略来控制客户数据分布之间的多样性，在 CIFAR-10 和 MNIST 数据集上评估 PersFL。我们的经验表明，PersFL 在大多数数据分割上以最小的通信成本优于 FedAvg 和三种最先进的个性化方法（pFedMe、Per-FedAvg 和 FedPer）。此外，我们研究了 PersFL 在不同蒸馏目标上的性能、该性能如何受到客户端之间公平概念的影响，以及所需的沟通轮数。 PersFL 代码可在 https://tinyurl.com/hdh5zhxs 上获取，供公众使用和验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PersFL算法，通过知识蒸馏与个性化结合解决联邦学习中客户端数据异质性导致的模型性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 传统联邦学习方法（如FedAvg）在客户端数据分布不均时表现不佳，难以实现有效的个性化模型训练。
AI.method: PersFL采用两阶段策略：第一阶段为每个客户端训练最优教师模型，第二阶段将教师模型的知识蒸馏到本地模型中以适应本地数据分布。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10和MNIST数据集上，PersFL在多数数据划分策略下优于FedAvg及三种先进个性化方法，且通信成本更低。
AI.conclusion: PersFL通过知识蒸馏有效缓解了联邦学习中的数据异质性问题，在保持低通信开销的同时实现了更优的个性化模型性能。

authors_text: Arnav Choudhry,Brady Moon,Jay Patrikar,Constantine Samaras,Sebastian Scherer
title: CVaR-based Flight Energy Risk Assessment for Multirotor UAVs using a Deep Energy Model
title_zh: 使用深度能量模型进行基于CVaR的多旋翼无人机飞行能量风险评估
abstract: Energy management is a critical aspect of risk assessment for Uncrewed Aerial Vehicle (UAV) flights, as a depleted battery during a flight brings almost guaranteed vehicle damage and a high risk of human injuries or property damage. Predicting the amount of energy a flight will consume is challenging as routing, weather, obstacles, and other factors affect the overall consumption. We develop a deep energy model for a UAV that uses Temporal Convolutional Networks to capture the time varying features while incorporating static contextual information. Our energy model is trained on a real world dataset and does not require segregating flights into regimes. We illustrate an improvement in power predictions by $29\%$ on test flights when compared to a state-of-the-art analytical method. Using the energy model, we can predict the energy usage for a given trajectory and evaluate the risk of running out of battery during flight. We propose using Conditional Value-at-Risk (CVaR) as a metric for quantifying this risk. We show that CVaR captures the risk associated with worst-case energy consumption on a nominal path by transforming the output distribution of Monte Carlo forward simulations into a risk space. Computing the CVaR on the risk-space distribution provides a metric that can evaluate the overall risk of a flight before take-off. Our energy model and risk evaluation method can improve flight safety and evaluate the coverage area from a proposed takeoff location. The video and codebase are available at https://youtu.be/PHXGigqilOA and https://git.io/cvar-risk .

Our energy model and risk evaluation method can improve flight safety and evaluate the coverage area from a proposed takeoff location. The video and codebase are available at https://youtu.be/PHXGigqilOA and https://git.io/cvar-risk .
abstract_zh: 能源管理是无人飞行器 (UAV) 飞行风险评估的一个重要方面，因为飞行过程中电池耗尽几乎肯定会导致车辆损坏，并且造成人身伤害或财产损失的风险很高。预测航班消耗的能量具有挑战性，因为航线、天气、障碍物和其他因素都会影响总体消耗。我们为无人机开发了一种深度能量模型，该模型使用时域卷积网络来捕获随时间变化的特征，同时结合静态上下文信息。我们的能源模型是根据现实世界的数据集进行训练的，不需要将航班分为不同的区域。我们证明，与最先进的分析方法相比，测试飞行中的功率预测提高了 29\%$。使用能量模型，我们可以预测给定轨迹的能量使用情况，并评估飞行过程中电池耗尽的风险。我们建议使用条件风险价值（CVaR）作为量化这种风险的指标。我们表明，CVaR 通过将蒙特卡罗前向模拟的输出分布转换为风险空间，捕获了与标称路径上最坏情况能耗相关的风险。根据风险空间分布计算 CVaR 提供了一个可以评估航班起飞前总体风险的指标。我们的能量模型和风险评估方法可以提高飞行安全性并评估建议起飞位置的覆盖范围。视频和代码库可在 https://youtu.be/PHXGigqilOA 和 https://git.io/cvar-risk 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于CVaR的多旋翼无人机飞行能量风险评估方法，利用深度能量模型预测能耗并量化电池耗尽风险。
AI.motivation: 无人机飞行中电池耗尽可能导致严重事故，现有方法难以准确预测复杂环境下能耗，需改进风险评估以提升飞行安全。
AI.method: 构建结合时序卷积网络（TCN）的深度能量模型，融合动态轨迹与静态环境信息；通过蒙特卡洛模拟生成能量分布，采用条件风险价值（CVaR）量化极端风险。
AI.result: 测试飞行中能量预测误差较先进分析方法降低29%，CVaR指标能有效表征典型航路的最坏能耗风险。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可提升无人机飞行前风险预判能力，优化起降点覆盖区域评估，增强任务规划安全性。

search_text: CVaR-based Flight Energy Risk Assessment for Multirotor UAVs using a Deep Energy Model 使用深度能量模型进行基于CVaR的多旋翼无人机飞行能量风险评估 Energy management is a critical aspect of risk assessment for Uncrewed Aerial Vehicle (UAV) flights, as a depleted battery during a flight brings almost guaranteed vehicle damage and a high risk of human injuries or property damage. Predicting the amount of energy a flight will consume is challenging as routing, weather, obstacles, and other factors affect the overall consumption. We develop a deep energy model for a UAV that uses Temporal Convolutional Networks to capture the time varying features while incorporating static contextual information. Our energy model is trained on a real world dataset and does not require segregating flights into regimes. We illustrate an improvement in power predictions by $29\%$ on test flights when compared to a state-of-the-art analytical method. Using the energy model, we can predict the energy usage for a given trajectory and evaluate the risk of running out of battery during flight. We propose using Conditional Value-at-Risk (CVaR) as a metric for quantifying this risk. We show that CVaR captures the risk associated with worst-case energy consumption on a nominal path by transforming the output distribution of Monte Carlo forward simulations into a risk space. Computing the CVaR on the risk-space distribution provides a metric that can evaluate the overall risk of a flight before take-off. Our energy model and risk evaluation method can improve flight safety and evaluate the coverage area from a proposed takeoff location. The video and codebase are available at https://youtu.be/PHXGigqilOA and https://git.io/cvar-risk . 能源管理是无人飞行器 (UAV) 飞行风险评估的一个重要方面，因为飞行过程中电池耗尽几乎肯定会导致车辆损坏，并且造成人身伤害或财产损失的风险很高。预测航班消耗的能量具有挑战性，因为航线、天气、障碍物和其他因素都会影响总体消耗。我们为无人机开发了一种深度能量模型，该模型使用时域卷积网络来捕获随时间变化的特征，同时结合静态上下文信息。我们的能源模型是根据现实世界的数据集进行训练的，不需要将航班分为不同的区域。我们证明，与最先进的分析方法相比，测试飞行中的功率预测提高了 29\%$。使用能量模型，我们可以预测给定轨迹的能量使用情况，并评估飞行过程中电池耗尽的风险。我们建议使用条件风险价值（CVaR）作为量化这种风险的指标。我们表明，CVaR 通过将蒙特卡罗前向模拟的输出分布转换为风险空间，捕获了与标称路径上最坏情况能耗相关的风险。根据风险空间分布计算 CVaR 提供了一个可以评估航班起飞前总体风险的指标。我们的能量模型和风险评估方法可以提高飞行安全性并评估建议起飞位置的覆盖范围。视频和代码库可在 https://youtu.be/PHXGigqilOA 和 https://git.io/cvar-risk 上获取。 本文提出一种基于CVaR的多旋翼无人机飞行能量风险评估方法，利用深度能量模型预测能耗并量化电池耗尽风险。 Arnav Choudhry,Brady Moon,Jay Patrikar,Constantine Samaras,Sebastian Scherer cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Vincent Cohen-Addad,Anupam Gupta,Philip N. Klein,Jason Li
title: A Quasipolynomial $(2+\varepsilon)$-Approximation for Planar Sparsest Cut
title_zh: 平面稀疏割的拟多项式$(2+\varepsilon)$-近似
abstract: The (non-uniform) sparsest cut problem is the following graph-partitioning problem: given a "supply" graph, and demands on pairs of vertices, delete some subset of supply edges to minimize the ratio of the supply edges cut to the total demand of the pairs separated by this deletion. Despite much effort, there are only a handful of nontrivial classes of supply graphs for which constant-factor approximations are known. We consider the problem for planar graphs, and give a $(2+\varepsilon)$-approximation algorithm that runs in quasipolynomial time. Our approach defines a new structural decomposition of an optimal solution using a "patching" primitive. We combine this decomposition with a Sherali-Adams-style linear programming relaxation of the problem, which we then round. This should be compared with the polynomial-time approximation algorithm of Rao (1999), which uses the metric linear programming relaxation and $\ell_1$-embeddings, and achieves an $O(\sqrt{\log n})$-approximation in polynomial time.
summary: The (non-uniform) sparsest cut problem is the following graph-partitioning problem: given a "supply" graph, and demands on pairs of vertices, delete some subset of supply edges to minimize the ratio of the supply edges cut to the total demand of the pairs separated by this deletion. Despite much effort, there are only a handful of nontrivial classes of supply graphs for which constant-factor approximations are known. We consider the problem for planar graphs, and give a $(2+\varepsilon)$-approximation algorithm that runs in quasipolynomial time. Our approach defines a new structural decomposition of an optimal solution using a "patching" primitive. We combine this decomposition with a Sherali-Adams-style linear programming relaxation of the problem, which we then round. This should be compared with the polynomial-time approximation algorithm of Rao (1999), which uses the metric linear programming relaxation and $\ell_1$-embeddings, and achieves an $O(\sqrt{\log n})$-approximation in polynomial time.
abstract_zh: （非均匀）稀疏切割问题是以下图划分问题：给定一个“供应”图和对顶点对的需求，删除供应边的某些子集，以最小化供应边切割与由此删除分隔的对的总需求的比率。尽管付出了很多努力，但只有少数非平凡类别的供给图的常数因子近似值是已知的。我们考虑平面图的问题，并给出一个在拟多项式时间内运行的 $(2+\varepsilon)$ 近似算法。我们的方法使用“修补”原语定义了最佳解决方案的新结构分解。我们将此分解与问题的 Sherali-Adams 式线性规划松弛相结合，然后进行舍入。这应该与 Rao (1999) 的多项式时间逼近算法进行比较，该算法使用度量线性规划松弛和 $\ell_1$-嵌入，并在多项式时间内实现 $O(\sqrt{\log n})$ 逼近。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对平面图的稀疏割问题的近似算法，实现了(2+ε)的近似比，时间复杂度为准多项式。
AI.motivation: 稀疏割问题在图划分中具有重要意义，但目前仅对少数供应图类有常数因子近似算法。针对平面图这一重要类别，本文旨在提升近似比并探索更优解法。
AI.method: 通过定义最优解的结构分解新方法（称为'修补'原语），结合Sherali-Adams风格的线性规划松弛与随机化技术，实现对平面图的近似求解。
AI.result: 设计出准多项式时间复杂度的(2+ε)近似算法，相较于Rao的多项式时间O(√log n)近似方法，在近似比上取得突破性改进。
AI.conclusion: 本文为平面图稀疏割问题提供了更优的近似算法，通过结构分解与线性规划松弛的结合，推动了该领域在近似比与计算效率平衡上的研究进展。

authors_text: Jiemin Fang,Lingxi Xie,Xinggang Wang,Xiaopeng Zhang,Wenyu Liu,Qi Tian
title: MSG-Transformer: Exchanging Local Spatial Information by Manipulating Messenger Tokens
title_zh: MSG-Transformer：通过操纵信使令牌交换本地空间信息
abstract: Transformers have offered a new methodology of designing neural networks for visual recognition. Compared to convolutional networks, Transformers enjoy the ability of referring to global features at each stage, yet the attention module brings higher computational overhead that obstructs the application of Transformers to process high-resolution visual data. This paper aims to alleviate the conflict between efficiency and flexibility, for which we propose a specialized token for each region that serves as a messenger (MSG). Hence, by manipulating these MSG tokens, one can flexibly exchange visual information across regions and the computational complexity is reduced. We then integrate the MSG token into a multi-scale architecture named MSG-Transformer. In standard image classification and object detection, MSG-Transformer achieves competitive performance and the inference on both GPU and CPU is accelerated. Code is available at https://github.com/hustvl/MSG-Transformer.
summary: Transformers have offered a new methodology of designing neural networks for visual recognition. Compared to convolutional networks, Transformers enjoy the ability of referring to global features at each stage, yet the attention module brings higher computational overhead that obstructs the application of Transformers to process high-resolution visual data. This paper aims to alleviate the conflict between efficiency and flexibility, for which we propose a specialized token for each region that serves as a messenger (MSG). Hence, by manipulating these MSG tokens, one can flexibly exchange visual information across regions and the computational complexity is reduced. We then integrate the MSG token into a multi-scale architecture named MSG-Transformer. In standard image classification and object detection, MSG-Transformer achieves competitive performance and the inference on both GPU and CPU is accelerated. Code is available at https://github.com/hustvl/MSG-Transformer.
abstract_zh: 变形金刚提供了一种设计用于视觉识别的神经网络的新方法。与卷积网络相比，Transformers 具有在每个阶段引用全局特征的能力，但注意力模块带来了更高的计算开销，阻碍了 Transformers 处理高分辨率视觉数据的应用。本文旨在缓解效率和灵活性之间的冲突，为此我们为每个区域提出了一个专门的代币作为信使（MSG）。因此，通过操纵这些MSG令牌，人们可以灵活地跨区域交换视觉信息，并降低计算复杂度。然后，我们将 MSG 代币集成到名为 MSG-Transformer 的多规模架构中。在标准图像分类和目标检测中，MSG-Transformer 实现了具有竞争力的性能，并且加速了 GPU 和 CPU 上的推理。代码可在 https://github.com/hustvl/MSG-Transformer 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MSG-Transformer模型，通过引入信使标记（MSG token）在局部区域间交换空间信息，以解决Transformer处理高分辨率视觉数据时的计算效率问题。
AI.motivation: Transformer虽具备全局特征引用能力，但注意力机制的高计算开销限制了其在高分辨率视觉任务中的应用，需平衡效率与灵活性。
AI.method: 设计专用的MSG token作为区域信息中介，通过操控这些token实现跨区域信息交换，降低计算复杂度，并将其集成至多尺度架构MSG-Transformer中。
AI.result: 在标准图像分类和目标检测任务中，MSG-Transformer取得竞争力性能，且在GPU和CPU上的推理速度均显著提升。
AI.conclusion: MSG-Transformer通过创新的MSG token机制有效缓解了Transformer的效率瓶颈，在保持模型灵活性的同时提升了计算效率。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出MSG-Transformer模型，通过引入信使标记（MSG token）在局部区域间交换空间信息，以解决Transformer处理高分辨率视觉数据时的计算效率问题。
ai_content.motivation: Transformer虽具备全局特征引用能力，但注意力机制的高计算开销限制了其在高分辨率视觉任务中的应用，需平衡效率与灵活性。
ai_content.method: 设计专用的MSG token作为区域信息中介，通过操控这些token实现跨区域信息交换，降低计算复杂度，并将其集成至多尺度架构MSG-Transformer中。
ai_content.result: 在标准图像分类和目标检测任务中，MSG-Transformer取得竞争力性能，且在GPU和CPU上的推理速度均显著提升。
ai_content.conclusion: MSG-Transformer通过创新的MSG token机制有效缓解了Transformer的效率瓶颈，在保持模型灵活性的同时提升了计算效率。

search_text: MSG-Transformer: Exchanging Local Spatial Information by Manipulating Messenger Tokens MSG-Transformer：通过操纵信使令牌交换本地空间信息 Transformers have offered a new methodology of designing neural networks for visual recognition. Compared to convolutional networks, Transformers enjoy the ability of referring to global features at each stage, yet the attention module brings higher computational overhead that obstructs the application of Transformers to process high-resolution visual data. This paper aims to alleviate the conflict between efficiency and flexibility, for which we propose a specialized token for each region that serves as a messenger (MSG). Hence, by manipulating these MSG tokens, one can flexibly exchange visual information across regions and the computational complexity is reduced. We then integrate the MSG token into a multi-scale architecture named MSG-Transformer. In standard image classification and object detection, MSG-Transformer achieves competitive performance and the inference on both GPU and CPU is accelerated. Code is available at https://github.com/hustvl/MSG-Transformer. 变形金刚提供了一种设计用于视觉识别的神经网络的新方法。与卷积网络相比，Transformers 具有在每个阶段引用全局特征的能力，但注意力模块带来了更高的计算开销，阻碍了 Transformers 处理高分辨率视觉数据的应用。本文旨在缓解效率和灵活性之间的冲突，为此我们为每个区域提出了一个专门的代币作为信使（MSG）。因此，通过操纵这些MSG令牌，人们可以灵活地跨区域交换视觉信息，并降低计算复杂度。然后，我们将 MSG 代币集成到名为 MSG-Transformer 的多规模架构中。在标准图像分类和目标检测中，MSG-Transformer 实现了具有竞争力的性能，并且加速了 GPU 和 CPU 上的推理。代码可在 https://github.com/hustvl/MSG-Transformer 获取。 本文提出MSG-Transformer模型，通过引入信使标记（MSG token）在局部区域间交换空间信息，以解决Transformer处理高分辨率视觉数据时的计算效率问题。 Jiemin Fang,Lingxi Xie,Xinggang Wang,Xiaopeng Zhang,Wenyu Liu,Qi Tian cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Asma Ghandeharioun,Been Kim,Chun-Liang Li,Brendan Jou,Brian Eoff,Rosalind W. Picard
title: DISSECT: Disentangled Simultaneous Explanations via Concept Traversals
title_zh: 剖析：通过概念遍历解开同时解释
abstract: Explaining deep learning model inferences is a promising venue for scientific understanding, improving safety, uncovering hidden biases, evaluating fairness, and beyond, as argued by many scholars. One of the principal benefits of counterfactual explanations is allowing users to explore "what-if" scenarios through what does not and cannot exist in the data, a quality that many other forms of explanation such as heatmaps and influence functions are inherently incapable of doing. However, most previous work on generative explainability cannot disentangle important concepts effectively, produces unrealistic examples, or fails to retain relevant information. We propose a novel approach, DISSECT, that jointly trains a generator, a discriminator, and a concept disentangler to overcome such challenges using little supervision. DISSECT generates Concept Traversals (CTs), defined as a sequence of generated examples with increasing degrees of concepts that influence a classifier's decision. By training a generative model from a classifier's signal, DISSECT offers a way to discover a classifier's inherent "notion" of distinct concepts automatically rather than rely on user-predefined concepts. We show that DISSECT produces CTs that (1) disentangle several concepts, (2) are influential to a classifier's decision and are coupled to its reasoning due to joint training (3), are realistic, (4) preserve relevant information, and (5) are stable across similar inputs. We validate DISSECT on several challenging synthetic and realistic datasets where previous methods fall short of satisfying desirable criteria for interpretability and show that it performs consistently well and better than existing methods. Finally, we present experiments showing applications of DISSECT for detecting potential biases of a classifier and identifying spurious artifacts that impact predictions.
summary: Explaining deep learning model inferences is a promising venue for scientific understanding, improving safety, uncovering hidden biases, evaluating fairness, and beyond, as argued by many scholars. One of the principal benefits of counterfactual explanations is allowing users to explore "what-if" scenarios through what does not and cannot exist in the data, a quality that many other forms of explanation such as heatmaps and influence functions are inherently incapable of doing. However, most previous work on generative explainability cannot disentangle important concepts effectively, produces unrealistic examples, or fails to retain relevant information. We propose a novel approach, DISSECT, that jointly trains a generator, a discriminator, and a concept disentangler to overcome such challenges using little supervision. DISSECT generates Concept Traversals (CTs), defined as a sequence of generated examples with increasing degrees of concepts that influence a classifier's decision. By training a generative model from a classifier's signal, DISSECT offers a way to discover a classifier's inherent "notion" of distinct concepts automatically rather than rely on user-predefined concepts. We show that DISSECT produces CTs that (1) disentangle several concepts, (2) are influential to a classifier's decision and are coupled to its reasoning due to joint training (3), are realistic, (4) preserve relevant information, and (5) are stable across similar inputs. We validate DISSECT on several challenging synthetic and realistic datasets where previous methods fall short of satisfying desirable criteria for interpretability and show that it performs consistently well and better than existing methods. Finally, we present experiments showing applications of DISSECT for detecting potential biases of a classifier and identifying spurious artifacts that impact predictions.
abstract_zh: 正如许多学者所认为的那样，解释深度学习模型推论是科学理解、提高安全性、发现隐藏偏见、评估公平性等方面的一个有前景的领域。反事实解释的主要好处之一是允许用户通过数据中不存在或不可能存在的内容来探索“假设”场景，这是许多其他形式的解释（例如热图和影响函数）本质上无法做到的。然而，大多数先前关于生成可解释性的工作无法有效地理清重要概念，产生不切实际的例子，或者无法保留相关信息。我们提出了一种新颖的方法，DISSECT，它联合训练生成器、鉴别器和概念解开器，以在几乎不需要监督的情况下克服这些挑战。 DISSECT 生成概念遍历 (CT)，定义为一系列生成的示例，其影响分类器决策的概念程度不断增加。通过根据分类器的信号训练生成模型，DISSECT 提供了一种自动发现分类器的不同概念的固有“概念”的方法，而不是依赖于用户预定义的概念。我们表明，DISSECT 生成的 CT 具有以下特点：(1) 理清多个概念；(2) 对分类器的决策有影响，并通过联合训练与其推理相耦合；(3) 是现实的；(4) 保留相关信息；(5) 在相似的输入中保持稳定。我们在几个具有挑战性的合成和现实数据集上验证了 DISSECT，以前的方法无法满足可解释性的理想标准，但表明它的表现始终良好，并且比现有方法更好。最后，我们展示了 DISSECT 在检测分类器的潜在偏差和识别影响预测的虚假伪影方面的应用的实验。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DISSECT方法，通过概念遍历生成解耦的反事实解释，以提升深度学习模型的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式解释方法难以有效分离关键概念，生成的示例不真实或丢失重要信息，限制了模型解释的准确性和实用性。
AI.method: 联合训练生成器、判别器和概念解耦器，利用分类器信号自动生成概念遍历序列（CTs），无需依赖预定义概念。
AI.result: DISSECT生成的CTs在多个数据集上表现优异，具备概念解耦性、决策影响力、真实性、信息保留性和输入稳定性。
AI.conclusion: DISSECT有效解决了生成解释的可解释性难题，并可应用于检测分类器偏见和识别预测干扰因素。

authors_text: Aciel Eshky,Joanne Cleland,Manuel Sam Ribeiro,Eleanor Sugden,Korin Richmond,Steve Renals
title: Automatic audiovisual synchronisation for ultrasound tongue imaging
title_zh: 超声舌成像自动视听同步
comment: 18 pages, 10 figures. Manuscript accepted at Speech Communication
comments: 18 pages, 10 figures. Manuscript accepted at Speech Communication
abstract: Ultrasound tongue imaging is used to visualise the intra-oral articulators during speech production. It is utilised in a range of applications, including speech and language therapy and phonetics research. Ultrasound and speech audio are recorded simultaneously, and in order to correctly use this data, the two modalities should be correctly synchronised. Synchronisation is achieved using specialised hardware at recording time, but this approach can fail in practice resulting in data of limited usability. In this paper, we address the problem of automatically synchronising ultrasound and audio after data collection. We first investigate the tolerance of expert ultrasound users to synchronisation errors in order to find the thresholds for error detection. We use these thresholds to define accuracy scoring boundaries for evaluating our system. We then describe our approach for automatic synchronisation, which is driven by a self-supervised neural network, exploiting the correlation between the two signals to synchronise them. We train our model on data from multiple domains with different speaker characteristics, different equipment, and different recording environments, and achieve an accuracy >92.4% on held-out in-domain data. Finally, we introduce a novel resource, the Cleft dataset, which we gathered with a new clinical subgroup and for which hardware synchronisation proved unreliable. We apply our model to this out-of-domain data, and evaluate its performance subjectively with expert users. Results show that users prefer our model's output over the original hardware output 79.3% of the time. Our results demonstrate the strength of our approach and its ability to generalise to data from new domains.
summary: Ultrasound tongue imaging is used to visualise the intra-oral articulators during speech production. It is utilised in a range of applications, including speech and language therapy and phonetics research. Ultrasound and speech audio are recorded simultaneously, and in order to correctly use this data, the two modalities should be correctly synchronised. Synchronisation is achieved using specialised hardware at recording time, but this approach can fail in practice resulting in data of limited usability. In this paper, we address the problem of automatically synchronising ultrasound and audio after data collection. We first investigate the tolerance of expert ultrasound users to synchronisation errors in order to find the thresholds for error detection. We use these thresholds to define accuracy scoring boundaries for evaluating our system. We then describe our approach for automatic synchronisation, which is driven by a self-supervised neural network, exploiting the correlation between the two signals to synchronise them. We train our model on data from multiple domains with different speaker characteristics, different equipment, and different recording environments, and achieve an accuracy >92.4% on held-out in-domain data. Finally, we introduce a novel resource, the Cleft dataset, which we gathered with a new clinical subgroup and for which hardware synchronisation proved unreliable. We apply our model to this out-of-domain data, and evaluate its performance subjectively with expert users. Results show that users prefer our model's output over the original hardware output 79.3% of the time. Our results demonstrate the strength of our approach and its ability to generalise to data from new domains.
abstract_zh: 超声舌成像用于在言语产生过程中可视化口内咬合架。它被用于一系列应用，包括言语和语言治疗以及语音学研究。超声和语音音频是同时记录的，为了正确使用这些数据，两种模式应该正确同步。同步是在记录时使用专门的硬件来实现的，但这种方法在实践中可能会失败，导致数据的可用性有限。在本文中，我们解决了数据收集后自动同步超声和音频的问题。我们首先调查专家超声用户对同步错误的容忍度，以便找到错误检测的阈值。我们使用这些阈值来定义评估我们系统的准确性评分边界。然后，我们描述我们的自动同步方法，该方法由自监督神经网络驱动，利用两个信号之间的相关性来同步它们。我们使用来自不同说话者特征、不同设备和不同录音环境的多个域的数据来训练我们的模型，并在保留的域内数据上实现 >92.4% 的准确率。最后，我们介绍了一种新颖的资源，即 Cleft 数据集，我们通过一个新的临床亚组收集了该数据集，但事实证明该数据集的硬件同步不可靠。我们将我们的模型应用于这些域外数据，并与专家用户一起主观评估其性能。结果表明，在 79.3% 的情况下，用户更喜欢我们模型的输出而不是原始硬件输出。我们的结果证明了我们方法的优势及其泛化到新领域数据的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自动同步超声波舌像与音频信号的方法，以解决硬件同步失败导致的数据可用性问题。
AI.motivation: 超声波舌像与音频数据的硬件同步在实际应用中可能失效，导致数据难以使用，需开发后处理自动同步技术。
AI.method: 基于自监督神经网络，利用音频与超声信号间的相关性进行同步，并在多领域数据上训练模型。
AI.result: 在域内数据上达到92.4%的准确率，且在新临床数据集Cleft中，专家用户79.3%偏好模型输出而非硬件同步结果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效且具备跨领域泛化能力，为超声舌像与音频同步提供了可靠解决方案。

search_text: Automatic audiovisual synchronisation for ultrasound tongue imaging 超声舌成像自动视听同步 Ultrasound tongue imaging is used to visualise the intra-oral articulators during speech production. It is utilised in a range of applications, including speech and language therapy and phonetics research. Ultrasound and speech audio are recorded simultaneously, and in order to correctly use this data, the two modalities should be correctly synchronised. Synchronisation is achieved using specialised hardware at recording time, but this approach can fail in practice resulting in data of limited usability. In this paper, we address the problem of automatically synchronising ultrasound and audio after data collection. We first investigate the tolerance of expert ultrasound users to synchronisation errors in order to find the thresholds for error detection. We use these thresholds to define accuracy scoring boundaries for evaluating our system. We then describe our approach for automatic synchronisation, which is driven by a self-supervised neural network, exploiting the correlation between the two signals to synchronise them. We train our model on data from multiple domains with different speaker characteristics, different equipment, and different recording environments, and achieve an accuracy >92.4% on held-out in-domain data. Finally, we introduce a novel resource, the Cleft dataset, which we gathered with a new clinical subgroup and for which hardware synchronisation proved unreliable. We apply our model to this out-of-domain data, and evaluate its performance subjectively with expert users. Results show that users prefer our model's output over the original hardware output 79.3% of the time. Our results demonstrate the strength of our approach and its ability to generalise to data from new domains. 超声舌成像用于在言语产生过程中可视化口内咬合架。它被用于一系列应用，包括言语和语言治疗以及语音学研究。超声和语音音频是同时记录的，为了正确使用这些数据，两种模式应该正确同步。同步是在记录时使用专门的硬件来实现的，但这种方法在实践中可能会失败，导致数据的可用性有限。在本文中，我们解决了数据收集后自动同步超声和音频的问题。我们首先调查专家超声用户对同步错误的容忍度，以便找到错误检测的阈值。我们使用这些阈值来定义评估我们系统的准确性评分边界。然后，我们描述我们的自动同步方法，该方法由自监督神经网络驱动，利用两个信号之间的相关性来同步它们。我们使用来自不同说话者特征、不同设备和不同录音环境的多个域的数据来训练我们的模型，并在保留的域内数据上实现 >92.4% 的准确率。最后，我们介绍了一种新颖的资源，即 Cleft 数据集，我们通过一个新的临床亚组收集了该数据集，但事实证明该数据集的硬件同步不可靠。我们将我们的模型应用于这些域外数据，并与专家用户一起主观评估其性能。结果表明，在 79.3% 的情况下，用户更喜欢我们模型的输出而不是原始硬件输出。我们的结果证明了我们方法的优势及其泛化到新领域数据的能力。 本文提出一种自动同步超声波舌像与音频信号的方法，以解决硬件同步失败导致的数据可用性问题。 Aciel Eshky,Joanne Cleland,Manuel Sam Ribeiro,Eleanor Sugden,Korin Richmond,Steve Renals eess.AS,cs.CL,cs.LG,cs.SD,eess.IV

authors_text: Zhongzheng Tang,Chenhao Wang,Hau Chan
title: On maximizing a monotone $k$-submodular function under a knapsack constraint
title_zh: 背包约束下单调$k$子模函数的最大化
comment: This manuscript is published in Operations Research Letters, but there is an error in the proof of Theorem 1. We provide a corrigendum in the end of this manuscript
comments: This manuscript is published in Operations Research Letters, but there is an error in the proof of Theorem 1. We provide a corrigendum in the end of this manuscript
abstract: We study the problem of maximizing a non-negative monotone $k$-submodular function $f$ under a knapsack constraint, where a $k$-submodular function is a natural generalization of a submodular function to $k$ dimensions. We present a deterministic $(\frac12-\frac{1}{2e})\approx 0.316$-approximation algorithm that evaluates $f$ $O(n^4k^3)$ times, based on the result of Sviridenko (2004) on submodular knapsack maximization.
summary: We study the problem of maximizing a non-negative monotone $k$-submodular function $f$ under a knapsack constraint, where a $k$-submodular function is a natural generalization of a submodular function to $k$ dimensions. We present a deterministic $(\frac12-\frac{1}{2e})\approx 0.316$-approximation algorithm that evaluates $f$ $O(n^4k^3)$ times, based on the result of Sviridenko (2004) on submodular knapsack maximization.
abstract_zh: 我们研究在背包约束下最大化非负单调 $k$ 子模函数 $f$ 的问题，其中 $k$ 子模函数是子模函数到 $k$ 维度的自然推广。我们提出了一种确定性的 $(\frac12-\frac{1}{2e})\approx 0.316$ 近似算法，该算法基于 Sviridenko (2004) 关于子模背包最大化的结果，计算 $f$ $O(n^4k^3)$ 次。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在背包约束下最大化单调k-子模函数的问题，并提出了一种近似算法。
AI.motivation: k-子模函数是子模函数的自然推广，具有广泛的应用场景，但在背包约束下的优化方法研究较少。
AI.method: 基于Sviridenko（2004）的子模背包最大化结果，设计一种确定性算法，通过评估函数f的O(n^4k^3)次操作实现目标。
AI.result: 提出算法达到(1/2 - 1/(2e))≈0.316的近似比，时间复杂度为O(n^4k^3)。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为解决多维背包约束下的k-子模函数优化提供了理论保证，为后续研究奠定基础。

authors_text: Tao Wang,Ruixin Zhang,Xingyu Chen,Kai Zhao,Xiaolin Huang,Yuge Huang,Shaoxin Li,Jilin Li,Feiyue Huang
title: Adaptive Feature Alignment for Adversarial Training
title_zh: 用于对抗训练的自适应特征对齐
abstract: Recent studies reveal that Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) are typically vulnerable to adversarial attacks, which pose a threat to security-sensitive applications. Many adversarial defense methods improve robustness at the cost of accuracy, raising the contradiction between standard and adversarial accuracies. In this paper, we observe an interesting phenomenon that feature statistics change monotonically and smoothly w.r.t the rising of attacking strength. Based on this observation, we propose the adaptive feature alignment (AFA) to generate features of arbitrary attacking strengths. Our method is trained to automatically align features of arbitrary attacking strength. This is done by predicting a fusing weight in a dual-BN architecture. Unlike previous works that need to either retrain the model or manually tune a hyper-parameters for different attacking strengths, our method can deal with arbitrary attacking strengths with a single model without introducing any hyper-parameter. Importantly, our method improves the model robustness against adversarial samples without incurring much loss in standard accuracy. Experiments on CIFAR-10, SVHN, and tiny-ImageNet datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art under a wide range of attacking strengths.
summary: Recent studies reveal that Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) are typically vulnerable to adversarial attacks, which pose a threat to security-sensitive applications. Many adversarial defense methods improve robustness at the cost of accuracy, raising the contradiction between standard and adversarial accuracies. In this paper, we observe an interesting phenomenon that feature statistics change monotonically and smoothly w.r.t the rising of attacking strength. Based on this observation, we propose the adaptive feature alignment (AFA) to generate features of arbitrary attacking strengths. Our method is trained to automatically align features of arbitrary attacking strength. This is done by predicting a fusing weight in a dual-BN architecture. Unlike previous works that need to either retrain the model or manually tune a hyper-parameters for different attacking strengths, our method can deal with arbitrary attacking strengths with a single model without introducing any hyper-parameter. Importantly, our method improves the model robustness against adversarial samples without incurring much loss in standard accuracy. Experiments on CIFAR-10, SVHN, and tiny-ImageNet datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art under a wide range of attacking strengths.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，卷积神经网络（CNN）通常容易受到对抗性攻击，这对安全敏感的应用程序构成威胁。许多对抗性防御方法以牺牲准确性为代价来提高鲁棒性，从而引发了标准精度和对抗性精度之间的矛盾。在本文中，我们观察到一个有趣的现象，即统计数据随着攻击强度的上升而单调且平滑地变化。基于这一观察，我们提出了自适应特征对齐（AFA）来生成任意攻击强度的特征。我们的方法经过训练可以自动对齐任意攻击强度的特征。这是通过预测双 BN 架构中的融合权重来完成的。与之前的工作需要重新训练模型或手动调整超参数以适应不同的攻击强度不同，我们的方法可以使用单个模型处理任意攻击强度，而无需引入任何超参数。重要的是，我们的方法提高了模型针对对抗性样本的鲁棒性，而不会造成标准精度的太大损失。在 CIFAR-10、SVHN 和tiny-ImageNet 数据集上的实验表明，我们的方法在各种攻击强度下都优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出自适应特征对齐（AFA）方法，在对抗训练中提升CNN模型鲁棒性同时保持标准准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗防御方法在提升模型鲁棒性时通常会牺牲准确率，且需重新训练或手动调整超参数应对不同强度攻击。
AI.method: 基于特征统计量随攻击强度单调变化的观察，设计双BN架构自动预测融合权重，实现任意攻击强度下特征对齐。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10、SVHN和tiny-ImageNet数据集上，该方法在广泛攻击强度下均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: AFA方法通过单模型自动适应不同攻击强度，在不显著损失标准准确率的前提下有效提升模型鲁棒性。

authors_text: Mohammad Sina Kiarostami
title: Comparing Two Different Approaches in Big Data and Business Analysis for Churn Prediction with the Focus on How Apache Spark Employed
title_zh: 比较大数据和业务分析中用于客户流失预测的两种不同方法，重点关注 Apache Spark 的使用方式
abstract: Due to the significant importance of Big Data analysis, especially in business-related topics such as improving services, finding potential customers, and selecting practical approaches to manage income and expenses, many companies attempt to collaborate with scientists to find how, why, and what they should analysis. In this work, we would like to compare and discuss two different approaches that employed in business analysis topic in Big Data with more consideration on how they utilized Spark. Both studies have investigated Churn Prediction as their case study for their proposed approaches since it is an essential topic in business analysis for companies to recognize a customer intends to leave or stop using their services. Here, we focus on Apache Spark since it has provided several solutions to handle a massive amount of data in recent years efficiently. This feature in Spark makes it one of the most robust candidate tools to upfront with a Big Data problem, particularly time and resource are concerns.
summary: Due to the significant importance of Big Data analysis, especially in business-related topics such as improving services, finding potential customers, and selecting practical approaches to manage income and expenses, many companies attempt to collaborate with scientists to find how, why, and what they should analysis. In this work, we would like to compare and discuss two different approaches that employed in business analysis topic in Big Data with more consideration on how they utilized Spark. Both studies have investigated Churn Prediction as their case study for their proposed approaches since it is an essential topic in business analysis for companies to recognize a customer intends to leave or stop using their services. Here, we focus on Apache Spark since it has provided several solutions to handle a massive amount of data in recent years efficiently. This feature in Spark makes it one of the most robust candidate tools to upfront with a Big Data problem, particularly time and resource are concerns.
abstract_zh: 由于大数据分析的重要性，特别是在改进服务、寻找潜在客户以及选择管理收入和支出的实用方法等业务相关主题中，许多公司尝试与科学家合作，找出他们应该分析的方式、原因和内容。在这项工作中，我们希望比较和讨论大数据业务分析主题中采用的两种不同方法，并更多地考虑它们如何利用 Spark。这两项研究都将客户流失预测作为其提出的方法的案例研究，因为对于公司来说，识别客户打算离开或停止使用其服务是业务分析中的一个重要主题。在这里，我们重点关注 Apache Spark，因为它近年来提供了多种解决方案来有效处理海量数据。 Spark 中的这一功能使其成为解决大数据问题（尤其是时间和资源问题）最强大的候选工具之一。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在比较两种大数据与商业分析方法在客户流失预测中的应用，并重点探讨Apache Spark在其中的运用。
AI.motivation: 由于大数据分析在商业中的重要性，公司需要有效的方法来管理客户流失，而Apache Spark因其高效处理大数据的能力成为研究重点。
AI.method: 通过比较两种不同的大数据分析方法，利用Apache Spark处理和分析客户流失预测案例，评估其在处理大规模数据时的效率与效果。
AI.result: 研究结果展示了两种方法在客户流失预测中的效果差异，并验证了Apache Spark在处理大规模数据时的高效性与资源优化能力。
AI.conclusion: 结论指出Apache Spark在处理大数据分析任务中具有显著优势，为商业分析中的客户流失预测提供了高效解决方案。

search_text: Comparing Two Different Approaches in Big Data and Business Analysis for Churn Prediction with the Focus on How Apache Spark Employed 比较大数据和业务分析中用于客户流失预测的两种不同方法，重点关注 Apache Spark 的使用方式 Due to the significant importance of Big Data analysis, especially in business-related topics such as improving services, finding potential customers, and selecting practical approaches to manage income and expenses, many companies attempt to collaborate with scientists to find how, why, and what they should analysis. In this work, we would like to compare and discuss two different approaches that employed in business analysis topic in Big Data with more consideration on how they utilized Spark. Both studies have investigated Churn Prediction as their case study for their proposed approaches since it is an essential topic in business analysis for companies to recognize a customer intends to leave or stop using their services. Here, we focus on Apache Spark since it has provided several solutions to handle a massive amount of data in recent years efficiently. This feature in Spark makes it one of the most robust candidate tools to upfront with a Big Data problem, particularly time and resource are concerns. 由于大数据分析的重要性，特别是在改进服务、寻找潜在客户以及选择管理收入和支出的实用方法等业务相关主题中，许多公司尝试与科学家合作，找出他们应该分析的方式、原因和内容。在这项工作中，我们希望比较和讨论大数据业务分析主题中采用的两种不同方法，并更多地考虑它们如何利用 Spark。这两项研究都将客户流失预测作为其提出的方法的案例研究，因为对于公司来说，识别客户打算离开或停止使用其服务是业务分析中的一个重要主题。在这里，我们重点关注 Apache Spark，因为它近年来提供了多种解决方案来有效处理海量数据。 Spark 中的这一功能使其成为解决大数据问题（尤其是时间和资源问题）最强大的候选工具之一。 本文旨在比较两种大数据与商业分析方法在客户流失预测中的应用，并重点探讨Apache Spark在其中的运用。 Mohammad Sina Kiarostami cs.DC,cs.AI

authors_text: Sajib Mistry,Athman Bouguettaya
title: Reputation Bootstrapping for Composite Services using CP-nets
title_zh: 使用 CP-nets 的复合服务的声誉引导
comment: 14 Pages, accepted and to appear in IEEE Transactions on Services Computing
comments: 14 Pages, accepted and to appear in IEEE Transactions on Services Computing
abstract: We propose a novel framework to bootstrap the reputation of on-demand service compositions. On-demand compositions are usually context-aware and have little or no direct consumer feedback. The reputation bootstrapping of single or atomic services does not consider the topology of the composition and relationships among reputation-related factors. We apply Conditional Preference Networks (CP-nets) of reputation-related factors for component services in a composition. The reputation of a composite service is bootstrapped by the composition of CP-nets. We consider the history of invocation among component services to determine reputation-interdependence in a composition. The composition rules are constructed using the composition topology and four types of reputation-influence among component services. A heuristic-based Q-learning approach is proposed to select the optimal set of reputation-related CP-nets. Experimental results prove the efficiency of the proposed approach.
summary: We propose a novel framework to bootstrap the reputation of on-demand service compositions. On-demand compositions are usually context-aware and have little or no direct consumer feedback. The reputation bootstrapping of single or atomic services does not consider the topology of the composition and relationships among reputation-related factors. We apply Conditional Preference Networks (CP-nets) of reputation-related factors for component services in a composition. The reputation of a composite service is bootstrapped by the composition of CP-nets. We consider the history of invocation among component services to determine reputation-interdependence in a composition. The composition rules are constructed using the composition topology and four types of reputation-influence among component services. A heuristic-based Q-learning approach is proposed to select the optimal set of reputation-related CP-nets. Experimental results prove the efficiency of the proposed approach.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个新颖的框架来提升按需服务组合的声誉。按需创作通常是上下文感知的，并且很少或没有直接的消费者反馈。单个或原子服务的信誉引导没有考虑信誉相关因素之间的组成拓扑和关系。我们将声誉相关因素的条件偏好网络（CP-nets）应用于组合中的组件服务。综合服务的声誉是由 CP 网络的组成来引导的。我们考虑组件服务之间的调用历史来确定组合中的信誉相互依赖性。组合规则是使用组合拓扑和组件服务之间的四种类型的声誉影响来构建的。提出了一种基于启发式的 Q 学习方法来选择最佳的声誉相关 CP 网络集。实验结果证明了该方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于条件偏好网络（CP-nets）的框架，用于引导按需服务组合的声誉初始化，考虑服务组合的拓扑结构和声誉相关因素的关联性。
AI.motivation: 现有单个服务的声誉引导方法未考虑服务组合的拓扑结构及组件间声誉因素的相互影响，导致对缺乏直接用户反馈的按需组合服务难以有效评估声誉。
AI.method: 通过构建组件服务的条件偏好网络，结合调用历史确定声誉关联性，基于组合拓扑和四种声誉影响类型制定组合规则，并采用启发式Q学习选择最优CP-net集合。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法在服务组合声誉引导中的高效性，能够有效处理复杂组合结构下的声誉初始化问题。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过整合服务组合结构与声誉因素关联性，为缺乏直接反馈的组合服务提供了可扩展的声誉引导解决方案。

authors_text: Zixin Wen,Yuanzhi Li
title: Toward Understanding the Feature Learning Process of Self-supervised Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 理解自监督对比学习的特征学习过程
comment: V3 corrected related works. Accepted to ICML2021
comments: V3 corrected related works. Accepted to ICML2021
abstract: How can neural networks trained by contrastive learning extract features from the unlabeled data? Why does contrastive learning usually need much stronger data augmentations than supervised learning to ensure good representations? These questions involve both the optimization and statistical aspects of deep learning, but can hardly be answered by analyzing supervised learning, where the target functions are the highest pursuit. Indeed, in self-supervised learning, it is inevitable to relate to the optimization/generalization of neural networks to how they can encode the latent structures in the data, which we refer to as the feature learning process. In this work, we formally study how contrastive learning learns the feature representations for neural networks by analyzing its feature learning process. We consider the case where our data are comprised of two types of features: the more semantically aligned sparse features which we want to learn from, and the other dense features we want to avoid. Theoretically, we prove that contrastive learning using $\mathbf{ReLU}$ networks provably learns the desired sparse features if proper augmentations are adopted. We present an underlying principle called $\textbf{feature decoupling}$ to explain the effects of augmentations, where we theoretically characterize how augmentations can reduce the correlations of dense features between positive samples while keeping the correlations of sparse features intact, thereby forcing the neural networks to learn from the self-supervision of sparse features. Empirically, we verified that the feature decoupling principle matches the underlying mechanism of contrastive learning in practice.
summary: How can neural networks trained by contrastive learning extract features from the unlabeled data? Why does contrastive learning usually need much stronger data augmentations than supervised learning to ensure good representations? These questions involve both the optimization and statistical aspects of deep learning, but can hardly be answered by analyzing supervised learning, where the target functions are the highest pursuit. Indeed, in self-supervised learning, it is inevitable to relate to the optimization/generalization of neural networks to how they can encode the latent structures in the data, which we refer to as the feature learning process. In this work, we formally study how contrastive learning learns the feature representations for neural networks by analyzing its feature learning process. We consider the case where our data are comprised of two types of features: the more semantically aligned sparse features which we want to learn from, and the other dense features we want to avoid. Theoretically, we prove that contrastive learning using $\mathbf{ReLU}$ networks provably learns the desired sparse features if proper augmentations are adopted. We present an underlying principle called $\textbf{feature decoupling}$ to explain the effects of augmentations, where we theoretically characterize how augmentations can reduce the correlations of dense features between positive samples while keeping the correlations of sparse features intact, thereby forcing the neural networks to learn from the self-supervision of sparse features. Empirically, we verified that the feature decoupling principle matches the underlying mechanism of contrastive learning in practice.
abstract_zh: 通过对比学习训练的神经网络如何从未标记的数据中提取特征？为什么对比学习通常需要比监督学习更强的数据增强才能确保良好的表示？这些问题既涉及深度学习的优化问题，也涉及统计方面的问题，但很难通过分析以目标函数为最高追求的监督学习来回答。事实上，在自监督学习中，神经网络的优化/泛化不可避免地涉及到它们如何编码数据中的潜在结构，我们将其称为特征学习过程。在这项工作中，我们通过分析其特征学习过程，正式研究对比学习如何学习神经网络的特征表示。我们考虑这样的情况：我们的数据由两种类型的特征组成：我们想要学习的语义上更一致的稀疏特征，以及我们想要避免的其他密集特征。理论上，我们证明，如果采用适当的增强，使用 $\mathbf{ReLU}$ 网络的对比学习可以学习所需的稀疏特征。我们提出了一个称为 $\textbf{feature decoupling}$ 的基本原理来解释增强的效果，其中我们从理论上描述了增强如何减少正样本之间密集特征的相关性，同时保持稀疏特征的相关性不变，从而迫使神经网络从稀疏特征的自我监督中学习。我们根据经验验证了特征解耦原理与实践中对比学习的底层机制相匹配。

AI.tldr: 本文研究自监督对比学习中神经网络如何通过特征学习过程提取数据中的语义稀疏特征，并分析其与数据增强的关系。
AI.motivation: 对比学习需要更强的数据增强来确保良好表征，但其特征学习机制尚未被充分理解，尤其在无监督场景下如何分离稀疏与密集特征是关键问题。
AI.method: 通过理论分析ReLU网络，提出'特征解耦'原理，证明适当增强可降低密集特征相关性，同时保留稀疏特征相关性，迫使网络学习稀疏特征；并进行实验验证。
AI.result: 理论证明对比学习在合理增强下可有效学习稀疏特征，实验验证了特征解耦原理与实际对比学习机制的一致性。
AI.conclusion: 特征解耦原理揭示了对比学习依赖增强的机制，为理解自监督学习的特征学习过程提供了理论依据，指导增强策略设计。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 特征解耦原理揭示了对比学习依赖增强的机制，为理解自监督学习的特征学习过程提供了理论依据，指导增强策略设计。

search_text: Toward Understanding the Feature Learning Process of Self-supervised Contrastive Learning 理解自监督对比学习的特征学习过程 How can neural networks trained by contrastive learning extract features from the unlabeled data? Why does contrastive learning usually need much stronger data augmentations than supervised learning to ensure good representations? These questions involve both the optimization and statistical aspects of deep learning, but can hardly be answered by analyzing supervised learning, where the target functions are the highest pursuit. Indeed, in self-supervised learning, it is inevitable to relate to the optimization/generalization of neural networks to how they can encode the latent structures in the data, which we refer to as the feature learning process. In this work, we formally study how contrastive learning learns the feature representations for neural networks by analyzing its feature learning process. We consider the case where our data are comprised of two types of features: the more semantically aligned sparse features which we want to learn from, and the other dense features we want to avoid. Theoretically, we prove that contrastive learning using $\mathbf{ReLU}$ networks provably learns the desired sparse features if proper augmentations are adopted. We present an underlying principle called $\textbf{feature decoupling}$ to explain the effects of augmentations, where we theoretically characterize how augmentations can reduce the correlations of dense features between positive samples while keeping the correlations of sparse features intact, thereby forcing the neural networks to learn from the self-supervision of sparse features. Empirically, we verified that the feature decoupling principle matches the underlying mechanism of contrastive learning in practice. 通过对比学习训练的神经网络如何从未标记的数据中提取特征？为什么对比学习通常需要比监督学习更强的数据增强才能确保良好的表示？这些问题既涉及深度学习的优化问题，也涉及统计方面的问题，但很难通过分析以目标函数为最高追求的监督学习来回答。事实上，在自监督学习中，神经网络的优化/泛化不可避免地涉及到它们如何编码数据中的潜在结构，我们将其称为特征学习过程。在这项工作中，我们通过分析其特征学习过程，正式研究对比学习如何学习神经网络的特征表示。我们考虑这样的情况：我们的数据由两种类型的特征组成：我们想要学习的语义上更一致的稀疏特征，以及我们想要避免的其他密集特征。理论上，我们证明，如果采用适当的增强，使用 $\mathbf{ReLU}$ 网络的对比学习可以学习所需的稀疏特征。我们提出了一个称为 $\textbf{feature decoupling}$ 的基本原理来解释增强的效果，其中我们从理论上描述了增强如何减少正样本之间密集特征的相关性，同时保持稀疏特征的相关性不变，从而迫使神经网络从稀疏特征的自我监督中学习。我们根据经验验证了特征解耦原理与实践中对比学习的底层机制相匹配。 本文研究自监督对比学习中神经网络如何通过特征学习过程提取数据中的语义稀疏特征，并分析其与数据增强的关系。 Zixin Wen,Yuanzhi Li cs.LG,cs.CV,stat.ML

authors_text: Martin Gerlach,Marshall Miller,Rita Ho,Kosta Harlan,Djellel Difallah
title: A Multilingual Entity Linking System for Wikipedia with a Machine-in-the-Loop Approach
title_zh: 采用机器在环方法的维基百科多语言实体链接系统
abstract: Hyperlinks constitute the backbone of the Web; they enable user navigation, information discovery, content ranking, and many other crucial services on the Internet. In particular, hyperlinks found within Wikipedia allow the readers to navigate from one page to another to expand their knowledge on a given subject of interest or to discover a new one. However, despite Wikipedia editors' efforts to add and maintain its content, the distribution of links remains sparse in many language editions. This paper introduces a machine-in-the-loop entity linking system that can comply with community guidelines for adding a link and aims at increasing link coverage in new pages and wiki-projects with low-resources. To tackle these challenges, we build a context and language agnostic entity linking model that combines data collected from millions of anchors found across wiki-projects, as well as billions of users' reading sessions. We develop an interactive recommendation interface that proposes candidate links to editors who can confirm, reject, or adapt the recommendation with the overall aim of providing a more accessible editing experience for newcomers through structured tasks. Our system's design choices were made in collaboration with members of several language communities. When the system is implemented as part of Wikipedia, its usage by volunteer editors will help us build a continuous evaluation dataset with active feedback. Our experimental results show that our link recommender can achieve a precision above 80% while ensuring a recall of at least 50% across 6 languages covering different sizes, continents, and families.

In particular, hyperlinks found within Wikipedia allow the readers to navigate from one page to another to expand their knowledge on a given subject of interest or to discover a new one. However, despite Wikipedia editors' efforts to add and maintain its content, the distribution of links remains sparse in many language editions. This paper introduces a machine-in-the-loop entity linking system that can comply with community guidelines for adding a link and aims at increasing link coverage in new pages and wiki-projects with low-resources. To tackle these challenges, we build a context and language agnostic entity linking model that combines data collected from millions of anchors found across wiki-projects, as well as billions of users' reading sessions. We develop an interactive recommendation interface that proposes candidate links to editors who can confirm, reject, or adapt the recommendation with the overall aim of providing a more accessible editing experience for newcomers through structured tasks. Our system's design choices were made in collaboration with members of several language communities. When the system is implemented as part of Wikipedia, its usage by volunteer editors will help us build a continuous evaluation dataset with active feedback. Our experimental results show that our link recommender can achieve a precision above 80% while ensuring a recall of at least 50% across 6 languages covering different sizes, continents, and families.
abstract_zh: 超链接构成了网络的支柱；它们支持用户导航、信息发现、内容排名以及互联网上的许多其他重要服务。特别是，维基百科中的超链接允许读者从一个页面导航到另一页面，以扩展他们对特定感兴趣主题的知识或发现新主题。然而，尽管维基百科编辑努力添加和维护其内容，但许多语言版本中的链接分布仍然稀疏。本文介绍了一种机器在环实体链接系统，该系统可以遵循添加链接的社区准则，旨在增加新页面和资源匮乏的维基项目中的链接覆盖率。为了应对这些挑战，我们构建了一个与上下文和语言无关的实体链接模型，该模型结合了从 wiki 项目中发现的数百万个锚点以及数十亿用户的阅读会话中收集的数据。我们开发了一个交互式推荐界面，向编辑提出候选链接，编辑可以确认、拒绝或调整推荐，总体目标是通过结构化任务为新手提供更易于访问的编辑体验。我们系统的设计选择是与多个语言社区的成员合作做出的。当该系统作为维基百科的一部分实施时，志愿者编辑的使用将帮助我们构建一个具有主动反馈的持续评估数据集。我们的实验结果表明，我们的链接推荐器可以实现 80% 以上的精确度，同时确保覆盖不同规模、大洲和家族的 6 种语言的召回率至少为 50%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合机器推荐与社区编辑的多语言实体链接系统，旨在提升维基百科中低资源语言版本的链接覆盖率。
AI.motivation: 维基百科的多语言版本中存在链接稀疏问题，尤其在低资源语言社区中，需通过自动化工具与人工协作提升链接质量与覆盖率。
AI.method: 构建语言无关的实体链接模型，结合数百万锚文本与数十亿用户阅读数据，开发交互式推荐界面供编辑确认或调整链接，并与多语言社区合作优化系统设计。
AI.result: 系统在6种语言中实现超过80%的精确率和至少50%的召回率，同时通过志愿者编辑反馈持续优化数据集。
AI.conclusion: 机器-人工协作模式有效提升维基百科链接覆盖率，为低资源语言社区提供结构化编辑工具，未来可通过持续反馈进一步优化模型性能。

authors_text: Saeed Ghadiri
title: Anchor Nodes Positioning for Self-localization in Wireless Sensor Networks using Belief Propagation and Evolutionary Algorithms
title_zh: 使用置信传播和进化算法在无线传感器网络中进行自定位的锚节点定位
abstract: Locating each node in a wireless sensor network is essential for starting the monitoring job and sending information about the area. One method that has been used in hard and inaccessible environments is randomly scattering each node in the area. In order to reduce the cost of using GPS at each node, some nodes should be equipped with GPS (anchors), Then using the belief propagation algorithm, locate other nodes. The number of anchor nodes must be reduced since they are expensive. Furthermore, the location of these nodes affects the algorithm's performance. Using multi-objective optimization, an algorithm is introduced in this paper that minimizes the estimated location error and the number of anchor nodes. According to simulation results, This algorithm proposes a set of solutions with less energy consumption and less error than similar algorithms.
summary: Locating each node in a wireless sensor network is essential for starting the monitoring job and sending information about the area. One method that has been used in hard and inaccessible environments is randomly scattering each node in the area. In order to reduce the cost of using GPS at each node, some nodes should be equipped with GPS (anchors), Then using the belief propagation algorithm, locate other nodes. The number of anchor nodes must be reduced since they are expensive. Furthermore, the location of these nodes affects the algorithm's performance. Using multi-objective optimization, an algorithm is introduced in this paper that minimizes the estimated location error and the number of anchor nodes. According to simulation results, This algorithm proposes a set of solutions with less energy consumption and less error than similar algorithms.
abstract_zh: 定位无线传感器网络中的每个节点对于启动监控作业和发送有关该区域的信息至关重要。在困难和难以访问的环境中使用的一种方法是随机分散该区域中的每个节点。为了减少每个节点使用GPS的成本，一些节点应该配备GPS（锚点），然后使用置信传播算法，定位其他节点。锚节点的数量必须减少，因为它们很昂贵。此外，这些节点的位置会影响算法的性能。本文采用多目标优化，提出了一种最小化估计位置误差和锚节点数量的算法。根据仿真结果，该算法提出了一套比同类算法能耗更少、误差更小的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合信念传播算法和进化算法的多目标优化方法，用于在无线传感器网络中减少锚节点数量并提高自定位精度。
AI.motivation: 锚节点成本高昂且数量影响定位性能，传统方法难以在降低锚节点数量的同时保证定位精度。
AI.method: 通过多目标优化框架，联合信念传播算法与进化算法，同时最小化定位误差和锚节点数量。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，该算法在能量消耗和定位误差方面优于现有同类算法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效平衡了锚节点数量与定位精度，为无线传感器网络的低成本部署提供了新方案。

search_text: Anchor Nodes Positioning for Self-localization in Wireless Sensor Networks using Belief Propagation and Evolutionary Algorithms 使用置信传播和进化算法在无线传感器网络中进行自定位的锚节点定位 Locating each node in a wireless sensor network is essential for starting the monitoring job and sending information about the area. One method that has been used in hard and inaccessible environments is randomly scattering each node in the area. In order to reduce the cost of using GPS at each node, some nodes should be equipped with GPS (anchors), Then using the belief propagation algorithm, locate other nodes. The number of anchor nodes must be reduced since they are expensive. Furthermore, the location of these nodes affects the algorithm's performance. Using multi-objective optimization, an algorithm is introduced in this paper that minimizes the estimated location error and the number of anchor nodes. According to simulation results, This algorithm proposes a set of solutions with less energy consumption and less error than similar algorithms. 定位无线传感器网络中的每个节点对于启动监控作业和发送有关该区域的信息至关重要。在困难和难以访问的环境中使用的一种方法是随机分散该区域中的每个节点。为了减少每个节点使用GPS的成本，一些节点应该配备GPS（锚点），然后使用置信传播算法，定位其他节点。锚节点的数量必须减少，因为它们很昂贵。此外，这些节点的位置会影响算法的性能。本文采用多目标优化，提出了一种最小化估计位置误差和锚节点数量的算法。根据仿真结果，该算法提出了一套比同类算法能耗更少、误差更小的解决方案。 本文提出一种结合信念传播算法和进化算法的多目标优化方法，用于在无线传感器网络中减少锚节点数量并提高自定位精度。 Saeed Ghadiri cs.NI,cs.AI,eess.SP

authors_text: Shu Sun,Hangsong Yan
title: Small-Scale Spatial-Temporal Correlation and Degrees of Freedom for Reconfigurable Intelligent Surfaces
title_zh: 可重构智能表面的小尺度时空相关性和自由度
comment: 5 pages, 7 figures, IEEE Wireless Communications Letters, DOI:10.1109/LWC.2021.3112781
comments: 5 pages, 7 figures, IEEE Wireless Communications Letters, DOI:10.1109/LWC.2021.3112781
abstract: The reconfigurable intelligent surface (RIS) is an emerging promising candidate technology for future wireless networks, where the element spacing is usually of sub-wavelength. Only limited knowledge, however, has been gained about the spatial-temporal correlation behavior among the elements in an RIS. In this paper, we investigate the spatial-temporal correlation for an RIS-enabled wireless communication system. Specifically, a joint small-scale spatial-temporal correlation model is derived under isotropic scattering, which can be represented by a four-dimensional sinc function. Furthermore, based upon the spatial-only correlation at a certain time instant, an essential RIS property -- the spatial degrees of freedom (DoF) -- is revisited, and an analytical expression is propounded to characterize the spatial DoF for RISs with realistic hence non-infinitesimal element spacing and finite aperture sizes. The results are vital to the accurate evaluation of various system performance metrics.
summary: The reconfigurable intelligent surface (RIS) is an emerging promising candidate technology for future wireless networks, where the element spacing is usually of sub-wavelength. Only limited knowledge, however, has been gained about the spatial-temporal correlation behavior among the elements in an RIS. In this paper, we investigate the spatial-temporal correlation for an RIS-enabled wireless communication system. Specifically, a joint small-scale spatial-temporal correlation model is derived under isotropic scattering, which can be represented by a four-dimensional sinc function. Furthermore, based upon the spatial-only correlation at a certain time instant, an essential RIS property -- the spatial degrees of freedom (DoF) -- is revisited, and an analytical expression is propounded to characterize the spatial DoF for RISs with realistic hence non-infinitesimal element spacing and finite aperture sizes. The results are vital to the accurate evaluation of various system performance metrics.
abstract_zh: 可重构智能表面（RIS）是一种新兴的、有前途的未来无线网络候选技术，其中元件间距通常为亚波长。然而，关于 RIS 中元素之间的时空相关行为，人们只获得了有限的知识。在本文中，我们研究了支持 RIS 的无线通信系统的时空相关性。具体来说，推导了各向同性散射下的联合小尺度时空相关模型，该模型可以用四维sinc函数表示。此外，基于特定时刻的纯空间相关性，重新审视了 RIS 的基本属性——空间自由度 (DoF)，并提出了一种解析表达式来表征具有现实的非无穷小单元间距和有限孔径尺寸的 RIS 的空间 DoF。结果对于准确评估各种系统性能指标至关重要。

AI.tldr: 研究可重构智能表面（RIS）的小尺度时空相关性及自由度，建立相关模型并分析其空间自由度。
AI.motivation: RIS作为未来无线网络的关键技术，其元素间的时空相关性研究不足，需建立模型以准确评估系统性能。
AI.method: 基于各向同性散射推导四维sinc函数时空相关模型，并分析实际间距与有限孔径下的空间自由度表达式。
AI.result: 得出的模型和自由度分析为精确评估系统性能提供了关键依据。
AI.conclusion: 本研究填补了RIS时空相关性分析的空白，为系统设计与优化提供了理论基础。

authors_text: Michael J. Horry,Subrata Chakraborty,Biswajeet Pradhan,Maryam Fallahpoor,Chegeni Hossein,Manoranjan Paul
title: Systematic investigation into generalization of COVID-19 CT deep learning models with Gabor ensemble for lung involvement scoring
title_zh: 使用 Gabor 集成进行肺部受累评分的 COVID-19 CT 深度学习模型泛化的系统研究
comment: 39 Pages, 8 figures, 14 tables comparing the generalization of COVID-19 CT Deep Learning Models
comments: 39 Pages, 8 figures, 14 tables comparing the generalization of COVID-19 CT Deep Learning Models
abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic has inspired unprecedented data collection and computer vision modelling efforts worldwide, focusing on diagnosis and stratification of COVID-19 from medical images. Despite this large-scale research effort, these models have found limited practical application due in part to unproven generalization of these models beyond their source study. This study investigates the generalizability of key published models using the publicly available COVID-19 Computed Tomography data through cross dataset validation. We then assess the predictive ability of these models for COVID-19 severity using an independent new dataset that is stratified for COVID-19 lung involvement. Each inter-dataset study is performed using histogram equalization, and contrast limited adaptive histogram equalization with and without a learning Gabor filter. The study shows high variability in the generalization of models trained on these datasets due to varied sample image provenances and acquisition processes amongst other factors. We show that under certain conditions, an internally consistent dataset can generalize well to an external dataset despite structural differences between these datasets with f1 scores up to 86%. Our best performing model shows high predictive accuracy for lung involvement score for an independent dataset for which expertly labelled lung involvement stratification is available. Creating an ensemble of our best model for disease positive prediction with our best model for disease negative prediction using a min-max function resulted in a superior model for lung involvement prediction with average predictive accuracy of 75% for zero lung involvement and 96% for 75-100% lung involvement with almost linear relationship between these stratifications.
summary: The COVID-19 pandemic has inspired unprecedented data collection and computer vision modelling efforts worldwide, focusing on diagnosis and stratification of COVID-19 from medical images. Despite this large-scale research effort, these models have found limited practical application due in part to unproven generalization of these models beyond their source study. This study investigates the generalizability of key published models using the publicly available COVID-19 Computed Tomography data through cross dataset validation. We then assess the predictive ability of these models for COVID-19 severity using an independent new dataset that is stratified for COVID-19 lung involvement. Each inter-dataset study is performed using histogram equalization, and contrast limited adaptive histogram equalization with and without a learning Gabor filter. The study shows high variability in the generalization of models trained on these datasets due to varied sample image provenances and acquisition processes amongst other factors. We show that under certain conditions, an internally consistent dataset can generalize well to an external dataset despite structural differences between these datasets with f1 scores up to 86%. Our best performing model shows high predictive accuracy for lung involvement score for an independent dataset for which expertly labelled lung involvement stratification is available. Creating an ensemble of our best model for disease positive prediction with our best model for disease negative prediction using a min-max function resulted in a superior model for lung involvement prediction with average predictive accuracy of 75% for zero lung involvement and 96% for 75-100% lung involvement with almost linear relationship between these stratifications.
abstract_zh: COVID-19 大流行激发了全球前所未有的数据收集和计算机视觉建模工作，重点是根据医学图像对 COVID-19 进行诊断和分层。尽管进行了大规模的研究工作，但这些模型的实际应用有限，部分原因是这些模型在其源研究之外的泛化尚未得到证实。本研究通过跨数据集验证，使用公开的 COVID-19 计算机断层扫描数据调查了关键已发布模型的普遍性。然后，我们使用针对 COVID-19 肺部受累进行分层的独立新数据集来评估这些模型对 COVID-19 严重程度的预测能力。每个数据集间研究均使用直方图均衡和对比度有限自适应直方图均衡（带或不带学习 Gabor 滤波器）来执行。该研究表明，由于样本图像来源和采集过程等因素的不同，在这些数据集上训练的模型的泛化存在很大的可变性。我们表明，在某些条件下，内部一致的数据集可以很好地推广到外部数据集，尽管这些数据集之间存在结构差异，f1 分数高达 86%。我们表现​​最佳的模型显示了独立数据集的肺受累评分的高预测准确性，其中可以使用专业标记的肺受累分层。使用最小-最大函数创建疾病阳性预测的最佳模型与疾病阴性预测的最佳模型的集合，产生了肺部受累预测的优越模型，零肺部受累的平均预测精度为 75%，75-100% 肺部受累的平均预测精度为 96%，这些分层之间几乎呈线性关系。

AI.tldr: 该论文系统研究了使用Gabor集成的深度学习模型在CT图像上对COVID-19肺部受累程度评分的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有大量针对COVID-19的医学影像模型研究，但这些模型在实际应用中因泛化能力不足而受限，需验证其跨数据集的适用性及对疾病严重程度的预测能力。
AI.method: 通过跨数据集验证，结合直方图均衡化、对比度受限自适应直方图均衡化及学习型Gabor滤波器，评估模型泛化能力，并使用min-max函数集成正负预测模型以提升肺部受累评分预测效果。
AI.result: 模型泛化能力存在显著差异，最佳模型在独立数据集上实现F1分数86%，集成后对零肺部受累和75-100%受累的预测准确率分别为75%和96%。
AI.conclusion: 数据来源和采集差异显著影响模型泛化，但结构差异较大的数据集间仍可实现有效泛化，Gabor集成模型在肺部受累评分预测中表现突出。

authors_text: Ravi Bhatt,Anuj Rai,Narayanan C. Krishnan,Sukalpa Chanda
title: Pho(SC)-CTC -- A Hybrid Approach Towards Zero-shot Word Image Recognition
title_zh: Pho(SC)-CTC——零样本图像识别的混合方法
comment: Accepted (International Journal on Document Analysis and Recognition). This paper is the extension of the paper titled "Pho(SC)Net: An Approach Towards Zero-shot Word Image Recognition in Historical Documents" published in ICDAR 2021
comments: Accepted (International Journal on Document Analysis and Recognition). This paper is the extension of the paper titled "Pho(SC)Net: An Approach Towards Zero-shot Word Image Recognition in Historical Documents" published in ICDAR 2021
abstract: Annotating words in a historical document image archive for word image recognition purpose demands time and skilled human resource (like historians, paleographers). In a real-life scenario, obtaining sample images for all possible words is also not feasible. However, Zero-shot learning methods could aptly be used to recognize unseen/out-of-lexicon words in such historical document images. Based on previous state-of-the-art method for zero-shot word recognition Pho(SC)Net, we propose a hybrid model based on the CTC framework (Pho(SC)-CTC) that takes advantage of the rich features learned by Pho(SC)Net followed by a connectionist temporal classification (CTC) framework to perform the final classification. Encouraging results were obtained on two publicly available historical document datasets and one synthetic handwritten dataset, which justifies the efficacy of Pho(SC)-CTC and Pho(SC)Net.
summary: Annotating words in a historical document image archive for word image recognition purpose demands time and skilled human resource (like historians, paleographers). In a real-life scenario, obtaining sample images for all possible words is also not feasible. However, Zero-shot learning methods could aptly be used to recognize unseen/out-of-lexicon words in such historical document images. Based on previous state-of-the-art method for zero-shot word recognition Pho(SC)Net, we propose a hybrid model based on the CTC framework (Pho(SC)-CTC) that takes advantage of the rich features learned by Pho(SC)Net followed by a connectionist temporal classification (CTC) framework to perform the final classification. Encouraging results were obtained on two publicly available historical document datasets and one synthetic handwritten dataset, which justifies the efficacy of Pho(SC)-CTC and Pho(SC)Net.
abstract_zh: 为了文字图像识别目的对历史文档图像档案中的文字进行注释需要时间和熟练的人力资源（如历史学家、古文字学家）。在现实生活中，获取所有可能单词的样本图像也是不可行的。然而，零样本学习方法可以适当地用于识别此类历史文档图像中未见过/词典外的单词。基于之前最先进的零样本单词识别方法 Pho(SC)Net，我们提出了一种基于 CTC 框架的混合模型 (Pho(SC)-CTC)，该模型利用 Pho(SC)Net 学习到的丰富特征，​​然后使用连接主义时间分类 (CTC) 框架来执行最终分类。在两个公开的历史文档数据集和一个合成手写数据集上获得了令人鼓舞的结果，这证明了 Pho(SC)-CTC 和 Pho(SC)Net 的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合方法Pho(SC)-CTC，结合Pho(SC)Net和CTC框架解决历史文档中零样本单词图像识别问题。
AI.motivation: 历史文档标注需要大量人力且难以获取所有单词样本，传统方法受限于数据不足，需探索零样本学习解决方案。
AI.method: 基于Pho(SC)Net提取特征，结合CTC框架进行最终分类，构建端到端混合模型Pho(SC)-CTC。
AI.result: 在两个公开历史文档数据集和一个合成手写数据集上均取得有效识别结果，验证方法可行性。
AI.conclusion: Pho(SC)-CTC通过融合特征学习与序列分类优势，成功提升零样本单词图像识别性能。

authors_text: Jiangning Zhang,Chao Xu,Jian Li,Wenzhou Chen,Yabiao Wang,Ying Tai,Shuo Chen,Chengjie Wang,Feiyue Huang,Yong Liu
title: Analogous to Evolutionary Algorithm: Designing a Unified Sequence Model
title_zh: 类比进化算法：设计统一序列模型
abstract: Inspired by biological evolution, we explain the rationality of Vision Transformer by analogy with the proven practical Evolutionary Algorithm (EA) and derive that both of them have consistent mathematical representation. Analogous to the dynamic local population in EA, we improve the existing transformer structure and propose a more efficient EAT model, and design task-related heads to deal with different tasks more flexibly. Moreover, we introduce the spatial-filling curve into the current vision transformer to sequence image data into a uniform sequential format. Thus we can design a unified EAT framework to address multi-modal tasks, separating the network architecture from the data format adaptation. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art results on the ImageNet classification task compared with recent vision transformer works while having smaller parameters and greater throughput. We further conduct multi-modal tasks to demonstrate the superiority of the unified EAT, e.g., Text-Based Image Retrieval, and our approach improves the rank-1 by +3.7 points over the baseline on the CSS dataset.
summary: Inspired by biological evolution, we explain the rationality of Vision Transformer by analogy with the proven practical Evolutionary Algorithm (EA) and derive that both of them have consistent mathematical representation. Analogous to the dynamic local population in EA, we improve the existing transformer structure and propose a more efficient EAT model, and design task-related heads to deal with different tasks more flexibly. Moreover, we introduce the spatial-filling curve into the current vision transformer to sequence image data into a uniform sequential format. Thus we can design a unified EAT framework to address multi-modal tasks, separating the network architecture from the data format adaptation. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art results on the ImageNet classification task compared with recent vision transformer works while having smaller parameters and greater throughput. We further conduct multi-modal tasks to demonstrate the superiority of the unified EAT, e.g., Text-Based Image Retrieval, and our approach improves the rank-1 by +3.7 points over the baseline on the CSS dataset.
abstract_zh: 受生物进化的启发，我们类比经过验证的实用进化算法（EA）来解释Vision Transformer的合理性，并得出两者具有一致的数学表示。类似于 EA 中的动态本地群体，我们改进了现有的 Transformer 结构并提出了更高效的 EAT 模型，并设计了与任务相关的头以更灵活地处理不同的任务。此外，我们将空间填充曲线引入当前的视觉变换器中，将图像数据排序为统一的顺序格式。因此，我们可以设计一个统一的 EAT 框架来解决多模态任务，将网络架构与数据格式适配分开。与最近的视觉转换器工作相比，我们的方法在 ImageNet 分类任务上取得了最先进的结果，同时具有更小的参数和更大的吞吐量。我们进一步进行多模态任务来证明统一 EAT 的优越性，例如基于文本的图像检索，并且我们的方法将 CSS 数据集上的基线提高了 3.7 个百分点。

AI.tldr: 受进化算法启发，设计统一序列模型EAT以处理多模态任务。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉Transformer在处理多模态任务时存在数据格式适应性问题，而进化算法的动态局部种群机制可提供结构改进思路。
AI.method: 通过类比进化算法与Transformer的数学表达，改进Transformer结构形成EAT模型；引入空间填充曲线统一图像序列化格式，并设计任务相关头增强灵活性。
AI.result: 在ImageNet分类任务中参数更少且吞吐量更大，多模态任务中CSS数据集rank-1提升3.7点。
AI.conclusion: EAT框架通过解耦网络架构与数据格式适应性，在多模态任务中展现优越性能。
