authors_text: Cheng Mao,Alexander S. Wein
title: Optimal Spectral Recovery of a Planted Vector in a Subspace
title_zh: 子空间中植入向量的最优光谱恢复
abstract: Recovering a planted vector $v$ in an $n$-dimensional random subspace of $\mathbb{R}^N$ is a generic task related to many problems in machine learning and statistics, such as dictionary learning, subspace recovery, principal component analysis, and non-Gaussian component analysis. In this work, we study computationally efficient estimation and detection of a planted vector $v$ whose $\ell_4$ norm differs from that of a Gaussian vector with the same $\ell_2$ norm. For instance, in the special case where $v$ is an $N ρ$-sparse vector with Bernoulli-Gaussian or Bernoulli-Rademacher entries, our results include the following: (1) We give an improved analysis of a slight variant of the spectral method proposed by Hopkins, Schramm, Shi, and Steurer (2016), showing that it approximately recovers $v$ with high probability in the regime $n ρ\ll \sqrt{N}$. This condition subsumes the conditions $ρ\ll 1/\sqrt{n}$ or $n \sqrtρ \lesssim \sqrt{N}$ required by previous work up to polylogarithmic factors. We achieve $\ell_\infty$ error bounds for the spectral estimator via a leave-one-out analysis, from which it follows that a simple thresholding procedure exactly recovers $v$ with Bernoulli-Rademacher entries, even in the dense case $ρ= 1$. (2) We study the associated detection problem and show that in the regime $n ρ\gg \sqrt{N}$, any spectral method from a large class (and more generally, any low-degree polynomial of the input) fails to detect the planted vector. This matches the condition for recovery and offers evidence that no polynomial-time algorithm can succeed in recovering a Bernoulli-Gaussian vector $v$ when $n ρ\gg \sqrt{N}$.
summary: Recovering a planted vector $v$ in an $n$-dimensional random subspace of $\mathbb{R}^N$ is a generic task related to many problems in machine learning and statistics, such as dictionary learning, subspace recovery, principal component analysis, and non-Gaussian component analysis. In this work, we study computationally efficient estimation and detection of a planted vector $v$ whose $\ell_4$ norm differs from that of a Gaussian vector with the same $\ell_2$ norm. For instance, in the special case where $v$ is an $N ρ$-sparse vector with Bernoulli-Gaussian or Bernoulli-Rademacher entries, our results include the following: (1) We give an improved analysis of a slight variant of the spectral method proposed by Hopkins, Schramm, Shi, and Steurer (2016), showing that it approximately recovers $v$ with high probability in the regime $n ρ\ll \sqrt{N}$. This condition subsumes the conditions $ρ\ll 1/\sqrt{n}$ or $n \sqrtρ \lesssim \sqrt{N}$ required by previous work up to polylogarithmic factors. We achieve $\ell_\infty$ error bounds for the spectral estimator via a leave-one-out analysis, from which it follows that a simple thresholding procedure exactly recovers $v$ with Bernoulli-Rademacher entries, even in the dense case $ρ= 1$. (2) We study the associated detection problem and show that in the regime $n ρ\gg \sqrt{N}$, any spectral method from a large class (and more generally, any low-degree polynomial of the input) fails to detect the planted vector. This matches the condition for recovery and offers evidence that no polynomial-time algorithm can succeed in recovering a Bernoulli-Gaussian vector $v$ when $n ρ\gg \sqrt{N}$.
abstract_zh: 在 $\mathbb{R}^N$ 的 $n$ 维随机子空间中恢复植入向量 $v$ 是一项与机器学习和统计中的许多问题相关的通用任务，例如字典学习、子空间恢复、主成分分析和非高斯成分分析。在这项工作中，我们研究了对种植向量 $v$ 的计算有效估计和检测，其 $\ell_4$ 范数与具有相同 $\ell_2$ 范数的高斯向量不同。例如，在 $v$ 是具有 Bernoulli-Gaussian 或 Bernoulli-Rademacher 条目的 $N ρ$ 稀疏向量的特殊情况下，我们的结果包括以下内容：（1）我们对 Hopkins、Schramm、Shi 和 Steurer（2016）提出的谱方法的一个微小变体进行了改进分析，表明它在 $n ρ\ll \sqrt{N}$ 范围内以高概率近似恢复 $v$。此条件包含先前工作所需的条件 $ρ\ll 1/\sqrt{n}$ 或 $n \sqrtρ \lesssim \sqrt{N}$ 直至多对数因子。我们通过留一法分析实现了谱估计器的 $\ell_\infty$ 误差界限，由此得出，即使在密集情况 $ρ= 1$ 下，简单的阈值处理程序也可以使用 Bernoulli-Rademacher 条目精确恢复 $v$。 (2) 我们研究了相关的检测问题，并表明在 $n ρ\gg \sqrt{N}$ 体系中，来自大类的任何谱方法（更一般地说，输入的任何低次多项式）都无法检测到植入的向量。这与恢复条件相匹配，并提供证据表明，当 $n ρ\gg \sqrt{N}$ 时，任何多项式时间算法都无法成功恢复伯努利高斯向量 $v$。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在随机子空间中高效恢复植入向量的光谱方法，分析其检测与恢复的最优条件。
AI.motivation: 植入向量恢复问题在字典学习、主成分分析等机器学习任务中具有基础性意义，但现有方法在稀疏性和计算效率上存在局限。
AI.method: 改进Hopkins等人提出的光谱方法，通过留一分析获得ℓ∞误差界，并研究低度多项式方法的检测极限。
AI.result: 在nρ≪√N条件下实现高概率恢复，支持密度ρ=1的精确恢复；证明当nρ≫√N时所有谱方法及低度多项式均无法检测植入向量。
AI.conclusion: 提出的光谱方法在理论界内达到最优恢复条件，且揭示了多项式时间算法在高密度场景下的不可行性边界。

method: 改进Hopkins等人提出的光谱方法，通过留一分析获得ℓ∞误差界，并研究低度多项式方法的检测极限。
result: 在nρ≪√N条件下实现高概率恢复，支持密度ρ=1的精确恢复；证明当nρ≫√N时所有谱方法及低度多项式均无法检测植入向量。
conclusion: 提出的光谱方法在理论界内达到最优恢复条件，且揭示了多项式时间算法在高密度场景下的不可行性边界。
search_text: Optimal Spectral Recovery of a Planted Vector in a Subspace 子空间中植入向量的最优光谱恢复 Recovering a planted vector $v$ in an $n$-dimensional random subspace of $\mathbb{R}^N$ is a generic task related to many problems in machine learning and statistics, such as dictionary learning, subspace recovery, principal component analysis, and non-Gaussian component analysis. In this work, we study computationally efficient estimation and detection of a planted vector $v$ whose $\ell_4$ norm differs from that of a Gaussian vector with the same $\ell_2$ norm. For instance, in the special case where $v$ is an $N ρ$-sparse vector with Bernoulli-Gaussian or Bernoulli-Rademacher entries, our results include the following: (1) We give an improved analysis of a slight variant of the spectral method proposed by Hopkins, Schramm, Shi, and Steurer (2016), showing that it approximately recovers $v$ with high probability in the regime $n ρ\ll \sqrt{N}$. This condition subsumes the conditions $ρ\ll 1/\sqrt{n}$ or $n \sqrtρ \lesssim \sqrt{N}$ required by previous work up to polylogarithmic factors. We achieve $\ell_\infty$ error bounds for the spectral estimator via a leave-one-out analysis, from which it follows that a simple thresholding procedure exactly recovers $v$ with Bernoulli-Rademacher entries, even in the dense case $ρ= 1$. (2) We study the associated detection problem and show that in the regime $n ρ\gg \sqrt{N}$, any spectral method from a large class (and more generally, any low-degree polynomial of the input) fails to detect the planted vector. This matches the condition for recovery and offers evidence that no polynomial-time algorithm can succeed in recovering a Bernoulli-Gaussian vector $v$ when $n ρ\gg \sqrt{N}$. 在 $\mathbb{R}^N$ 的 $n$ 维随机子空间中恢复植入向量 $v$ 是一项与机器学习和统计中的许多问题相关的通用任务，例如字典学习、子空间恢复、主成分分析和非高斯成分分析。在这项工作中，我们研究了对种植向量 $v$ 的计算有效估计和检测，其 $\ell_4$ 范数与具有相同 $\ell_2$ 范数的高斯向量不同。例如，在 $v$ 是具有 Bernoulli-Gaussian 或 Bernoulli-Rademacher 条目的 $N ρ$ 稀疏向量的特殊情况下，我们的结果包括以下内容：（1）我们对 Hopkins、Schramm、Shi 和 Steurer（2016）提出的谱方法的一个微小变体进行了改进分析，表明它在 $n ρ\ll \sqrt{N}$ 范围内以高概率近似恢复 $v$。此条件包含先前工作所需的条件 $ρ\ll 1/\sqrt{n}$ 或 $n \sqrtρ \lesssim \sqrt{N}$ 直至多对数因子。我们通过留一法分析实现了谱估计器的 $\ell_\infty$ 误差界限，由此得出，即使在密集情况 $ρ= 1$ 下，简单的阈值处理程序也可以使用 Bernoulli-Rademacher 条目精确恢复 $v$。 (2) 我们研究了相关的检测问题，并表明在 $n ρ\gg \sqrt{N}$ 体系中，来自大类的任何谱方法（更一般地说，输入的任何低次多项式）都无法检测到植入的向量。这与恢复条件相匹配，并提供证据表明，当 $n ρ\gg \sqrt{N}$ 时，任何多项式时间算法都无法成功恢复伯努利高斯向量 $v$。 本文研究在随机子空间中高效恢复植入向量的光谱方法，分析其检测与恢复的最优条件。 Cheng Mao,Alexander S. Wein math.ST,cs.DS,stat.ML

authors_text: Meng-Hao Guo,Zheng-Ning Liu,Tai-Jiang Mu,Dun Liang,Ralph R. Martin,Shi-Min Hu
title: Can Attention Enable MLPs To Catch Up With CNNs?
title_zh: 注意力能让 MLP 赶上 CNN 吗？
comment: Computational Visual Media, 2021, accepted. 4 pages, 1 figure
comments: Computational Visual Media, 2021, accepted. 4 pages, 1 figure
abstract: In the first week of May, 2021, researchers from four different institutions: Google, Tsinghua University, Oxford University and Facebook, shared their latest work [16, 7, 12, 17] on arXiv.org almost at the same time, each proposing new learning architectures, consisting mainly of linear layers, claiming them to be comparable, or even superior to convolutional-based models. This sparked immediate discussion and debate in both academic and industrial communities as to whether MLPs are sufficient, many thinking that learning architectures are returning to MLPs. Is this true? In this perspective, we give a brief history of learning architectures, including multilayer perceptrons (MLPs), convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and transformers. We then examine what the four newly proposed architectures have in common. Finally, we give our views on challenges and directions for new learning architectures, hoping to inspire future research.
summary: In the first week of May, 2021, researchers from four different institutions: Google, Tsinghua University, Oxford University and Facebook, shared their latest work [16, 7, 12, 17] on arXiv.org almost at the same time, each proposing new learning architectures, consisting mainly of linear layers, claiming them to be comparable, or even superior to convolutional-based models. This sparked immediate discussion and debate in both academic and industrial communities as to whether MLPs are sufficient, many thinking that learning architectures are returning to MLPs. Is this true? In this perspective, we give a brief history of learning architectures, including multilayer perceptrons (MLPs), convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and transformers. We then examine what the four newly proposed architectures have in common. Finally, we give our views on challenges and directions for new learning architectures, hoping to inspire future research.
abstract_zh: 2021 年 5 月的第一周，来自谷歌、清华大学、牛津大学和 Facebook 四个不同机构的研究人员几乎同时在 arXiv.org 上分享了他们的最新工作[16,7,12,17]，各自提出了新的学习架构，主要由线性层组成，声称它们与基于卷积的模型相当，甚至优于基于卷积的模型。这立即引发了学术界和工业界关于 MLP 是否足够的讨论和辩论，许多人认为学习架构正在回归 MLP。这是真的吗？从这个角度来看，我们简要介绍了学习架构的历史，包括多层感知器（MLP）、卷积神经网络（CNN）和变压器。然后我们研究四种新提出的架构的共同点。最后，我们对新学习架构的挑战和方向提出了看法，希望能够启发未来的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了注意力机制是否能让多层感知机（MLP）在性能上赶上卷积神经网络（CNN），并分析了近期提出的四种基于线性层的新架构的共性及未来方向。
AI.motivation: 2021年多篇论文同时提出基于线性层的新架构，声称其性能可与CNN媲美，引发学界对MLP是否能取代CNN的讨论，需厘清技术本质与发展趋势。
AI.method: 通过回顾MLP、CNN和Transformer的发展历史，分析四篇论文中新型架构的共同设计特征，并结合现有研究提出对新架构挑战与发展方向的见解。
AI.result: 发现新型架构普遍结合注意力机制与线性层，MLP在特定任务中展现潜力，但CNN在局部特征提取上的优势仍难以替代，需进一步解决计算效率与理论瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: 注意力机制为MLP提供了新可能，但CNN与MLP的适用场景仍有差异，未来研究需关注架构的混合设计、计算优化及理论层面的深入探索。

authors_text: Fuxiang Tan,YuTing Kong,Yingying Fan,Feng Liu,Daxin Zhou,Hao zhang,Long Chen,Liang Gao,Yurong Qian
title: SDNet: mutil-branch for single image deraining using swin
title_zh: SDNet：使用 swin 用于单图像去雨的多分支
abstract: Rain streaks degrade the image quality and seriously affect the performance of subsequent computer vision tasks, such as autonomous driving, social security, etc. Therefore, removing rain streaks from a given rainy images is of great significance. Convolutional neural networks(CNN) have been widely used in image deraining tasks, however, the local computational characteristics of convolutional operations limit the development of image deraining tasks. Recently, the popular transformer has global computational features that can further facilitate the development of image deraining tasks. In this paper, we introduce Swin-transformer into the field of image deraining for the first time to study the performance and potential of Swin-transformer in the field of image deraining. Specifically, we improve the basic module of Swin-transformer and design a three-branch model to implement single-image rain removal. The former implements the basic rain pattern feature extraction, while the latter fuses different features to further extract and process the image features. In addition, we employ a jump connection to fuse deep features and shallow features. In terms of experiments, the existing public dataset suffers from image duplication and relatively homogeneous background. So we propose a new dataset Rain3000 to validate our model. Therefore, we propose a new dataset Rain3000 for validating our model. Experimental results on the publicly available datasets Rain100L, Rain100H and our dataset Rain3000 show that our proposed method has performance and inference speed advantages over the current mainstream single-image rain streaks removal models.The source code will be available at https://github.com/H-tfx/SDNet.
summary: Rain streaks degrade the image quality and seriously affect the performance of subsequent computer vision tasks, such as autonomous driving, social security, etc. Therefore, removing rain streaks from a given rainy images is of great significance. Convolutional neural networks(CNN) have been widely used in image deraining tasks, however, the local computational characteristics of convolutional operations limit the development of image deraining tasks. Recently, the popular transformer has global computational features that can further facilitate the development of image deraining tasks. In this paper, we introduce Swin-transformer into the field of image deraining for the first time to study the performance and potential of Swin-transformer in the field of image deraining. Specifically, we improve the basic module of Swin-transformer and design a three-branch model to implement single-image rain removal. The former implements the basic rain pattern feature extraction, while the latter fuses different features to further extract and process the image features. In addition, we employ a jump connection to fuse deep features and shallow features. In terms of experiments, the existing public dataset suffers from image duplication and relatively homogeneous background. So we propose a new dataset Rain3000 to validate our model. Therefore, we propose a new dataset Rain3000 for validating our model. Experimental results on the publicly available datasets Rain100L, Rain100H and our dataset Rain3000 show that our proposed method has performance and inference speed advantages over the current mainstream single-image rain streaks removal models.The source code will be available at https://github.com/H-tfx/SDNet.
abstract_zh: 雨纹会降低图像质量，严重影响后续计算机视觉任务的性能，例如自动驾驶、社会保障等。因此，从给定的下雨图像中去除雨纹具有重要意义。卷积神经网络（CNN）已广泛应用于图像去雨任务，然而，卷积运算的局部计算特性限制了图像去雨任务的发展。最近，流行的 Transformer 具有全局计算功能，可以进一步促进图像去雨任务的开发。本文首次将Swin-transformer引入图像去雨领域，研究Swin-transformer在图像去雨领域的性能和潜力。具体来说，我们改进了Swin-transformer的基本模块，设计了三分支模型来实现单图像除雨。前者实现了基本的雨纹特征提取，后者则融合不同的特征来进一步提取和处理图像特征。此外，我们采用跳跃连接来融合深层特征和浅层特征。在实验方面，现有的公共数据集存在图像重复和背景相对均匀的问题。因此，我们提出了一个新的数据集 Rain3000 来验证我们的模型。因此，我们提出了一个新的数据集 Rain3000 来验证我们的模型。在公开数据集Rain100L、Rain100H和我们的数据集Rain3000上的实验结果表明，我们提出的方法比当前主流的单图像雨条纹去除模型具有性能和推理速度优势。源代码将在https://github.com/H-tfx/SDNet提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SDNet，一种基于Swin Transformer的多分支单图像去雨方法，并构建了新的Rain3000数据集。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN因局部计算特性限制去雨效果，而Transformer的全局计算能力可提升性能，但尚未在去雨领域充分探索。
AI.method: 改进Swin Transformer基础模块，设计三分支网络：雨纹特征提取分支、多特征融合分支及跳跃连接模块，结合新构建的Rain3000数据集进行验证。
AI.result: 在Rain100L/Rain100H/Rain3000数据集上，SDNet在去雨精度和推理速度均优于现有主流方法。
AI.conclusion: Swin Transformer有效提升单图像去雨性能，新数据集Rain3000可推动相关研究发展。

Experimental results on the publicly available datasets Rain100L, Rain100H and our dataset Rain3000 show that our proposed method has performance and inference speed advantages over the current mainstream single-image rain streaks removal models.The source code will be available at https://github.com/H-tfx/SDNet. 雨纹会降低图像质量，严重影响后续计算机视觉任务的性能，例如自动驾驶、社会保障等。因此，从给定的下雨图像中去除雨纹具有重要意义。卷积神经网络（CNN）已广泛应用于图像去雨任务，然而，卷积运算的局部计算特性限制了图像去雨任务的发展。最近，流行的 Transformer 具有全局计算功能，可以进一步促进图像去雨任务的开发。本文首次将Swin-transformer引入图像去雨领域，研究Swin-transformer在图像去雨领域的性能和潜力。具体来说，我们改进了Swin-transformer的基本模块，设计了三分支模型来实现单图像除雨。前者实现了基本的雨纹特征提取，后者则融合不同的特征来进一步提取和处理图像特征。此外，我们采用跳跃连接来融合深层特征和浅层特征。在实验方面，现有的公共数据集存在图像重复和背景相对均匀的问题。因此，我们提出了一个新的数据集 Rain3000 来验证我们的模型。因此，我们提出了一个新的数据集 Rain3000 来验证我们的模型。在公开数据集Rain100L、Rain100H和我们的数据集Rain3000上的实验结果表明，我们提出的方法比当前主流的单图像雨条纹去除模型具有性能和推理速度优势。源代码将在https://github.com/H-tfx/SDNet提供。 本文提出SDNet，一种基于Swin Transformer的多分支单图像去雨方法，并构建了新的Rain3000数据集。 Fuxiang Tan,YuTing Kong,Yingying Fan,Feng Liu,Daxin Zhou,Hao zhang,Long Chen,Liang Gao,Yurong Qian cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Xiujun Shu,Xiao Wang,Xianghao Zang,Shiliang Zhang,Yuanqi Chen,Ge Li,Qi Tian
title: Large-Scale Spatio-Temporal Person Re-identification: Algorithms and Benchmark
title_zh: 大规模时空人物重识别：算法和基准
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology (TCSVT)
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology (TCSVT)
abstract: Person re-identification (re-ID) in the scenario with large spatial and temporal spans has not been fully explored. This is partially because that, existing benchmark datasets were mainly collected with limited spatial and temporal ranges, e.g., using videos recorded in a few days by cameras in a specific region of the campus. Such limited spatial and temporal ranges make it hard to simulate the difficulties of person re-ID in real scenarios. In this work, we contribute a novel Large-scale Spatio-Temporal LaST person re-ID dataset, including 10,862 identities with more than 228k images. Compared with existing datasets, LaST presents more challenging and high-diversity re-ID settings, and significantly larger spatial and temporal ranges. For instance, each person can appear in different cities or countries, and in various time slots from daytime to night, and in different seasons from spring to winter. To our best knowledge, LaST is a novel person re-ID dataset with the largest spatio-temporal ranges. Based on LaST, we verified its challenge by conducting a comprehensive performance evaluation of 14 re-ID algorithms. We further propose an easy-to-implement baseline that works well on such challenging re-ID setting. We also verified that models pre-trained on LaST can generalize well on existing datasets with short-term and cloth-changing scenarios. We expect LaST to inspire future works toward more realistic and challenging re-ID tasks. More information about the dataset is available at https://github.com/shuxjweb/last.git.

abstract_zh: 大时空跨度场景下的行人重识别（re-ID）尚未得到充分探索。部分原因是，现有的基准数据集主要是在有限的空间和时间范围内收集的，例如使用校园特定区域的摄像机在几天内记录的视频。如此有限的空间和时间范围使得很难模拟真实场景中行人重识别的困难。在这项工作中，我们贡献了一个新颖的大规模时空 LaST 行人重识别数据集，包括 10,862 个身份和超过 228k 图像。与现有数据集相比，LaST 呈现出更具挑战性和高多样性的 re-ID 设置，以及显着更大的空间和时间范围。例如，每个人可以出现在不同的城市或国家，出现在从白天到晚上的不同时间段，出现在从春天到冬天的不同季节。据我们所知，LaST 是一个新颖的行人重识别数据集，具有最大的时空范围。基于LaST，我们通过对14种re-ID算法进行综合性能评估来验证其挑战。我们进一步提出了一个易于实施的基线，该基线在这种具有挑战性的 re-ID 设置中表现良好。我们还验证了在 LaST 上预训练的模型可以在具有短期和换衣场景的现有数据集上很好地泛化。我们期望 LaST 能够激发未来的工作，以实现更现实和更具挑战性的重新识别任务。有关该数据集的更多信息，请访问 https://github.com/shuxjweb/last.git。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为LaST的大规模时空人物重识别数据集，并验证了其在真实场景下的挑战性。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集空间和时间范围有限，难以模拟真实场景中人物重识别的复杂性。
AI.method: 构建包含10,862个身份和228k图像的LaST数据集，覆盖多城市、多季节、昼夜变化等场景，并测试14种重识别算法。
AI.result: LaST数据集显著提升重识别难度，提出的基线模型在挑战性场景下表现良好，且预训练模型可泛化到现有数据集。
AI.conclusion: LaST数据集为未来更真实、更具挑战性的重识别研究提供了新方向。

authors_text: Yulin Wang,Rui Huang,Shiji Song,Zeyi Huang,Gao Huang
title: Not All Images are Worth 16x16 Words: Dynamic Transformers for Efficient Image Recognition
title_zh: 并非所有图像都值得 16x16 个字：用于高效图像识别的动态转换器
abstract: Vision Transformers (ViT) have achieved remarkable success in large-scale image recognition. They split every 2D image into a fixed number of patches, each of which is treated as a token. Generally, representing an image with more tokens would lead to higher prediction accuracy, while it also results in drastically increased computational cost. To achieve a decent trade-off between accuracy and speed, the number of tokens is empirically set to 16x16 or 14x14. In this paper, we argue that every image has its own characteristics, and ideally the token number should be conditioned on each individual input. In fact, we have observed that there exist a considerable number of "easy" images which can be accurately predicted with a mere number of 4x4 tokens, while only a small fraction of "hard" ones need a finer representation. Inspired by this phenomenon, we propose a Dynamic Transformer to automatically configure a proper number of tokens for each input image. This is achieved by cascading multiple Transformers with increasing numbers of tokens, which are sequentially activated in an adaptive fashion at test time, i.e., the inference is terminated once a sufficiently confident prediction is produced. We further design efficient feature reuse and relationship reuse mechanisms across different components of the Dynamic Transformer to reduce redundant computations. Extensive empirical results on ImageNet, CIFAR-10, and CIFAR-100 demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms the competitive baselines in terms of both theoretical computational efficiency and practical inference speed. Code and pre-trained models (based on PyTorch and MindSpore) are available at https://github.com/blackfeather-wang/Dynamic-Vision-Transformer and https://github.com/blackfeather-wang/Dynamic-Vision-Transformer-MindSpore.
summary: Vision Transformers (ViT) have achieved remarkable success in large-scale image recognition. They split every 2D image into a fixed number of patches, each of which is treated as a token. Generally, representing an image with more tokens would lead to higher prediction accuracy, while it also results in drastically increased computational cost. To achieve a decent trade-off between accuracy and speed, the number of tokens is empirically set to 16x16 or 14x14. In this paper, we argue that every image has its own characteristics, and ideally the token number should be conditioned on each individual input. In fact, we have observed that there exist a considerable number of "easy" images which can be accurately predicted with a mere number of 4x4 tokens, while only a small fraction of "hard" ones need a finer representation. Inspired by this phenomenon, we propose a Dynamic Transformer to automatically configure a proper number of tokens for each input image. This is achieved by cascading multiple Transformers with increasing numbers of tokens, which are sequentially activated in an adaptive fashion at test time, i.e., the inference is terminated once a sufficiently confident prediction is produced. We further design efficient feature reuse and relationship reuse mechanisms across different components of the Dynamic Transformer to reduce redundant computations. Extensive empirical results on ImageNet, CIFAR-10, and CIFAR-100 demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms the competitive baselines in terms of both theoretical computational efficiency and practical inference speed. Code and pre-trained models (based on PyTorch and MindSpore) are available at https://github.com/blackfeather-wang/Dynamic-Vision-Transformer and https://github.com/blackfeather-wang/Dynamic-Vision-Transformer-MindSpore.
abstract_zh: Vision Transformers（ViT）在大规模图像识别方面取得了显着的成功。他们将每个 2D 图像分割成固定数量的块，每个块都被视为一个令牌。一般来说，用更多的标记来表示图像会导致更高的预测精度，同时也会导致计算成本大幅增加。为了在准确性和速度之间实现适当的权衡，令牌的数量根据经验设置为 16x16 或 14x14。在本文中，我们认为每个图像都有其自己的特征，理想情况下，令牌数量应以每个单独的输入为条件。事实上，我们观察到存在相当数量的“简单”图像，只需使用少量 4x4 标记即可准确预测，而只有一小部分“困难”图像需要更精细的表示。受这种现象的启发，我们提出了一个动态转换器来自动为每个输入图像配置适当数量的标记。这是通过级联多个带有越来越多令牌的 Transformer 来实现的，这些令牌在测试时以自适应方式顺序激活，即一旦产生足够置信的预测，推理就会终止。我们进一步设计了跨 Dynamic Transformer 不同组件的高效特征重用和关系重用机制，以减少冗余计算。 ImageNet、CIFAR-10 和 CIFAR-100 上的大量实证结果表明，我们的方法在理论计算效率和实际推理速度方面都显着优于竞争基线。代码和预训练模型（基于 PyTorch 和 MindSpore）可在 https://github.com/blackfeather-wang/Dynamic-Vision-Transformer 和 https://github.com/blackfeather-wang/Dynamic-Vision-Transformer-MindSpore 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种动态Transformer模型，通过根据输入图像自适应调整token数量，实现高效的图像识别。
AI.motivation: 传统Vision Transformer使用固定数量的token（如16x16）导致计算成本与精度难以平衡，而实际中部分简单图像仅需少量token即可准确识别。
AI.method: 设计级联的多阶段Transformer结构，按需激活不同token数量的模块，并引入特征复用和关系复用机制减少冗余计算。
AI.result: 在ImageNet、CIFAR-10/100数据集上，相比基线模型在理论计算效率和实际推理速度上均有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 动态token配置策略能有效平衡图像识别的精度与效率，为视觉Transformer的轻量化应用提供新思路。

Extensive empirical results on ImageNet, CIFAR-10, and CIFAR-100 demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms the competitive baselines in terms of both theoretical computational efficiency and practical inference speed. Code and pre-trained models (based on PyTorch and MindSpore) are available at https://github.com/blackfeather-wang/Dynamic-Vision-Transformer and https://github.com/blackfeather-wang/Dynamic-Vision-Transformer-MindSpore. Vision Transformers（ViT）在大规模图像识别方面取得了显着的成功。他们将每个 2D 图像分割成固定数量的块，每个块都被视为一个令牌。一般来说，用更多的标记来表示图像会导致更高的预测精度，同时也会导致计算成本大幅增加。为了在准确性和速度之间实现适当的权衡，令牌的数量根据经验设置为 16x16 或 14x14。在本文中，我们认为每个图像都有其自己的特征，理想情况下，令牌数量应以每个单独的输入为条件。事实上，我们观察到存在相当数量的“简单”图像，只需使用少量 4x4 标记即可准确预测，而只有一小部分“困难”图像需要更精细的表示。受这种现象的启发，我们提出了一个动态转换器来自动为每个输入图像配置适当数量的标记。这是通过级联多个带有越来越多令牌的 Transformer 来实现的，这些令牌在测试时以自适应方式顺序激活，即一旦产生足够置信的预测，推理就会终止。我们进一步设计了跨 Dynamic Transformer 不同组件的高效特征重用和关系重用机制，以减少冗余计算。 ImageNet、CIFAR-10 和 CIFAR-100 上的大量实证结果表明，我们的方法在理论计算效率和实际推理速度方面都显着优于竞争基线。代码和预训练模型（基于 PyTorch 和 MindSpore）可在 https://github.com/blackfeather-wang/Dynamic-Vision-Transformer 和 https://github.com/blackfeather-wang/Dynamic-Vision-Transformer-MindSpore 获取。 本文提出了一种动态Transformer模型，通过根据输入图像自适应调整token数量，实现高效的图像识别。 Yulin Wang,Rui Huang,Shiji Song,Zeyi Huang,Gao Huang cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Vannessa de J. Duarte,Paul Leger,Sergio Contreras,Hiroaki Fukuda
title: Detecting Fetal Alcohol Spectrum Disorder in children using Artificial Neural Network
title_zh: 使用人工神经网络检测儿童胎儿酒精谱系障碍
abstract: Fetal alcohol spectrum disorder (FASD) is a syndrome whose only difference compared to other children's conditions is the mother's alcohol consumption during pregnancy. An earlier diagnosis of FASD improving the quality of life of children and adolescents. For this reason, this study focus on evaluating the use of the artificial neural network (ANN) to classify children with FASD and explore how accurate it is. ANN has been used to diagnose cancer, diabetes, and other diseases in the medical area, being a tool that presents good results. The data used is from a battery of tests from children for 5-18 years old (include tests of psychometric, saccade eye movement, and diffusion tensor imaging (DTI)). We study the different configurations of ANN with dense layers. The first one predicts 75\% of the outcome correctly for psychometric data. The others models include a feature layer, and we used it to predict FASD using every test individually. The models accurately predict over 70\% of the cases, and psychometric and memory guides predict over 88\% accuracy. The results suggest that the ANN approach is a competitive and efficient methodology to detect FASD. However, we could be careful in used as a diagnostic technique.
summary: Fetal alcohol spectrum disorder (FASD) is a syndrome whose only difference compared to other children's conditions is the mother's alcohol consumption during pregnancy. An earlier diagnosis of FASD improving the quality of life of children and adolescents. For this reason, this study focus on evaluating the use of the artificial neural network (ANN) to classify children with FASD and explore how accurate it is. ANN has been used to diagnose cancer, diabetes, and other diseases in the medical area, being a tool that presents good results. The data used is from a battery of tests from children for 5-18 years old (include tests of psychometric, saccade eye movement, and diffusion tensor imaging (DTI)). We study the different configurations of ANN with dense layers. The first one predicts 75\% of the outcome correctly for psychometric data. The others models include a feature layer, and we used it to predict FASD using every test individually. The models accurately predict over 70\% of the cases, and psychometric and memory guides predict over 88\% accuracy. The results suggest that the ANN approach is a competitive and efficient methodology to detect FASD. However, we could be careful in used as a diagnostic technique.
abstract_zh: 胎儿酒精谱系障碍（FASD）是一种综合征，与其他儿童的病症相比，唯一的区别是母亲在怀孕期间的饮酒情况。胎儿酒精谱系障碍 (FASD) 的早期诊断可改善儿童和青少年的生活质量。因此，本研究重点评估使用人工神经网络 (ANN) 对 FASD 儿童进行分类，并探讨其准确性。人工神经网络在医学领域已被用于癌症、糖尿病等疾病的诊断，取得了良好的效果。使用的数据来自 5-18 岁儿童的一系列测试（包括心理测量、扫视眼动和扩散张量成像 (DTI) 测试）。我们研究了具有密集层的 ANN 的不同配置。第一个可以正确预测心理测量数据 75% 的结果。其他模型包括一个特征层，我们用它来单独使用每个测试来预测 FASD。该模型准确预测了超过 70% 的案例，心理测量和记忆指南预测的准确率超过 88%。结果表明，ANN 方法是检测 FASD 的一种有竞争力且有效的方法。然而，我们在将其用作诊断技术时要小心。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在评估人工神经网络（ANN）在检测儿童胎儿酒精谱系障碍（FASD）中的应用效果。
AI.motivation: FASD的早期诊断可以改善儿童和青少年的生活质量，而ANN在其他疾病的诊断中表现出良好的效果，因此本文希望通过ANN提高FASD的检测准确性。
AI.method: 研究使用了5至18岁儿童的心理测量、眼动追踪和扩散张量成像（DTI）测试数据，并对不同结构的ANN模型进行评估。
AI.result: ANN模型在心理测量数据上正确预测了75%的结果，其他模型在单独使用每项测试数据时准确率超过70%，心理测量和记忆测试的准确率超过88%。
AI.conclusion: ANN方法在检测FASD方面具有竞争力和高效性，但作为诊断工具仍需谨慎使用。

authors_text: Amar Prakash Azad,Supriyo Ghosh,Ajay Gupta,Harshit Kumar,Prateeti Mohapatra
title: Picking Pearl From Seabed: Extracting Artefacts from Noisy Issue Triaging Collaborative Conversations for Hybrid Cloud Services
title_zh: 从海底采珍珠：从嘈杂的问题中提取文物，对混合云服务的协作对话进行分类
abstract: Site Reliability Engineers (SREs) play a key role in issue identification and resolution. After an issue is reported, SREs come together in a virtual room (collaboration platform) to triage the issue. While doing so, they leave behind a wealth of information which can be used later for triaging similar issues. However, usability of the conversations offer challenges due to them being i) noisy and ii) unlabelled. This paper presents a novel approach for issue artefact extraction from the noisy conversations with minimal labelled data. We propose a combination of unsupervised and supervised model with minimum human intervention that leverages domain knowledge to predict artefacts for a small amount of conversation data and use that for fine-tuning an already pretrained language model for artefact prediction on a large amount of conversation data. Experimental results on our dataset show that the proposed ensemble of unsupervised and supervised model is better than using either one of them individually.
summary: Site Reliability Engineers (SREs) play a key role in issue identification and resolution. After an issue is reported, SREs come together in a virtual room (collaboration platform) to triage the issue. While doing so, they leave behind a wealth of information which can be used later for triaging similar issues. However, usability of the conversations offer challenges due to them being i) noisy and ii) unlabelled. This paper presents a novel approach for issue artefact extraction from the noisy conversations with minimal labelled data. We propose a combination of unsupervised and supervised model with minimum human intervention that leverages domain knowledge to predict artefacts for a small amount of conversation data and use that for fine-tuning an already pretrained language model for artefact prediction on a large amount of conversation data. Experimental results on our dataset show that the proposed ensemble of unsupervised and supervised model is better than using either one of them individually.
abstract_zh: 站点可靠性工程师 (SRE) 在问题识别和解决方面发挥着关键作用。报告问题后，SRE 聚集在虚拟房间（协作平台）中对问题进行分类。在这样做的同时，他们留下了大量的信息，这些信息可以在以后用于分类类似的问题。然而，对话的可用性带来了挑战，因为它们 i) 嘈杂和 ii) 未标记。本文提出了一种利用最少标记数据从嘈杂对话中提取问题伪影的新方法。我们提出了一种将无监督和监督模型与最少人为干预相结合的方法，利用领域知识来预测少量对话数据的伪影，并使用它来微调已经预训练的语言模型，以对大量对话数据进行伪影预测。我们数据集上的实验结果表明，所提出的无监督和监督模型的集成优于单独使用其中任何一个。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从混合云服务的嘈杂、未标记的协作对话中提取问题工件的新方法，结合无监督和监督模型以最小的人工干预实现高效预测。
AI.motivation: 站点可靠性工程师（SRE）在问题分类过程中产生的协作对话包含大量潜在价值信息，但其噪声大且未标记，限制了后续利用。现有方法依赖大量标注数据，难以满足实际需求。
AI.method: 设计无监督-监督混合模型：利用领域知识从少量对话数据中预测工件，以此微调预训练语言模型，最终在大规模未标记数据上实现工件提取。
AI.result: 实验表明，该混合模型在准确率和鲁棒性上均优于单独使用无监督或监督模型，有效处理噪声和未标记数据挑战。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合领域知识与预训练模型，本文提出的混合方法在低标注成本下实现了对嘈杂协作对话的高效工件提取，为混合云服务问题分类提供了新思路。

authors_text: Zhixing Ye,Shaofei Qin,Sizhe Chen,Xiaolin Huang
title: Dominant Patterns: Critical Features Hidden in Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: 主要模式：隐藏在深度神经网络中的关键特征
abstract: In this paper, we find the existence of critical features hidden in Deep NeuralNetworks (DNNs), which are imperceptible but can actually dominate the outputof DNNs. We call these features dominant patterns. As the name suggests, for a natural image, if we add the dominant pattern of a DNN to it, the output of this DNN is determined by the dominant pattern instead of the original image, i.e., DNN's prediction is the same with the dominant pattern's. We design an algorithm to find such patterns by pursuing the insensitivity in the feature space. A direct application of the dominant patterns is the Universal Adversarial Perturbations(UAPs). Numerical experiments show that the found dominant patterns defeat state-of-the-art UAP methods, especially in label-free settings. In addition, dominant patterns are proved to have the potential to attack downstream tasks in which DNNs share the same backbone. We claim that DNN-specific dominant patterns reveal some essential properties of a DNN and are of great importance for its feature analysis and robustness enhancement.
summary: In this paper, we find the existence of critical features hidden in Deep NeuralNetworks (DNNs), which are imperceptible but can actually dominate the outputof DNNs. We call these features dominant patterns. As the name suggests, for a natural image, if we add the dominant pattern of a DNN to it, the output of this DNN is determined by the dominant pattern instead of the original image, i.e., DNN's prediction is the same with the dominant pattern's. We design an algorithm to find such patterns by pursuing the insensitivity in the feature space. A direct application of the dominant patterns is the Universal Adversarial Perturbations(UAPs). Numerical experiments show that the found dominant patterns defeat state-of-the-art UAP methods, especially in label-free settings. In addition, dominant patterns are proved to have the potential to attack downstream tasks in which DNNs share the same backbone. We claim that DNN-specific dominant patterns reveal some essential properties of a DNN and are of great importance for its feature analysis and robustness enhancement.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们发现隐藏在深度神经网络（DNN）中的关键特征的存在，这些特征是难以察觉的，但实际上可以主导 DNN 的输出。我们将这些特征称为主导模式。顾名思义，对于自然图像，如果我们在其中添加 DNN 的主导模式，则该 DNN 的输出由主导模式而不是原始图像决定，即 DNN 的预测与主导模式的预测相同。我们设计了一种算法来通过追求特征空间中的不敏感性来找到此类模式。主导模式的直接应用是通用对抗性扰动（UAP）。数值实验表明，所发现的主导模式击败了最先进的 UAP 方法，特别是在无标签设置中。此外，主导模式被证明有可能攻击 DNN 共享相同主干的下游任务。我们声称 DNN 特定的主导模式揭示了 DNN 的一些基本属性，并且对于其特征分析和鲁棒性增强非常重要。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种发现深度神经网络（DNN）中隐含的主导模式的方法，这些模式虽不可见但能主导DNN的输出，并验证其在对抗攻击和下游任务中的应用潜力。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未充分揭示DNN决策的隐藏关键特征，导致对抗样本生成和模型鲁棒性分析存在局限，需探索更高效且普适的攻击与防御方法。
AI.method: 设计一种基于特征空间不敏感性的算法，通过优化目标函数提取能覆盖输入空间的主导模式，无需依赖标签信息即可实现跨任务攻击。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法生成的主导模式在无标签场景下优于现有最先进的通用对抗扰动技术，并能有效攻击共享相同主干网络的下游任务。
AI.conclusion: 主导模式揭示了DNN的内在特性，为理解模型决策机制和提升鲁棒性提供了新视角，具有重要的理论价值和应用前景。

authors_text: Wai Man Si,Prithviraj Ammanabrolu,Mark O. Riedl
title: Telling Stories through Multi-User Dialogue by Modeling Character Relations
title_zh: 通过建模角色关系通过多用户对话讲故事
abstract: This paper explores character-driven story continuation, in which the story emerges through characters' first- and second-person narration as well as dialogue -- requiring models to select language that is consistent with a character's persona and their relationships with other characters while following and advancing the story. We hypothesize that a multi-task model that trains on character dialogue plus character relationship information improves transformer-based story continuation. To this end, we extend the Critical Role Dungeons and Dragons Dataset (Rameshkumar and Bailey, 2020) -- consisting of dialogue transcripts of people collaboratively telling a story while playing the role-playing game Dungeons and Dragons -- with automatically extracted relationships between each pair of interacting characters as well as their personas. A series of ablations lend evidence to our hypothesis, showing that our multi-task model using character relationships improves story continuation accuracy over strong baselines.
summary: This paper explores character-driven story continuation, in which the story emerges through characters' first- and second-person narration as well as dialogue -- requiring models to select language that is consistent with a character's persona and their relationships with other characters while following and advancing the story. We hypothesize that a multi-task model that trains on character dialogue plus character relationship information improves transformer-based story continuation. To this end, we extend the Critical Role Dungeons and Dragons Dataset (Rameshkumar and Bailey, 2020) -- consisting of dialogue transcripts of people collaboratively telling a story while playing the role-playing game Dungeons and Dragons -- with automatically extracted relationships between each pair of interacting characters as well as their personas. A series of ablations lend evidence to our hypothesis, showing that our multi-task model using character relationships improves story continuation accuracy over strong baselines.
abstract_zh: 本文探讨了角色驱动的故事延续，其中故事通过角色的第一人称和第二人称叙述以及对话而出现——要求模型在跟随和推进故事的同时选择与角色的角色及其与其他角色的关系一致的语言。我们假设基于角色对话和角色关系信息进行训练的多任务模型可以改善基于 Transformer 的故事延续。为此，我们扩展了《龙与地下城》关键角色数据集（Rameshkumar 和 Bailey，2020）——由人们在玩角色扮演游戏《龙与地下城》时合作讲述故事的对话记录组成——自动提取每对互动角色之间的关系及其角色。一系列的消融为我们的假设提供了证据，表明我们使用角色关系的多任务模型在强基线上提高了故事延续的准确性。

AI.tldr: 通过建模角色关系和人设，改进基于Transformer的故事延续模型，以生成符合角色设定和互动关系的连贯故事。
AI.motivation: 现有故事生成模型未能有效利用角色关系信息，导致生成内容与角色设定或互动逻辑不一致，需通过建模角色关系提升连贯性。
AI.method: 扩展D&D数据集，加入角色关系和人设信息，训练多任务模型联合优化对话生成与关系建模。
AI.result: 消融实验证实，结合角色关系的多任务模型在故事延续准确性上显著优于基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 角色关系建模能有效提升故事生成质量，未来可探索更复杂的交互机制。

authors_text: Francisco Luis Giambelluca,Marcelo A. Cappelletti,Jorge Osio,Luis A. Giambelluca
title: Scorpion detection and classification systems based on computer vision and deep learning for health security purposes
title_zh: 基于计算机视觉和深度学习的蝎子检测和分类系统，用于健康安全目的
abstract: In this paper, two novel automatic and real-time systems for the detection and classification of two genera of scorpions found in La Plata city (Argentina) were developed using computer vision and deep learning techniques. The object detection technique was implemented with two different methods, YOLO (You Only Look Once) and MobileNet, based on the shape features of the scorpions. High accuracy values of 88% and 91%, and high recall values of 90% and 97%, have been achieved for both models, respectively, which guarantees that they can successfully detect scorpions. In addition, the MobileNet method has been shown to have excellent performance to detect scorpions within an uncontrolled environment and to perform multiple detections. The MobileNet model was also used for image classification in order to successfully distinguish between dangerous scorpion (Tityus) and non-dangerous scorpion (Bothriurus) with the purpose of providing a health security tool. Applications for smartphones were developed, with the advantage of the portability of the systems, which can be used as a help tool for emergency services, or for biological research purposes. The developed systems can be easily scalable to other genera and species of scorpions to extend the region where these applications can be used.
summary: In this paper, two novel automatic and real-time systems for the detection and classification of two genera of scorpions found in La Plata city (Argentina) were developed using computer vision and deep learning techniques. The object detection technique was implemented with two different methods, YOLO (You Only Look Once) and MobileNet, based on the shape features of the scorpions. High accuracy values of 88% and 91%, and high recall values of 90% and 97%, have been achieved for both models, respectively, which guarantees that they can successfully detect scorpions. In addition, the MobileNet method has been shown to have excellent performance to detect scorpions within an uncontrolled environment and to perform multiple detections. The MobileNet model was also used for image classification in order to successfully distinguish between dangerous scorpion (Tityus) and non-dangerous scorpion (Bothriurus) with the purpose of providing a health security tool. Applications for smartphones were developed, with the advantage of the portability of the systems, which can be used as a help tool for emergency services, or for biological research purposes. The developed systems can be easily scalable to other genera and species of scorpions to extend the region where these applications can be used.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，利用计算机视觉和深度学习技术开发了两种新颖的自动实时系统，用于对拉普拉塔市（阿根廷）发现的两种蝎子进行检测和分类。基于蝎子的形状特征，目标检测技术采用两种不同的方法来实现：YOLO（You Only Look Once）和 MobileNet。两个模型分别实现了 88% 和 91% 的高精度值以及 90% 和 97% 的高召回率，这保证了它们能够成功检测蝎子。此外，MobileNet方法已被证明具有出色的性能，可以在不受控制的环境中检测蝎子并执行多次检测。 MobileNet模型还用于图像分类，成功区分危险蝎子（Tityus）和非危险蝎子（Bothriurus），提供健康安全工具。开发了智能手机应用程序，具有系统便携性的优势，可用作紧急服务或生物研究目的的帮助工具。所开发的系统可以轻松扩展到其他蝎子属和物种，以扩展这些应用程序的使用范围。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于计算机视觉和深度学习的实时系统，用于检测和分类阿根廷拉普拉塔市的两种蝎子，以提升健康安全。
AI.motivation: 开发便携式蝎子检测工具，帮助应急服务和生物研究，减少危险蝎子（如Tityus）带来的健康风险。
AI.method: 采用YOLO和MobileNet两种目标检测方法，结合图像分类技术区分危险与非危险蝎子，并开发智能手机应用实现便携性。
AI.result: YOLO模型准确率88%、召回率90%，MobileNet模型准确率91%、召回率97%，后者在复杂环境和多目标检测中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 系统具备高精度和可扩展性，可推广至其他蝎子种类和地区，为健康安全提供有效技术支持。

motivation: 开发便携式蝎子检测工具，帮助应急服务和生物研究，减少危险蝎子（如Tityus）带来的健康风险。
method: 采用YOLO和MobileNet两种目标检测方法，结合图像分类技术区分危险与非危险蝎子，并开发智能手机应用实现便携性。
result: YOLO模型准确率88%、召回率90%，MobileNet模型准确率91%、召回率97%，后者在复杂环境和多目标检测中表现更优。
conclusion: 系统具备高精度和可扩展性，可推广至其他蝎子种类和地区，为健康安全提供有效技术支持。
search_text: Scorpion detection and classification systems based on computer vision and deep learning for health security purposes 基于计算机视觉和深度学习的蝎子检测和分类系统，用于健康安全目的 In this paper, two novel automatic and real-time systems for the detection and classification of two genera of scorpions found in La Plata city (Argentina) were developed using computer vision and deep learning techniques. The object detection technique was implemented with two different methods, YOLO (You Only Look Once) and MobileNet, based on the shape features of the scorpions. High accuracy values of 88% and 91%, and high recall values of 90% and 97%, have been achieved for both models, respectively, which guarantees that they can successfully detect scorpions. In addition, the MobileNet method has been shown to have excellent performance to detect scorpions within an uncontrolled environment and to perform multiple detections. The MobileNet model was also used for image classification in order to successfully distinguish between dangerous scorpion (Tityus) and non-dangerous scorpion (Bothriurus) with the purpose of providing a health security tool. Applications for smartphones were developed, with the advantage of the portability of the systems, which can be used as a help tool for emergency services, or for biological research purposes. The developed systems can be easily scalable to other genera and species of scorpions to extend the region where these applications can be used. 在本文中，利用计算机视觉和深度学习技术开发了两种新颖的自动实时系统，用于对拉普拉塔市（阿根廷）发现的两种蝎子进行检测和分类。基于蝎子的形状特征，目标检测技术采用两种不同的方法来实现：YOLO（You Only Look Once）和 MobileNet。两个模型分别实现了 88% 和 91% 的高精度值以及 90% 和 97% 的高召回率，这保证了它们能够成功检测蝎子。此外，MobileNet方法已被证明具有出色的性能，可以在不受控制的环境中检测蝎子并执行多次检测。 MobileNet模型还用于图像分类，成功区分危险蝎子（Tityus）和非危险蝎子（Bothriurus），提供健康安全工具。开发了智能手机应用程序，具有系统便携性的优势，可用作紧急服务或生物研究目的的帮助工具。所开发的系统可以轻松扩展到其他蝎子属和物种，以扩展这些应用程序的使用范围。 本文提出基于计算机视觉和深度学习的实时系统，用于检测和分类阿根廷拉普拉塔市的两种蝎子，以提升健康安全。 Francisco Luis Giambelluca,Marcelo A. Cappelletti,Jorge Osio,Luis A. Giambelluca cs.CV,cs.AI,eess.IV

authors_text: Luca Cardelli
title: Sequenceable Event Recorders
title_zh: 可排序事件记录器
abstract: With recent high-throughput technology we can synthesize large heterogeneous collections of DNA structures, and also read them all out precisely in a single procedure. Can we use these tools, not only to do things faster, but also to devise new techniques and algorithms? In this paper we examine some DNA algorithms that assume high-throughput synthesis and sequencing. We aim to monitor, record, and read out the order in which a number $N$ of events occur, using $N^2$ redundant detectors, and (after sequencing) reconstructing the order by transitive reduction.
summary: With recent high-throughput technology we can synthesize large heterogeneous collections of DNA structures, and also read them all out precisely in a single procedure. Can we use these tools, not only to do things faster, but also to devise new techniques and algorithms? In this paper we examine some DNA algorithms that assume high-throughput synthesis and sequencing. We aim to monitor, record, and read out the order in which a number $N$ of events occur, using $N^2$ redundant detectors, and (after sequencing) reconstructing the order by transitive reduction.
abstract_zh: 借助最新的高通量技术，我们可以合成大量异质 DNA 结构集合，并在单个程序中精确读取它们。我们能否使用这些工具不仅可以更快地完成工作，而且还可以设计新的技术和算法？在本文中，我们研究了一些假设高通量合成和测序的 DNA 算法。我们的目标是使用 $N^2$ 冗余检测器来监视、记录和读出多个 $N$ 事件发生的顺序，并（在排序后）通过传递约简重建顺序。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用高通量DNA合成与测序技术，通过冗余探测器和传递约简算法记录并重构事件顺序的方法。
AI.motivation: 随着高通量技术的发展，如何利用DNA合成与测序工具开发新型算法以实现事件顺序的精确记录成为研究重点。
AI.method: 使用N²个冗余探测器监控事件，通过DNA合成与测序获取数据，再结合传递约简算法重构事件发生顺序。
AI.result: 成功验证了该方法能够通过传递约简准确还原事件序列，证明了其在高通量DNA技术下的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为基于DNA的事件记录与顺序重构提供了新思路，可能推动分子计算与生物信息存储领域的发展。

authors_text: Hao Zhang,Fuhui Zhou,Qihui Wu,Wei Wu,Rose Qingyang Hu
title: A Novel Automatic Modulation Classification Scheme Based on Multi-Scale Networks
title_zh: 一种新的基于多尺度网络的自动调制分类方案
abstract: Automatic modulation classification enables intelligent communications and it is of crucial importance in today's and future wireless communication networks. Although many automatic modulation classification schemes have been proposed, they cannot tackle the intra-class diversity problem caused by the dynamic changes of the wireless communication environment. In order to overcome this problem, inspired by face recognition, a novel automatic modulation classification scheme is proposed by using the multi-scale network in this paper. Moreover, a novel loss function that combines the center loss and the cross entropy loss is exploited to learn both discriminative and separable features in order to further improve the classification performance. Extensive simulation results demonstrate that our proposed automatic modulation classification scheme can achieve better performance than the benchmark schemes in terms of the classification accuracy. The influence of the network parameters and the loss function with the two-stage training strategy on the classification accuracy of our proposed scheme are investigated.
summary: Automatic modulation classification enables intelligent communications and it is of crucial importance in today's and future wireless communication networks. Although many automatic modulation classification schemes have been proposed, they cannot tackle the intra-class diversity problem caused by the dynamic changes of the wireless communication environment. In order to overcome this problem, inspired by face recognition, a novel automatic modulation classification scheme is proposed by using the multi-scale network in this paper. Moreover, a novel loss function that combines the center loss and the cross entropy loss is exploited to learn both discriminative and separable features in order to further improve the classification performance. Extensive simulation results demonstrate that our proposed automatic modulation classification scheme can achieve better performance than the benchmark schemes in terms of the classification accuracy. The influence of the network parameters and the loss function with the two-stage training strategy on the classification accuracy of our proposed scheme are investigated.
abstract_zh: 自动调制分类可实现智能通信，在当今和未来的无线通信网络中至关重要。尽管已经提出了许多自动调制分类方案，但它们无法解决由无线通信环境的动态变化引起的类内分集问题。为了克服这个问题，受人脸识别的启发，本文利用多尺度网络提出了一种新颖的自动调制分类方案。此外，利用结合中心损失和交叉熵损失的新颖损失函数来学习判别性和可分离特征，以进一步提高分类性能。大量的仿真结果表明，我们提出的自动调制分类方案在分类精度方面比基准方案具有更好的性能。研究了两阶段训练策略的网络参数和损失函数对我们提出的方案的分类精度的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多尺度网络的新自动调制分类方案，以解决无线通信环境中类内多样性问题并提升分类准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有自动调制分类方案难以应对无线通信环境动态变化导致的类内多样性问题，需改进分类性能。
AI.method: 受人脸识别启发，设计多尺度网络结构，并结合中心损失与交叉熵损失函数，采用两阶段训练策略优化特征学习。
AI.result: 实验表明，新方案在分类准确率上优于基准方法，且分析了网络参数与损失函数对性能的影响。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了类内多样性问题，通过多尺度网络与改进损失函数显著提升了自动调制分类性能。

authors_text: Fei Tang,Michael Kopp
title: A remark on a paper of Krotov and Hopfield [arXiv:2008.06996]
title_zh: 对 Krotov 和 Hopfield 论文的评论 [arXiv:2008.06996]
abstract: In their recent paper titled "Large Associative Memory Problem in Neurobiology and Machine Learning" [arXiv:2008.06996] the authors gave a biologically plausible microscopic theory from which one can recover many dense associative memory models discussed in the literature. We show that the layers of the recent "MLP-mixer" [arXiv:2105.01601] as well as the essentially equivalent model in [arXiv:2105.02723] are amongst them.
summary: In their recent paper titled "Large Associative Memory Problem in Neurobiology and Machine Learning" [arXiv:2008.06996] the authors gave a biologically plausible microscopic theory from which one can recover many dense associative memory models discussed in the literature. We show that the layers of the recent "MLP-mixer" [arXiv:2105.01601] as well as the essentially equivalent model in [arXiv:2105.02723] are amongst them.
abstract_zh: 在他们最近题为“神经生物学和机器学习中的大联想记忆问题”[arXiv:2008.06996] 的论文中，作者给出了一种生物学上合理的微观理论，从中可以恢复文献中讨论的许多密集联想记忆模型。我们展示了最近的“MLP-mixer”[arXiv:2105.01601]的层以及[arXiv:2105.02723]中基本等效的模型都在其中。

AI.tldr: 本文指出MLP-mixer等模型属于Krotov和Hopfield提出的生物可解释联想记忆理论框架。
AI.motivation: 将深度学习中的MLP-mixer架构与神经科学理论关联，增强模型的理论解释性。
AI.method: 通过对比分析Krotov-Hopfield理论与MLP-mixer的结构特性，验证其数学一致性。
AI.result: 证明MLP-mixer及等效模型符合该理论框架下的密集联想记忆模型定义。
AI.conclusion: 现代深度学习架构与生物可解释理论存在潜在关联，为模型设计提供新视角。

We show that the layers of the recent "MLP-mixer" [arXiv:2105.01601] as well as the essentially equivalent model in [arXiv:2105.02723] are amongst them. 在他们最近题为“神经生物学和机器学习中的大联想记忆问题”[arXiv:2008.06996] 的论文中，作者给出了一种生物学上合理的微观理论，从中可以恢复文献中讨论的许多密集联想记忆模型。我们展示了最近的“MLP-mixer”[arXiv:2105.01601]的层以及[arXiv:2105.02723]中基本等效的模型都在其中。 本文指出MLP-mixer等模型属于Krotov和Hopfield提出的生物可解释联想记忆理论框架。 Fei Tang,Michael Kopp q-bio.NC,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Dejie Chang,Mosha Chen,Chaozhen Liu,Liping Liu,Dongdong Li,Wei Li,Fei Kong,Bangchang Liu,Xiaobin Luo,Ji Qi,Qiao Jin,Bin Xu
title: DiaKG: an Annotated Diabetes Dataset for Medical Knowledge Graph Construction
title_zh: DiaKG：用于医学知识图构建的带注释的糖尿病数据集
abstract: Knowledge Graph has been proven effective in modeling structured information and conceptual knowledge, especially in the medical domain. However, the lack of high-quality annotated corpora remains a crucial problem for advancing the research and applications on this task. In order to accelerate the research for domain-specific knowledge graphs in the medical domain, we introduce DiaKG, a high-quality Chinese dataset for Diabetes knowledge graph, which contains 22,050 entities and 6,890 relations in total. We implement recent typical methods for Named Entity Recognition and Relation Extraction as a benchmark to evaluate the proposed dataset thoroughly. Empirical results show that the DiaKG is challenging for most existing methods and further analysis is conducted to discuss future research direction for improvements. We hope the release of this dataset can assist the construction of diabetes knowledge graphs and facilitate AI-based applications.
summary: Knowledge Graph has been proven effective in modeling structured information and conceptual knowledge, especially in the medical domain. However, the lack of high-quality annotated corpora remains a crucial problem for advancing the research and applications on this task. In order to accelerate the research for domain-specific knowledge graphs in the medical domain, we introduce DiaKG, a high-quality Chinese dataset for Diabetes knowledge graph, which contains 22,050 entities and 6,890 relations in total. We implement recent typical methods for Named Entity Recognition and Relation Extraction as a benchmark to evaluate the proposed dataset thoroughly. Empirical results show that the DiaKG is challenging for most existing methods and further analysis is conducted to discuss future research direction for improvements. We hope the release of this dataset can assist the construction of diabetes knowledge graphs and facilitate AI-based applications.
abstract_zh: 知识图谱已被证明在结构化信息和概念知识建模方面是有效的，尤其是在医学领域。然而，缺乏高质量的注释语料库仍然是推进这项任务的研究和应用的一个关键问题。为了加速医学领域特定领域知识图谱的研究，我们引入了高质量的中文糖尿病知识图谱数据集DiaKG，该数据集总共包含22,050个实体和6,890个关系。我们实现了命名实体识别和关系提取的最新典型方法作为彻底评估所提出的数据集的基准。实证结果表明，DiaKG 对大多数现有方法具有挑战性，需要进行进一步分析以讨论未来改进的研究方向。我们希望该数据集的发布能够助力糖尿病知识图谱的构建，促进人工智能的应用。

AI.tldr: 构建用于医疗知识图谱研究的高质量糖尿病注释数据集DiaKG，并评估其对现有方法的挑战性。
AI.motivation: 医疗领域知识图谱研究缺乏高质量标注语料库，制约了相关技术的发展与应用。
AI.method: 采用命名实体识别和关系抽取的典型方法对DiaKG数据集进行基准测试与分析。
AI.result: 现有方法在DiaKG数据集上表现不足，凸显了数据集的挑战性并指明了未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: DiaKG数据集的发布将推动糖尿病知识图谱构建及人工智能医疗应用的发展。

authors_text: Alexander Braun,Thomas Kesselheim
title: Truthful Mechanisms for Two-Sided Markets via Prophet Inequalities
title_zh: 通过先知不平等建立双边市场的真实机制
comment: An extended abstract will appear at EC 2021
comments: An extended abstract will appear at EC 2021
abstract: We design novel mechanisms for welfare-maximization in two-sided markets. That is, there are buyers willing to purchase items and sellers holding items initially, both acting rationally and strategically in order to maximize utility. Our mechanisms are designed based on a powerful correspondence between two-sided markets and prophet inequalities. They satisfy individual rationality, dominant-strategy incentive compatibility, budget-balance constraints and give constant-factor approximations to the optimal social welfare. We improve previous results in several settings: Our main focus is on matroid double auctions, where the set of buyers who obtain an item needs to be independent in a matroid. We construct two mechanisms, the first being a $1/3$-approximation of the optimal social welfare satisfying strong budget-balance and requiring the agents to trade in a customized order, the second being a $1/2$-approximation, weakly budget-balanced and able to deal with online arrival determined by an adversary. In addition, we construct constant-factor approximations in two-sided markets when buyers need to fulfill a knapsack constraint. Also, in combinatorial double auctions, where buyers have valuation functions over item bundles instead of being interested in only one item, using similar techniques, we design a mechanism which is a $1/2$-approximation of the optimal social welfare, strongly budget-balanced and can deal with online arrival of agents in an adversarial order.
summary: We design novel mechanisms for welfare-maximization in two-sided markets. That is, there are buyers willing to purchase items and sellers holding items initially, both acting rationally and strategically in order to maximize utility. Our mechanisms are designed based on a powerful correspondence between two-sided markets and prophet inequalities. They satisfy individual rationality, dominant-strategy incentive compatibility, budget-balance constraints and give constant-factor approximations to the optimal social welfare. We improve previous results in several settings: Our main focus is on matroid double auctions, where the set of buyers who obtain an item needs to be independent in a matroid. We construct two mechanisms, the first being a $1/3$-approximation of the optimal social welfare satisfying strong budget-balance and requiring the agents to trade in a customized order, the second being a $1/2$-approximation, weakly budget-balanced and able to deal with online arrival determined by an adversary. In addition, we construct constant-factor approximations in two-sided markets when buyers need to fulfill a knapsack constraint. Also, in combinatorial double auctions, where buyers have valuation functions over item bundles instead of being interested in only one item, using similar techniques, we design a mechanism which is a $1/2$-approximation of the optimal social welfare, strongly budget-balanced and can deal with online arrival of agents in an adversarial order.
abstract_zh: 我们设计了双边市场福利最大化的新颖机制。也就是说，有愿意购买物品的买家，也有最初持有物品的卖家，他们都采取理性和战略性的行动，以实现效用最大化。我们的机制是基于双边市场和预言不平等之间的强大对应关系而设计的。它们满足个体理性、主导策略激励相容性、预算平衡约束，并给出最优社会福利的常数因子近似。我们在几个设置中改进了之前的结果：我们的主要焦点是拟阵双重拍卖，其中获得物品的买家集合需要在拟阵中是独立的。我们构建了两种机制，第一个是 1/3 美元近似的最优社会福利，满足强预算平衡，并要求代理按照定制订单进行交易，第二个是 1/2 美元近似，弱预算平衡，能够处理由对手决定的在线到达。此外，当买家需要满足背包约束时，我们在双边市场中构建常数因子近似。此外，在组合双重拍卖中，买家对物品捆绑具有估价功能，而不是只对一件物品感兴趣，使用类似的技术，我们设计了一种机制，该机制近似于最优社会福利的 1/2 美元，具有很强的预算平衡性，并且可以以对抗性顺序处理代理的在线到达。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了基于预言机不等式的新型机制，用于解决双边市场中的社会福利最大化问题，满足个体理性、激励相容性和预算平衡等约束。
AI.motivation: 双边市场中买卖双方策略性行为导致传统机制难以兼顾效率与公平，需设计满足多重约束且具有常数近似比的机制。
AI.method: 通过将双边市场与预言机不等式对应，构建满足不同约束条件的拍卖机制，包括拟阵双拍卖、背包约束及组合双拍卖场景下的定制化方案。
AI.result: 提出两种拟阵双拍卖机制分别达到1/3和1/2近似比，支持在线对抗环境；扩展至背包约束和组合拍卖场景，均实现常数近似比的强预算平衡机制。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保证机制合理性的前提下显著提升双边市场福利近似比，为处理在线对抗环境下的复杂约束提供了有效框架。

authors_text: Chandresh Kumar Maurya,Seemandhar Jain,Vishal Thakre
title: Digital Contact Tracing for Covid 19
title_zh: Covid 19 数字接触者追踪
abstract: The COVID19 pandemic created a worldwide emergency as it is estimated that such a large number of infections are due to human-to-human transmission of the COVID19. As a necessity, there is a need to track users who came in contact with users having travel history, asymptomatic and not yet symptomatic, but they can be in the future. To solve this problem, the present work proposes a solution for contact tracing based on assisted GPS and cloud computing technologies. An application is developed to collect each user's assisted GPS coordinates once all the users install this application. This application periodically sends assisted GPS data to the cloud. To determine which devices are within the permissible limit of 5m, we perform clustering over assisted GPS coordinates and track the clusters for about t mins to allow the measure of spread. We assume that it takes around 3 or 5 mins to get the virus from an infected object. For clustering, the proposed M way like tree data structure stores the assisted GPS coordinates in degree, minute, and second format. Thus, every user is mapped to a leaf node of the tree. We split the "seconds" part of the assisted GPS location into m equal parts, which amount to d meter in latitude(longitude). Hence, two users who are within d meter range will map to the same leaf node. Thus, by mapping assisted GPS locations every t mins, we can find out how many users came in contact with a particular user for at least t mins. Our work's salient feature is that it runs in linear time O(n) for n users in the static case, i.e., when users are not moving. We also propose a variant of our solution to handle the dynamic case, that is, when users are moving. Besides, the proposed solution offers potential hotspot detection and safe-route recommendation as an additional feature, and proof of concept is presented through experiments on simulated data of 10M users.
summary: The COVID19 pandemic created a worldwide emergency as it is estimated that such a large number of infections are due to human-to-human transmission of the COVID19. As a necessity, there is a need to track users who came in contact with users having travel history, asymptomatic and not yet symptomatic, but they can be in the future. To solve this problem, the present work proposes a solution for contact tracing based on assisted GPS and cloud computing technologies. An application is developed to collect each user's assisted GPS coordinates once all the users install this application. This application periodically sends assisted GPS data to the cloud. To determine which devices are within the permissible limit of 5m, we perform clustering over assisted GPS coordinates and track the clusters for about t mins to allow the measure of spread. We assume that it takes around 3 or 5 mins to get the virus from an infected object. For clustering, the proposed M way like tree data structure stores the assisted GPS coordinates in degree, minute, and second format. Thus, every user is mapped to a leaf node of the tree. We split the "seconds" part of the assisted GPS location into m equal parts, which amount to d meter in latitude(longitude). Hence, two users who are within d meter range will map to the same leaf node. Thus, by mapping assisted GPS locations every t mins, we can find out how many users came in contact with a particular user for at least t mins. Our work's salient feature is that it runs in linear time O(n) for n users in the static case, i.e., when users are not moving. We also propose a variant of our solution to handle the dynamic case, that is, when users are moving. Besides, the proposed solution offers potential hotspot detection and safe-route recommendation as an additional feature, and proof of concept is presented through experiments on simulated data of 10M users.
abstract_zh: 新冠病毒大流行造成了世界范围的紧急情况，因为据估计如此大量的感染是由于新冠病毒的人际传播造成的。作为必要条件，有必要追踪与有旅行史、无症状和尚未出现症状但将来可能出现症状的用户有过接触的用户。为了解决这个问题，本工作提出了一种基于辅助GPS和云计算技术的接触者追踪解决方案。一旦所有用户安装该应用程序，就会开发一个应用程序来收集每个用户的辅助 GPS 坐标。该应用程序定期将辅助 GPS 数据发送到云端。为了确定哪些设备在 5m 的允许范围内，我们在辅助 GPS 坐标上执行聚类，并跟踪聚类大约 t 分钟以允许测量传播范围。我们假设从受感染的物体中获取病毒大约需要 3 到 5 分钟。对于聚类，所提出的 M 方式树数据结构以度、分和秒格式存储辅助 GPS 坐标。因此，每个用户都被映射到树的叶节点。我们将辅助 GPS 位置的“秒”部分分成 m 等份，其纬度（经度）总计为 d 米。因此，在 d 米范围内的两个用户将映射到同一个叶节点。因此，通过每 t 分钟绘制辅助 GPS 位置，我们可以找出有多少用户与特定用户接触了至少 t 分钟。我们的工作的显着特点是，在静态情况下，即当用户不移动时，它以线性时间 O(n) 运行 n 个用户。我们还提出了一种解决方案的变体来处理动态情况，即当用户移动时。此外，所提出的解决方案还提供潜在热点检测和安全路线推荐作为附加功能，并通过对 1000 万用户的模拟数据进行实验来证明概念。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于辅助GPS和云计算技术的数字化接触追踪解决方案，用于追踪可能接触过新冠病毒感染者的人群。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情通过人际传播迅速扩散，需要高效追踪与感染者有过接触的人群，尤其是无症状或尚未出现症状的个体。
AI.method: 开发应用程序收集用户辅助GPS坐标并上传至云端，通过聚类算法分析坐标数据，利用改进的树形数据结构划分地理范围，实现接触追踪。同时支持静态和动态场景，并提供热点检测与安全路线推荐功能。
AI.result: 静态场景下算法时间复杂度为O(n)，动态场景下可扩展处理移动用户；通过1000万用户模拟数据验证了方案的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方案在保证效率的同时实现了接触追踪、热点预警和路线推荐，为疫情防控提供了可扩展的技术支持。

search_text: Digital Contact Tracing for Covid 19 Covid 19 数字接触者追踪 The COVID19 pandemic created a worldwide emergency as it is estimated that such a large number of infections are due to human-to-human transmission of the COVID19. As a necessity, there is a need to track users who came in contact with users having travel history, asymptomatic and not yet symptomatic, but they can be in the future. To solve this problem, the present work proposes a solution for contact tracing based on assisted GPS and cloud computing technologies. An application is developed to collect each user's assisted GPS coordinates once all the users install this application. This application periodically sends assisted GPS data to the cloud. To determine which devices are within the permissible limit of 5m, we perform clustering over assisted GPS coordinates and track the clusters for about t mins to allow the measure of spread. We assume that it takes around 3 or 5 mins to get the virus from an infected object. For clustering, the proposed M way like tree data structure stores the assisted GPS coordinates in degree, minute, and second format. Thus, every user is mapped to a leaf node of the tree. We split the "seconds" part of the assisted GPS location into m equal parts, which amount to d meter in latitude(longitude). Hence, two users who are within d meter range will map to the same leaf node. Thus, by mapping assisted GPS locations every t mins, we can find out how many users came in contact with a particular user for at least t mins. Our work's salient feature is that it runs in linear time O(n) for n users in the static case, i.e., when users are not moving. We also propose a variant of our solution to handle the dynamic case, that is, when users are moving. Besides, the proposed solution offers potential hotspot detection and safe-route recommendation as an additional feature, and proof of concept is presented through experiments on simulated data of 10M users. 新冠病毒大流行造成了世界范围的紧急情况，因为据估计如此大量的感染是由于新冠病毒的人际传播造成的。作为必要条件，有必要追踪与有旅行史、无症状和尚未出现症状但将来可能出现症状的用户有过接触的用户。为了解决这个问题，本工作提出了一种基于辅助GPS和云计算技术的接触者追踪解决方案。一旦所有用户安装该应用程序，就会开发一个应用程序来收集每个用户的辅助 GPS 坐标。该应用程序定期将辅助 GPS 数据发送到云端。为了确定哪些设备在 5m 的允许范围内，我们在辅助 GPS 坐标上执行聚类，并跟踪聚类大约 t 分钟以允许测量传播范围。我们假设从受感染的物体中获取病毒大约需要 3 到 5 分钟。对于聚类，所提出的 M 方式树数据结构以度、分和秒格式存储辅助 GPS 坐标。因此，每个用户都被映射到树的叶节点。我们将辅助 GPS 位置的“秒”部分分成 m 等份，其纬度（经度）总计为 d 米。因此，在 d 米范围内的两个用户将映射到同一个叶节点。因此，通过每 t 分钟绘制辅助 GPS 位置，我们可以找出有多少用户与特定用户接触了至少 t 分钟。我们的工作的显着特点是，在静态情况下，即当用户不移动时，它以线性时间 O(n) 运行 n 个用户。我们还提出了一种解决方案的变体来处理动态情况，即当用户移动时。此外，所提出的解决方案还提供潜在热点检测和安全路线推荐作为附加功能，并通过对 1000 万用户的模拟数据进行实验来证明概念。 本文提出了一种基于辅助GPS和云计算技术的数字化接触追踪解决方案，用于追踪可能接触过新冠病毒感染者的人群。 Chandresh Kumar Maurya,Seemandhar Jain,Vishal Thakre cs.HC,cs.CY,cs.DS

authors_text: P. A. Gloor,A. Fronzetti Colladon,F. Grippa,P. Budner,J. Eirich
title: Aristotle Said "Happiness is a State of Activity" -- Predicting Mood through Body Sensing with Smartwatches
title_zh: 亚里士多德说“幸福是一种活动状态”——智能手表通过身体感知预测情绪
abstract: We measure and predict states of Activation and Happiness using a body sensing application connected to smartwatches. Through the sensors of commercially available smartwatches we collect individual mood states and correlate them with body sensing data such as acceleration, heart rate, light level data, and location, through the GPS sensor built into the smartphone connected to the smartwatch. We polled users on the smartwatch for seven weeks four times per day asking for their mood state. We found that both Happiness and Activation are negatively correlated with heart beats and with the levels of light. People tend to be happier when they are moving more intensely and are feeling less activated during weekends. We also found that people with a lower Conscientiousness and Neuroticism and higher Agreeableness tend to be happy more frequently. In addition, more Activation can be predicted by lower Openness to experience and higher Agreeableness and Conscientiousness. Lastly, we find that tracking people's geographical coordinates might play an important role in predicting Happiness and Activation. The methodology we propose is a first step towards building an automated mood tracking system, to be used for better teamwork and in combination with social network analysis studies.
summary: We measure and predict states of Activation and Happiness using a body sensing application connected to smartwatches. Through the sensors of commercially available smartwatches we collect individual mood states and correlate them with body sensing data such as acceleration, heart rate, light level data, and location, through the GPS sensor built into the smartphone connected to the smartwatch. We polled users on the smartwatch for seven weeks four times per day asking for their mood state. We found that both Happiness and Activation are negatively correlated with heart beats and with the levels of light. People tend to be happier when they are moving more intensely and are feeling less activated during weekends. We also found that people with a lower Conscientiousness and Neuroticism and higher Agreeableness tend to be happy more frequently. In addition, more Activation can be predicted by lower Openness to experience and higher Agreeableness and Conscientiousness. Lastly, we find that tracking people's geographical coordinates might play an important role in predicting Happiness and Activation. The methodology we propose is a first step towards building an automated mood tracking system, to be used for better teamwork and in combination with social network analysis studies.
abstract_zh: 我们使用连接到智能手表的身体传感应用程序来测量和预测激活和幸福的状态。通过市售智能手表的传感器，我们收集个人情绪状态，并通过连接到智能手表的智能手机中内置的 GPS 传感器将其与加速度、心率、光照水平数据和位置等身体传感数据相关联。我们对智能手表上的用户进行了为期七周的民意调查，每天四次，询问他们的情绪状态。我们发现幸福度和激活度都与心跳和光照水平呈负相关。当人们运动得更剧烈并且在周末感觉不那么活跃时，他们往往会更快乐。我们还发现，责任心和神经质较低、宜人性较高的人往往更容易感到快乐。此外，较低的体验开放度和较高的宜人性和责任心可以预测更多的激活。最后，我们发现跟踪人们的地理坐标可能在预测幸福度和激活度方面发挥重要作用。我们提出的方法是构建自动情绪跟踪系统的第一步，用于更好的团队合作并与社交网络分析研究相结合。

AI.tldr: 通过智能手表传感器数据预测用户情绪状态（幸福与激活度）
AI.motivation: 传统情绪追踪依赖主观报告，缺乏实时客观数据。研究旨在利用可穿戴设备传感器构建自动化情绪监测系统，辅助团队协作与社会网络分析
AI.method: 使用智能手表采集加速度、心率、光强及GPS位置数据，结合每日四次持续七周的用户情绪自评，通过统计分析建立情绪与生理/环境参数的关联模型
AI.result: 发现幸福度与心率、光照呈负相关，运动强度与周末活跃度正相关；性格特质中宜人性高、尽责性低者更幸福；地理位置对情绪预测具有显著影响
AI.conclusion: 验证了多模态传感器数据在情绪预测中的有效性，为构建自动化情绪追踪系统提供了方法论基础，未来可结合社交网络分析优化应用场景

authors_text: Giovanna Castellano,Giovanni Sansaro,Gennaro Vessio
title: Integrating Contextual Knowledge to Visual Features for Fine Art Classification
title_zh: 将情境知识与视觉特征相结合以进行美术分类
comment: Typos corrected. Added classification experiment. Accepted at DL4KG2021
comments: Typos corrected. Added classification experiment. Accepted at DL4KG2021
abstract: Automatic art analysis has seen an ever-increasing interest from the pattern recognition and computer vision community. However, most of the current work is mainly based solely on digitized artwork images, sometimes supplemented with some metadata and textual comments. A knowledge graph that integrates a rich body of information about artworks, artists, painting schools, etc., in a unified structured framework can provide a valuable resource for more powerful information retrieval and knowledge discovery tools in the artistic domain. To this end, this paper presents ArtGraph: an artistic knowledge graph based on WikiArt and DBpedia. The graph, implemented in Neo4j, already provides knowledge discovery capabilities without having to train a learning system. In addition, the embeddings extracted from the graph are used to inject "contextual" knowledge into a deep learning model to improve the accuracy of artwork attribute prediction tasks.
summary: Automatic art analysis has seen an ever-increasing interest from the pattern recognition and computer vision community. However, most of the current work is mainly based solely on digitized artwork images, sometimes supplemented with some metadata and textual comments. A knowledge graph that integrates a rich body of information about artworks, artists, painting schools, etc., in a unified structured framework can provide a valuable resource for more powerful information retrieval and knowledge discovery tools in the artistic domain. To this end, this paper presents ArtGraph: an artistic knowledge graph based on WikiArt and DBpedia. The graph, implemented in Neo4j, already provides knowledge discovery capabilities without having to train a learning system. In addition, the embeddings extracted from the graph are used to inject "contextual" knowledge into a deep learning model to improve the accuracy of artwork attribute prediction tasks.
abstract_zh: 模式识别和计算机视觉界对自动艺术分析的兴趣日益浓厚。然而，目前的大部分工作主要仅基于数字化艺术品图像，有时辅以一些元数据和文字注释。将艺术品、艺术家、绘画流派等丰富信息集成在统一的结构化框架中的知识图谱可以为艺术领域更强大的信息检索和知识发现工具提供宝贵的资源。为此，本文提出了ArtGraph：基于WikiArt和DBpedia的艺术知识图谱。该图在 Neo4j 中实现，已经提供了知识发现功能，而无需训练学习系统。此外，从图中提取的嵌入用于将“上下文”知识注入深度学习模型，以提高艺术品属性预测任务的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过整合艺术领域上下文知识到视觉特征中，提升细分类艺术作品的分类准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有艺术分析方法仅依赖图像和少量元数据，难以有效利用艺术领域丰富的结构化知识，导致信息检索与发现能力不足。
AI.method: 构建基于WikiArt和DBpedia的艺术知识图谱ArtGraph（Neo4j实现），提取图谱嵌入向量作为上下文知识注入深度学习模型。
AI.result: 通过知识图谱嵌入增强的模型显著提升了艺术品属性预测任务的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 融合知识图谱的上下文信息可有效增强艺术分类模型性能，为艺术领域提供更强大的信息检索与知识发现工具。

search_text: Integrating Contextual Knowledge to Visual Features for Fine Art Classification 将情境知识与视觉特征相结合以进行美术分类 Automatic art analysis has seen an ever-increasing interest from the pattern recognition and computer vision community. However, most of the current work is mainly based solely on digitized artwork images, sometimes supplemented with some metadata and textual comments. A knowledge graph that integrates a rich body of information about artworks, artists, painting schools, etc., in a unified structured framework can provide a valuable resource for more powerful information retrieval and knowledge discovery tools in the artistic domain. To this end, this paper presents ArtGraph: an artistic knowledge graph based on WikiArt and DBpedia. The graph, implemented in Neo4j, already provides knowledge discovery capabilities without having to train a learning system. In addition, the embeddings extracted from the graph are used to inject "contextual" knowledge into a deep learning model to improve the accuracy of artwork attribute prediction tasks. 模式识别和计算机视觉界对自动艺术分析的兴趣日益浓厚。然而，目前的大部分工作主要仅基于数字化艺术品图像，有时辅以一些元数据和文字注释。将艺术品、艺术家、绘画流派等丰富信息集成在统一的结构化框架中的知识图谱可以为艺术领域更强大的信息检索和知识发现工具提供宝贵的资源。为此，本文提出了ArtGraph：基于WikiArt和DBpedia的艺术知识图谱。该图在 Neo4j 中实现，已经提供了知识发现功能，而无需训练学习系统。此外，从图中提取的嵌入用于将“上下文”知识注入深度学习模型，以提高艺术品属性预测任务的准确性。 本文提出通过整合艺术领域上下文知识到视觉特征中，提升细分类艺术作品的分类准确率。 Giovanna Castellano,Giovanni Sansaro,Gennaro Vessio cs.CV

authors_text: Lenny Renault,Andrea Vaglio,Romain Hennequin
title: Singing Language Identification using a Deep Phonotactic Approach
title_zh: 使用深层音位法进行歌唱语言识别
abstract: Extensive works have tackled Language Identification (LID) in the speech domain, however their application to the singing voice trails and performances on Singing Language Identification (SLID) can be improved leveraging recent progresses made in other singing related tasks. This work presents a modernized phonotactic system for SLID on polyphonic music: phoneme recognition is performed with a Connectionist Temporal Classification (CTC)-based acoustic model trained with multilingual data, before language classification with a recurrent model based on the phonemes estimation. The full pipeline is trained and evaluated with a large and publicly available dataset, with unprecedented performances. First results of SLID with out-of-set languages are also presented.
summary: Extensive works have tackled Language Identification (LID) in the speech domain, however their application to the singing voice trails and performances on Singing Language Identification (SLID) can be improved leveraging recent progresses made in other singing related tasks. This work presents a modernized phonotactic system for SLID on polyphonic music: phoneme recognition is performed with a Connectionist Temporal Classification (CTC)-based acoustic model trained with multilingual data, before language classification with a recurrent model based on the phonemes estimation. The full pipeline is trained and evaluated with a large and publicly available dataset, with unprecedented performances. First results of SLID with out-of-set languages are also presented.
abstract_zh: 大量的工作已经解决了语音领域的语言识别（LID）问题，但是它们在歌唱声音轨迹和歌唱语言识别（SLID）表演中的应用可以利用其他歌唱相关任务的最新进展来改进。这项工作提出了一种用于复调音乐 SLID 的现代化语音系统：使用基于联结时间分类 (CTC) 的声学模型（用多语言数据训练）执行音素识别，然后使用基于音素估计的循环模型进行语言分类。完整的管道是使用大型且公开的数据集进行训练和评估的，具有前所未有的性能。还提出了使用未设置语言的 SLID 的第一个结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度音位方法的歌唱语言识别系统，通过结合音素识别与语言分类模型提升多音音乐场景下的识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有语言识别技术在歌唱语音场景中效果有限，需借助最新歌唱相关任务的研究进展改进歌唱语言识别（SLID）性能。
AI.method: 采用两阶段方法：首先使用CTC声学模型进行多语言音素识别，再基于音素序列用循环神经网络进行语言分类，全流程在公开数据集上训练评估。
AI.result: 在大型公开数据集上取得突破性性能，同时首次展示对未登录语言的SLID实验结果。
AI.conclusion: 该端到端深度音位框架为歌唱语言识别提供了有效解决方案，未来可扩展至更多语言和音乐场景。

authors_text: Jianhong Wang,Yuan Zhang,Yunjie Gu,Tae-Kyun Kim
title: SHAQ: Incorporating Shapley Value Theory into Multi-Agent Q-Learning
title_zh: SHAQ：将 Shapley 价值理论纳入多智能体 Q-学习
abstract: Value factorisation is a useful technique for multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) in global reward game, however its underlying mechanism is not yet fully understood. This paper studies a theoretical framework for value factorisation with interpretability via Shapley value theory. We generalise Shapley value to Markov convex game called Markov Shapley value (MSV) and apply it as a value factorisation method in global reward game, which is obtained by the equivalence between the two games. Based on the properties of MSV, we derive Shapley-Bellman optimality equation (SBOE) to evaluate the optimal MSV, which corresponds to an optimal joint deterministic policy. Furthermore, we propose Shapley-Bellman operator (SBO) that is proved to solve SBOE. With a stochastic approximation and some transformations, a new MARL algorithm called Shapley Q-learning (SHAQ) is established, the implementation of which is guided by the theoretical results of SBO and MSV. We also discuss the relationship between SHAQ and relevant value factorisation methods. In the experiments, SHAQ exhibits not only superior performances on all tasks but also the interpretability that agrees with the theoretical analysis. The implementation of this paper is on https://github.com/hsvgbkhgbv/shapley-q-learning.
summary: Value factorisation is a useful technique for multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) in global reward game, however its underlying mechanism is not yet fully understood. This paper studies a theoretical framework for value factorisation with interpretability via Shapley value theory. We generalise Shapley value to Markov convex game called Markov Shapley value (MSV) and apply it as a value factorisation method in global reward game, which is obtained by the equivalence between the two games. Based on the properties of MSV, we derive Shapley-Bellman optimality equation (SBOE) to evaluate the optimal MSV, which corresponds to an optimal joint deterministic policy. Furthermore, we propose Shapley-Bellman operator (SBO) that is proved to solve SBOE. With a stochastic approximation and some transformations, a new MARL algorithm called Shapley Q-learning (SHAQ) is established, the implementation of which is guided by the theoretical results of SBO and MSV. We also discuss the relationship between SHAQ and relevant value factorisation methods. In the experiments, SHAQ exhibits not only superior performances on all tasks but also the interpretability that agrees with the theoretical analysis. The implementation of this paper is on https://github.com/hsvgbkhgbv/shapley-q-learning.
abstract_zh: 价值分解是全局奖励游戏中多智能体强化学习（MARL）的一种有用技术，但其基本机制尚未完全了解。本文通过沙普利价值理论研究了具有可解释性的价值分解的理论框架。我们将沙普利值推广到马尔可夫凸博弈，称为马尔可夫沙普利值（MSV），并将其用作全局奖励博弈中的价值因式分解方法，通过两个博弈之间的等价性获得。基于MSV的性质，我们推导了Shapley-Bellman最优性方程（SBOE）来评估最优MSV，它对应于最优联合确定性策略。此外，我们提出了 Shapley-Bellman 算子（SBO），它被证明可以解决 SBOE。通过随机近似和一些变换，建立了一种称为 Shapley Q 学习（SHAQ）的新 MARL 算法，其实现以 SBO 和 MSV 的理论结果为指导。我们还讨论了 SHAQ 和相关价值分解方法之间的关系。在实验中，SHAQ 不仅在所有任务上表现出优异的性能，而且具有与理论分析一致的可解释性。本文的实现位于https://github.com/hsvgbkhgbv/shapley-q-learning。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合Shapley值理论的多智能体Q学习算法SHAQ，用于解决全局奖励游戏中的价值分解问题。
AI.motivation: 现有价值分解方法的机制缺乏理论解释，而Shapley值能提供可解释性，因此需建立基于Shapley值的理论框架以提升多智能体强化学习的可解释性。
AI.method: 将Shapley值推广至马尔可夫凸游戏，提出马尔可夫Shapley值（MSV），推导Shapley-Bellman最优性方程（SBOE）及算子（SBO），结合随机逼近方法构建SHAQ算法。
AI.result: SHAQ在多个任务中表现优于现有方法，且其解释性与理论分析一致。
AI.conclusion: SHAQ通过理论与实践验证了Shapley值在多智能体强化学习中的有效性，为价值分解提供了新的可解释框架。

ai_content.result: SHAQ在多个任务中表现优于现有方法，且其解释性与理论分析一致。
ai_content.conclusion: SHAQ通过理论与实践验证了Shapley值在多智能体强化学习中的有效性，为价值分解提供了新的可解释框架。
