We also discuss the relationship between SHAQ and relevant value factorisation methods. In the experiments, SHAQ exhibits not only superior performances on all tasks but also the interpretability that agrees with the theoretical analysis. The implementation of this paper is on https://github.com/hsvgbkhgbv/shapley-q-learning. 价值分解是全局奖励游戏中多智能体强化学习（MARL）的一种有用技术，但其基本机制尚未完全了解。本文通过沙普利价值理论研究了具有可解释性的价值分解的理论框架。我们将沙普利值推广到马尔可夫凸博弈，称为马尔可夫沙普利值（MSV），并将其用作全局奖励博弈中的价值因式分解方法，通过两个博弈之间的等价性获得。基于MSV的性质，我们推导了Shapley-Bellman最优性方程（SBOE）来评估最优MSV，它对应于最优联合确定性策略。此外，我们提出了 Shapley-Bellman 算子（SBO），它被证明可以解决 SBOE。通过随机近似和一些变换，建立了一种称为 Shapley Q 学习（SHAQ）的新 MARL 算法，其实现以 SBO 和 MSV 的理论结果为指导。我们还讨论了 SHAQ 和相关价值分解方法之间的关系。在实验中，SHAQ 不仅在所有任务上表现出优异的性能，而且具有与理论分析一致的可解释性。本文的实现位于https://github.com/hsvgbkhgbv/shapley-q-learning。 本文提出了一种结合Shapley值理论的多智能体Q学习算法SHAQ，用于解决全局奖励游戏中的价值分解问题。 Jianhong Wang,Yuan Zhang,Yunjie Gu,Tae-Kyun Kim cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.MA

authors_text: Anamay Chaturvedi,Matthew Jones,Huy L. Nguyen
title: Locally Private $k$-Means Clustering with Constant Multiplicative Approximation and Near-Optimal Additive Error
title_zh: 局部私有 $k$ - 表示具有恒定乘法近似和近最优加性误差的聚类
abstract: Given a data set of size $n$ in $d'$-dimensional Euclidean space, the $k$-means problem asks for a set of $k$ points (called centers) so that the sum of the $\ell_2^2$-distances between points of a given data set of size $n$ and the set of $k$ centers is minimized. Recent work on this problem in the locally private setting achieves constant multiplicative approximation with additive error $\tilde{O} (n^{1/2 + a} \cdot k \cdot \max \{\sqrt{d}, \sqrt{k} \})$ and proves a lower bound of $Ω(\sqrt{n})$ on the additive error for any solution with a constant number of rounds. In this work we bridge the gap between the exponents of $n$ in the upper and lower bounds on the additive error with two new algorithms. Given any $α>0$, our first algorithm achieves a multiplicative approximation guarantee which is at most a $(1+α)$ factor greater than that of any non-private $k$-means clustering algorithm with $k^{\tilde{O}(1/α^2)} \sqrt{d' n} \mbox{poly}\log n$ additive error. Given any $c>\sqrt{2}$, our second algorithm achieves $O(k^{1 + \tilde{O}(1/(2c^2-1))} \sqrt{d' n} \mbox{poly} \log n)$ additive error with constant multiplicative approximation. Both algorithms go beyond the $Ω(n^{1/2 + a})$ factor that occurs in the additive error for arbitrarily small parameters $a$ in previous work, and the second algorithm in particular shows for the first time that it is possible to solve the locally private $k$-means problem in a constant number of rounds with constant factor multiplicative approximation and polynomial dependence on $k$ in the additive error arbitrarily close to linear.
summary: Given a data set of size $n$ in $d'$-dimensional Euclidean space, the $k$-means problem asks for a set of $k$ points (called centers) so that the sum of the $\ell_2^2$-distances between points of a given data set of size $n$ and the set of $k$ centers is minimized. Recent work on this problem in the locally private setting achieves constant multiplicative approximation with additive error $\tilde{O} (n^{1/2 + a} \cdot k \cdot \max \{\sqrt{d}, \sqrt{k} \})$ and proves a lower bound of $Ω(\sqrt{n})$ on the additive error for any solution with a constant number of rounds. In this work we bridge the gap between the exponents of $n$ in the upper and lower bounds on the additive error with two new algorithms. Given any $α>0$, our first algorithm achieves a multiplicative approximation guarantee which is at most a $(1+α)$ factor greater than that of any non-private $k$-means clustering algorithm with $k^{\tilde{O}(1/α^2)} \sqrt{d' n} \mbox{poly}\log n$ additive error. Given any $c>\sqrt{2}$, our second algorithm achieves $O(k^{1 + \tilde{O}(1/(2c^2-1))} \sqrt{d' n} \mbox{poly} \log n)$ additive error with constant multiplicative approximation. Both algorithms go beyond the $Ω(n^{1/2 + a})$ factor that occurs in the additive error for arbitrarily small parameters $a$ in previous work, and the second algorithm in particular shows for the first time that it is possible to solve the locally private $k$-means problem in a constant number of rounds with constant factor multiplicative approximation and polynomial dependence on $k$ in the additive error arbitrarily close to linear.
abstract_zh: 给定 $d'$ 维欧几里得空间中大小为 $n$ 的数据集，$k$-means 问题要求一组 $k$ 个点（称为中心），以便最小化大小为 $n$ 的给定数据集的点与 $k$ 中心集之间的 $\ell_2^2$ 距离之和。最近在本地私有设置中针对此问题的工作实现了具有加性误差 $\tilde{O} (n^{1/2 + a} \cdot k \cdot \max \{\sqrt{d}, \sqrt{k} \})$ 的恒定乘法近似，并证明了具有恒定轮数的任何解决方案的加性误差 $Ω(\sqrt{n})$ 的下界。在这项工作中，我们使用两种新算法弥补了加性误差上限和下限 $n$ 指数之间的差距。给定任何 $α>0$，我们的第一个算法实现了乘法近似保证，该保证最多比任何具有 $k^{\tilde{O}(1/α^2)} \sqrt{d' n} \mbox{poly}\log n$ 加性误差的非私有 $k$-means 聚类算法大 $(1+α)$ 因子。给定任何 $c>\sqrt{2}$，我们的第二个算法通过常数乘法近似实现 $O(k^{1 + \tilde{O}(1/(2c^2-1))} \sqrt{d' n} \mbox{poly} \log n)$ 加性误差。两种算法都超越了之前工作中任意小参数 $a$ 的加性误差中出现的 $Ω(n^{1/2 + a})$ 因子，特别是第二个算法首次表明，可以在恒定轮数中通过常数因子乘法逼近和任意接近线性的加性误差对 $k$ 的多项式依赖来解决局部私有 $k$-means 问题。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究在本地隐私设置下改进k-均值聚类的加法误差界，提出两种新算法以缩小现有上下界之间的差距。
AI.motivation: 现有本地隐私k-均值算法的加法误差界存在指数差距，且无法在常数轮次中实现近线性依赖k的误差。
AI.method: 设计两种新算法：第一种通过参数α控制近似因子与误差，第二种通过参数c优化加法误差，均基于局部隐私机制改进误差界。
AI.result: 两种算法均突破原有Ω(n^{1/2 +a})误差因子限制，其中第二种算法首次实现常数轮次下近似因子与k的多项式依赖误差。
AI.conclusion: 该工作填补了本地隐私k-均值聚类的误差界缺口，证明了常数轮次下可实现近似最优加法误差与常数倍近似比的可行性。

authors_text: Xiaoyu Chen,Weiming Feng,Yitong Yin,Xinyuan Zhang
title: Rapid mixing of Glauber dynamics via spectral independence for all degrees
title_zh: 通过所有程度的光谱独立性快速混合格劳伯动力学
abstract: We prove an optimal $Ω(n^{-1})$ lower bound on the spectral gap of Glauber dynamics for anti-ferromagnetic two-spin systems with $n$ vertices in the tree uniqueness regime. This spectral gap holds for all, including unbounded, maximum degree $Δ$. Consequently, we have the following mixing time bounds for the models satisfying the uniqueness condition with a slack $δ\in(0,1)$: $\bullet$ $C(δ) n^2\log n$ mixing time for the hardcore model with fugacity $λ\le (1-δ)λ_c(Δ)= (1-δ)\frac{(Δ- 1)^{Δ- 1}}{(Δ- 2)^Δ}$; $\bullet$ $C(δ) n^2$ mixing time for the Ising model with edge activity $β\in\left[\frac{Δ-2+δ}{Δ-δ},\frac{Δ-δ}{Δ-2+δ}\right]$; where the maximum degree $Δ$ may depend on the number of vertices $n$, and $C(δ)$ depends only on $δ$. Our proof is built upon the recently developed connections between the Glauber dynamics for spin systems and the high-dimensional expander walks. In particular, we prove a stronger notion of spectral independence, called the complete spectral independence, and use a novel Markov chain called the field dynamics to connect this stronger spectral independence to the rapid mixing of Glauber dynamics for all degrees.
summary: We prove an optimal $Ω(n^{-1})$ lower bound on the spectral gap of Glauber dynamics for anti-ferromagnetic two-spin systems with $n$ vertices in the tree uniqueness regime. This spectral gap holds for all, including unbounded, maximum degree $Δ$. Consequently, we have the following mixing time bounds for the models satisfying the uniqueness condition with a slack $δ\in(0,1)$: $\bullet$ $C(δ) n^2\log n$ mixing time for the hardcore model with fugacity $λ\le (1-δ)λ_c(Δ)= (1-δ)\frac{(Δ- 1)^{Δ- 1}}{(Δ- 2)^Δ}$; $\bullet$ $C(δ) n^2$ mixing time for the Ising model with edge activity $β\in\left[\frac{Δ-2+δ}{Δ-δ},\frac{Δ-δ}{Δ-2+δ}\right]$; where the maximum degree $Δ$ may depend on the number of vertices $n$, and $C(δ)$ depends only on $δ$. Our proof is built upon the recently developed connections between the Glauber dynamics for spin systems and the high-dimensional expander walks. In particular, we prove a stronger notion of spectral independence, called the complete spectral independence, and use a novel Markov chain called the field dynamics to connect this stronger spectral independence to the rapid mixing of Glauber dynamics for all degrees.
abstract_zh: 我们证明了树唯一性状态下具有 $n$ 顶点的反铁磁双自旋系统的格劳伯动力学谱间隙的最佳 $Ω(n^{-1})$ 下界。该光谱间隙适用于所有情况，包括无界的最大程度$Δ$。因此，对于满足松弛 $δ\in(0,1)$ 唯一性条件的模型，我们有以下混合时间界限： $\bullet$ $C(δ) n^2\log n$ 具有逸度的硬核模型的混合时间 $λ\le (1-δ)λ_c(Δ)= (1-δ)\frac{(Δ- 1)^{Δ- 1}}{(Δ- 2)^Δ}$； $\bullet$ $C(δ) n^2$ 具有边缘活动的 Ising 模型的混合时间 $β\in\left[\frac{Δ-2+δ}{Δ-δ},\frac{Δ-δ}{Δ-2+δ}\right]$;其中最大度 $Δ$ 可能取决于顶点 $n$ 的数量，而 $C(δ)$ 仅取决于 $δ$。我们的证明是建立在最近开发的自旋系统格劳伯动力学与高维膨胀机游走之间的联系之上的。特别是，我们证明了一种更强的谱独立性概念，称为完全谱独立性，并使用一种称为场动力学的新型马尔可夫链将这种更强的谱独立性与所有程度的格劳伯动力学的快速混合联系起来。

AI.tldr: 本文通过谱独立性证明了反铁磁二自旋系统Glauber动力学的谱隙下界，并推导了满足唯一性条件的模型的混合时间界。
AI.motivation: 研究反铁磁自旋系统的Glauber动力学混合时间，对理解统计物理模型的高效采样和计算复杂性具有重要意义。
AI.method: 基于高维展开者游走与自旋系统Glauber动力学的联系，提出强谱独立性概念，并引入场动力学马尔可夫链建立理论关联。
AI.result: 在树唯一性区域内，首次为所有度数（包括无界度）证明了Ω(n⁻¹)谱隙下界，推导出硬核模型和伊辛模型的多项式混合时间界。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过强谱独立性理论突破了传统度数限制，为分析广义自旋系统的快速混合提供了统一框架。

Consequently, we have the following mixing time bounds for the models satisfying the uniqueness condition with a slack $δ\in(0,1)$: $\bullet$ $C(δ) n^2\log n$ mixing time for the hardcore model with fugacity $λ\le (1-δ)λ_c(Δ)= (1-δ)\frac{(Δ- 1)^{Δ- 1}}{(Δ- 2)^Δ}$; $\bullet$ $C(δ) n^2$ mixing time for the Ising model with edge activity $β\in\left[\frac{Δ-2+δ}{Δ-δ},\frac{Δ-δ}{Δ-2+δ}\right]$; where the maximum degree $Δ$ may depend on the number of vertices $n$, and $C(δ)$ depends only on $δ$. Our proof is built upon the recently developed connections between the Glauber dynamics for spin systems and the high-dimensional expander walks. In particular, we prove a stronger notion of spectral independence, called the complete spectral independence, and use a novel Markov chain called the field dynamics to connect this stronger spectral independence to the rapid mixing of Glauber dynamics for all degrees. 我们证明了树唯一性状态下具有 $n$ 顶点的反铁磁双自旋系统的格劳伯动力学谱间隙的最佳 $Ω(n^{-1})$ 下界。该光谱间隙适用于所有情况，包括无界的最大程度$Δ$。因此，对于满足松弛 $δ\in(0,1)$ 唯一性条件的模型，我们有以下混合时间界限： $\bullet$ $C(δ) n^2\log n$ 具有逸度的硬核模型的混合时间 $λ\le (1-δ)λ_c(Δ)= (1-δ)\frac{(Δ- 1)^{Δ- 1}}{(Δ- 2)^Δ}$； $\bullet$ $C(δ) n^2$ 具有边缘活动的 Ising 模型的混合时间 $β\in\left[\frac{Δ-2+δ}{Δ-δ},\frac{Δ-δ}{Δ-2+δ}\right]$;其中最大度 $Δ$ 可能取决于顶点 $n$ 的数量，而 $C(δ)$ 仅取决于 $δ$。我们的证明是建立在最近开发的自旋系统格劳伯动力学与高维膨胀机游走之间的联系之上的。特别是，我们证明了一种更强的谱独立性概念，称为完全谱独立性，并使用一种称为场动力学的新型马尔可夫链将这种更强的谱独立性与所有程度的格劳伯动力学的快速混合联系起来。 本文通过谱独立性证明了反铁磁二自旋系统Glauber动力学的谱隙下界，并推导了满足唯一性条件的模型的混合时间界。 Xiaoyu Chen,Weiming Feng,Yitong Yin,Xinyuan Zhang cs.DS,math-ph,math.PR

authors_text: Andrey Bokovoy,Kirill Muravyev,Konstantin Yakovlev
title: MAOMaps: A Photo-Realistic Benchmark For vSLAM and Map Merging Quality Assessment
title_zh: MAOMaps：vSLAM 和地图合并质量评估的逼真基准
abstract: Running numerous experiments in simulation is a necessary step before deploying a control system on a real robot. In this paper we introduce a novel benchmark that is aimed at quantitatively evaluating the quality of vision-based simultaneous localization and mapping (vSLAM) and map merging algorithms. The benchmark consists of both a dataset and a set of tools for automatic evaluation. The dataset is photo-realistic and provides both the localization and the map ground truth data. This makes it possible to evaluate not only the localization part of the SLAM pipeline but the mapping part as well. To compare the vSLAM-built maps and the ground-truth ones we introduce a novel way to find correspondences between them that takes the SLAM context into account (as opposed to other approaches like nearest neighbors). The benchmark is ROS-compatable and is open-sourced to the community. The data and the code are available at: \texttt{github.com/CnnDepth/MAOMaps}.
summary: Running numerous experiments in simulation is a necessary step before deploying a control system on a real robot. In this paper we introduce a novel benchmark that is aimed at quantitatively evaluating the quality of vision-based simultaneous localization and mapping (vSLAM) and map merging algorithms. The benchmark consists of both a dataset and a set of tools for automatic evaluation. The dataset is photo-realistic and provides both the localization and the map ground truth data. This makes it possible to evaluate not only the localization part of the SLAM pipeline but the mapping part as well. To compare the vSLAM-built maps and the ground-truth ones we introduce a novel way to find correspondences between them that takes the SLAM context into account (as opposed to other approaches like nearest neighbors). The benchmark is ROS-compatable and is open-sourced to the community. The data and the code are available at: \texttt{github.com/CnnDepth/MAOMaps}.
abstract_zh: 在真实机器人上部署控制系统之前，进行大量模拟实验是必要的步骤。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的基准，旨在定量评估基于视觉的同步定位与建图（vSLAM）和地图合并算法的质量。该基准由数据集和一组用于自动评估的工具组成。该数据集非常逼真，并提供定位和地图地面实况数据。这使得不仅可以评估 SLAM 管道的定位部分，还可以评估建图部分。为了比较 vSLAM 构建的地图和真实地图，我们引入了一种新颖的方法来查找它们之间的对应关系，该方法考虑了 SLAM 上下文（与最近邻居等其他方法相反）。该基准测试与 ROS 兼容，并向社区开源。数据和代码可在以下位置获取：\texttt{github.com/CnnDepth/MAOMaps}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MAOMaps基准，用于定量评估视觉SLAM和地图合并算法的质量，包含写实数据集及自动评估工具。
AI.motivation: 现有SLAM评估方法难以全面衡量定位与地图质量，且缺乏考虑SLAM上下文的对应算法，需构建更有效的基准工具。
AI.method: 构建包含真实定位与地图数据的写实数据集，设计基于SLAM上下文的对应算法，开发ROS兼容的自动评估工具并开源。
AI.result: 基准可准确评估SLAM算法的定位与地图质量，提供定量分析，促进算法优化与社区应用。
AI.conclusion: MAOMaps为SLAM研究提供标准化评估工具，推动算法改进与领域发展，开源实现便于社区协作验证。

authors_text: Henry Bradler,Adrian Kretz,Rudolf Mester
title: Urban Traffic Surveillance (UTS): A fully probabilistic 3D tracking approach based on 2D detections
title_zh: 城市交通监控 (UTS)：基于 2D 检测的完全概率 3D 跟踪方法
comment: Accepted at the 2021 IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium (IV), Nagoya, Japan, July 11-17, 2021
comments: Accepted at the 2021 IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium (IV), Nagoya, Japan, July 11-17, 2021
abstract: Urban Traffic Surveillance (UTS) is a surveillance system based on a monocular and calibrated video camera that detects vehicles in an urban traffic scenario with dense traffic on multiple lanes and vehicles performing sharp turning maneuvers. UTS then tracks the vehicles using a 3D bounding box representation and a physically reasonable 3D motion model relying on an unscented Kalman filter based approach. Since UTS recovers positions, shape and motion information in a three-dimensional world coordinate system, it can be employed to recognize diverse traffic violations or to supply intelligent vehicles with valuable traffic information. We build on YOLOv3 as a detector yielding 2D bounding boxes and class labels for each vehicle. A 2D detector renders our system much more independent to different camera perspectives as a variety of labeled training data is available. This allows for a good generalization while also being more hardware efficient. The task of 3D tracking based on 2D detections is supported by integrating class specific prior knowledge about the vehicle shape. We quantitatively evaluate UTS using self generated synthetic data and ground truth from the CARLA simulator, due to the non-existence of datasets with an urban vehicle surveillance setting and labeled 3D bounding boxes. Additionally, we give a qualitative impression of how UTS performs on real-world data. Our implementation is capable of operating in real time on a reasonably modern workstation. To the best of our knowledge, UTS is to date the only 3D vehicle tracking system in a surveillance scenario (static camera observing moving targets).
summary: Urban Traffic Surveillance (UTS) is a surveillance system based on a monocular and calibrated video camera that detects vehicles in an urban traffic scenario with dense traffic on multiple lanes and vehicles performing sharp turning maneuvers. UTS then tracks the vehicles using a 3D bounding box representation and a physically reasonable 3D motion model relying on an unscented Kalman filter based approach. Since UTS recovers positions, shape and motion information in a three-dimensional world coordinate system, it can be employed to recognize diverse traffic violations or to supply intelligent vehicles with valuable traffic information. We build on YOLOv3 as a detector yielding 2D bounding boxes and class labels for each vehicle. A 2D detector renders our system much more independent to different camera perspectives as a variety of labeled training data is available. This allows for a good generalization while also being more hardware efficient. The task of 3D tracking based on 2D detections is supported by integrating class specific prior knowledge about the vehicle shape. We quantitatively evaluate UTS using self generated synthetic data and ground truth from the CARLA simulator, due to the non-existence of datasets with an urban vehicle surveillance setting and labeled 3D bounding boxes. Additionally, we give a qualitative impression of how UTS performs on real-world data. Our implementation is capable of operating in real time on a reasonably modern workstation. To the best of our knowledge, UTS is to date the only 3D vehicle tracking system in a surveillance scenario (static camera observing moving targets).
abstract_zh: 城市交通监控（UTS）是一种基于单目和校准摄像机的监控系统，可检测城市交通场景中多车道交通密集和车辆进行急转弯的车辆。然后，UTS 使用 3D 边界框表示和物理上合理的 3D 运动模型（依赖于基于无味卡尔曼滤波器的方法）来跟踪车辆。由于UTS在三维世界坐标系中恢复位置、形状和运动信息，因此可用于识别各种交通违规行为或为智能车辆提供有价值的交通信息。我们基于 YOLOv3 作为检测器，为每辆车生成 2D 边界框和类别标签。由于可以获得各种标记的训练数据，2D 探测器使我们的系统更加独立于不同的相机视角。这可以实现良好的泛化，同时也提高硬件效率。通过集成有关车辆形状的特定类别先验知识来支持基于 2D 检测的 3D 跟踪任务。由于不存在具有城市车辆监控设置和标记的 3D 边界框的数据集，我们使用来自 CARLA 模拟器的自生成合成数据和地面实况来定量评估 UTS。此外，我们还对 UTS 在现实世界数据上的表现给出了定性的印象。我们的实现能够在相当现代化的工作站上实时运行。据我们所知，UTS 是迄今为止唯一适用于监控场景（静态摄像机观察移动目标）的 3D 车辆跟踪系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于单目摄像头和2D检测的3D车辆跟踪系统UTS，用于城市交通监控场景。
AI.motivation: 现有系统缺乏适用于城市多车道密集交通场景的3D跟踪方案，且需处理急转弯等复杂运动，同时需要硬件高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 结合YOLOv3进行2D检测，利用无味卡尔曼滤波器构建物理合理的3D运动模型，并融合车辆形状先验知识实现3D跟踪。
AI.result: 系统在CARLA仿真数据和合成数据集上验证有效，可在现代工作站实现实时运行，是首个静态摄像头下的3D车辆跟踪系统。
AI.conclusion: UTS通过2D到3D的转换有效解决了城市交通监控中的复杂跟踪问题，为智能交通提供了新方法。

authors_text: Mohammad Eslami,Solale Tabarestani,Malek Adjouadi
title: Feasibility Assessment of Multitasking in MRI Neuroimaging Analysis: Tissue Segmentation, Cross-Modality Conversion and Bias correction
title_zh: MRI 神经影像分析中多任务处理的可行性评估：组织分割、跨模态转换和偏差校正
abstract: Neuroimaging is essential in brain studies for the diagnosis and identification of disease, structure, and function of the brain in its healthy and disease states. Literature shows that there are advantages of multitasking with some deep learning (DL) schemes in challenging neuroimaging applications. This study examines the feasibility of using multitasking in three different applications, including tissue segmentation, cross-modality conversion, and bias-field correction. These applications reflect five different scenarios in which multitasking is explored and 280 training and testing sessions conducted for empirical evaluations. Two well-known networks, U-Net as a well-known convolutional neural network architecture, and a closed architecture based on the conditional generative adversarial network are implemented. Different metrics such as the normalized cross-correlation coefficient and Dice scores are used for comparison of methods and results of the different experiments. Statistical analysis is also provided by paired t-test. The present study explores the pros and cons of these methods and their practical impacts on multitasking in different implementation scenarios. This investigation shows that bias correction and cross-modality conversion applications are significantly easier than the segmentation application, and having multitasking with segmentation is not reasonable if one of them is identified as the main target application. However, when the main application is the segmentation of tissues, multitasking with cross-modality conversion is beneficial, especially for the U-net architecture.
summary: Neuroimaging is essential in brain studies for the diagnosis and identification of disease, structure, and function of the brain in its healthy and disease states. Literature shows that there are advantages of multitasking with some deep learning (DL) schemes in challenging neuroimaging applications. This study examines the feasibility of using multitasking in three different applications, including tissue segmentation, cross-modality conversion, and bias-field correction. These applications reflect five different scenarios in which multitasking is explored and 280 training and testing sessions conducted for empirical evaluations. Two well-known networks, U-Net as a well-known convolutional neural network architecture, and a closed architecture based on the conditional generative adversarial network are implemented. Different metrics such as the normalized cross-correlation coefficient and Dice scores are used for comparison of methods and results of the different experiments. Statistical analysis is also provided by paired t-test. The present study explores the pros and cons of these methods and their practical impacts on multitasking in different implementation scenarios. This investigation shows that bias correction and cross-modality conversion applications are significantly easier than the segmentation application, and having multitasking with segmentation is not reasonable if one of them is identified as the main target application. However, when the main application is the segmentation of tissues, multitasking with cross-modality conversion is beneficial, especially for the U-net architecture.
abstract_zh: 神经影像学对于诊断和识别健康和疾病状态下大脑的疾病、结构和功能的大脑研究至关重要。文献表明，在具有挑战性的神经影像应用中，一些深度学习 (DL) 方案的多任务处理具有优势。本研究探讨了在三种不同应用中使用多任务处理的可行性，包括组织分割、跨模态转换和偏置场校正。这些应用程序反映了五种不同的场景，其中探索了多任务处理，并进行了 280 次培训和测试课程以进行实证评估。实现了两个著名的网络，U-Net 作为众所周知的卷积神经网络架构，以及基于条件生成对抗网络的封闭架构。使用不同的指标（例如归一化互相关系数和 Dice 分数）来比较不同实验的方法和结果。配对 t 检验也提供统计分析。本研究探讨了这些方法的优缺点及其对不同实施场景中多任务处理的实际影响。这项调查表明，偏差校正和跨模态转换应用程序比分割应用程序要容易得多，并且如果其中一个被确定为主要目标应用程序，则具有分割的多任务处理是不合理的。然而，当主要应用是组织分割时，具有跨模态转换的多任务处理是有益的，特别是对于 U-net 架构。

AI.tldr: 评估多任务学习在MRI神经影像分析中的可行性，包括组织分割、跨模态转换和偏置校正。
AI.motivation: 探索多任务深度学习在神经影像分析中的优势，解决单一任务处理的局限性，并优化多任务组合的实用性。
AI.method: 采用U-Net和条件生成对抗网络（cGAN）架构，通过280次训练/测试会话进行实验，使用Dice分数和归一化互相关系数等指标对比方法，结合配对t检验进行统计分析。
AI.result: 偏置校正和跨模态转换任务比组织分割更易处理；当分割为主任务时，与跨模态转换多任务结合对U-Net有益，但与其他任务多任务结合效果不佳。
AI.conclusion: 多任务学习在神经影像分析中效果因任务组合而异，需根据主任务选择合适的多任务策略以提升性能。

authors_text: Xin Zhang,Guangwei Xu,Yueheng Sun,Meishan Zhang,Pengjun Xie
title: Crowdsourcing Learning as Domain Adaptation: A Case Study on Named Entity Recognition
title_zh: 众包学习作为领域适应：命名实体识别案例研究
comment: ACL-IJCNLP 2021 main conf, long paper; corrected the wrong reference for "argument retrieval" in first paragraph of Introduction
comments: ACL-IJCNLP 2021 main conf, long paper; corrected the wrong reference for "argument retrieval" in first paragraph of Introduction
abstract: Crowdsourcing is regarded as one prospective solution for effective supervised learning, aiming to build large-scale annotated training data by crowd workers. Previous studies focus on reducing the influences from the noises of the crowdsourced annotations for supervised models. We take a different point in this work, regarding all crowdsourced annotations as gold-standard with respect to the individual annotators. In this way, we find that crowdsourcing could be highly similar to domain adaptation, and then the recent advances of cross-domain methods can be almost directly applied to crowdsourcing. Here we take named entity recognition (NER) as a study case, suggesting an annotator-aware representation learning model that inspired by the domain adaptation methods which attempt to capture effective domain-aware features. We investigate both unsupervised and supervised crowdsourcing learning, assuming that no or only small-scale expert annotations are available. Experimental results on a benchmark crowdsourced NER dataset show that our method is highly effective, leading to a new state-of-the-art performance. In addition, under the supervised setting, we can achieve impressive performance gains with only a very small scale of expert annotations.
summary: Crowdsourcing is regarded as one prospective solution for effective supervised learning, aiming to build large-scale annotated training data by crowd workers. Previous studies focus on reducing the influences from the noises of the crowdsourced annotations for supervised models. We take a different point in this work, regarding all crowdsourced annotations as gold-standard with respect to the individual annotators. In this way, we find that crowdsourcing could be highly similar to domain adaptation, and then the recent advances of cross-domain methods can be almost directly applied to crowdsourcing. Here we take named entity recognition (NER) as a study case, suggesting an annotator-aware representation learning model that inspired by the domain adaptation methods which attempt to capture effective domain-aware features. We investigate both unsupervised and supervised crowdsourcing learning, assuming that no or only small-scale expert annotations are available. Experimental results on a benchmark crowdsourced NER dataset show that our method is highly effective, leading to a new state-of-the-art performance. In addition, under the supervised setting, we can achieve impressive performance gains with only a very small scale of expert annotations.
abstract_zh: 众包被认为是有效监督学习的一种前瞻性解决方案，旨在由众包工作者构建大规模带注释的训练数据。先前的研究重点是减少众包注释噪声对监督模型的影响。我们在这项工作中采取了不同的观点，将所有众包注释视为相对于个体注释者的黄金标准。这样，我们发现众包可能与领域适应高度相似，那么跨域方法的最新进展几乎可以直接应用于众包。在这里，我们以命名实体识别（NER）作为研究案例，提出了一种注释器感知的表示学习模型，该模型受到领域适应方法的启发，试图捕获有效的领域感知特征。我们研究了无监督和有监督的众包学习，假设没有或只有小规模的专家注释可用。在基准众包 NER 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的方法非常有效，带来了新的最先进的性能。此外，在监督设置下，我们只需很小规模的专家注释就可以获得令人印象深刻的性能提升。

AI.tldr: 本文将众包学习视为领域自适应问题，通过命名实体识别（NER）案例研究，提出了一种注释者感知的表示学习模型。
AI.motivation: 传统众包学习研究侧重于减少标注噪声的影响，而本文认为每个注释者的标注均可视为黄金标准，从而将众包学习与领域自适应框架结合，利用跨领域方法提升模型性能。
AI.method: 提出基于领域自适应的注释者感知表示学习模型，分别研究无监督和监督众包学习场景，假设仅有少量专家标注或无专家标注。
AI.result: 在基准众包NER数据集上达到新状态-of-the-art性能，尤其在少量专家标注条件下表现显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 领域自适应方法可有效解决众包学习问题，为低资源场景下的NER任务提供新思路。

authors_text: Ting Liu,Jungang Yang,Boyang Li,Chao Xiao,Yang Sun,Yingqian Wang,Wei An
title: Non-Convex Tensor Low-Rank Approximation for Infrared Small Target Detection
title_zh: 红外小目标检测的非凸张量低阶逼近
comment: This paper is accepted by IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing
comments: This paper is accepted by IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing
abstract: Infrared small target detection is an important fundamental task in the infrared system. Therefore, many infrared small target detection methods have been proposed, in which the low-rank model has been used as a powerful tool. However, most low-rank-based methods assign the same weights for different singular values, which will lead to inaccurate background estimation. Considering that different singular values have different importance and should be treated discriminatively, in this paper, we propose a non-convex tensor low-rank approximation (NTLA) method for infrared small target detection. In our method, NTLA regularization adaptively assigns different weights to different singular values for accurate background estimation. Based on the proposed NTLA, we propose asymmetric spatial-temporal total variation (ASTTV) regularization to achieve more accurate background estimation in complex scenes. Compared with the traditional total variation approach, ASTTV exploits different smoothness intensities for spatial and temporal regularization. We design an efficient algorithm to find the optimal solution of our method. Compared with some state-of-the-art methods, the proposed method achieves an improvement in terms of various evaluation metrics. Extensive experimental results in various complex scenes demonstrate that our method has strong robustness and low false-alarm rate. Code is available at https://github.com/LiuTing20a/ASTTV-NTLA.
summary: Infrared small target detection is an important fundamental task in the infrared system. Therefore, many infrared small target detection methods have been proposed, in which the low-rank model has been used as a powerful tool. However, most low-rank-based methods assign the same weights for different singular values, which will lead to inaccurate background estimation. Considering that different singular values have different importance and should be treated discriminatively, in this paper, we propose a non-convex tensor low-rank approximation (NTLA) method for infrared small target detection. In our method, NTLA regularization adaptively assigns different weights to different singular values for accurate background estimation. Based on the proposed NTLA, we propose asymmetric spatial-temporal total variation (ASTTV) regularization to achieve more accurate background estimation in complex scenes. Compared with the traditional total variation approach, ASTTV exploits different smoothness intensities for spatial and temporal regularization. We design an efficient algorithm to find the optimal solution of our method. Compared with some state-of-the-art methods, the proposed method achieves an improvement in terms of various evaluation metrics. Extensive experimental results in various complex scenes demonstrate that our method has strong robustness and low false-alarm rate. Code is available at https://github.com/LiuTing20a/ASTTV-NTLA.
abstract_zh: 红外小目标检测是红外系统的一项重要基础任务。因此，许多红外小目标检测方法被提出，其中低秩模型被用作有力的工具。然而，大多数基于低秩的方法为不同的奇异值分配相同的权重，这将导致背景估计不准确。考虑到不同的奇异值具有不同的重要性并且应该区别对待，本文提出了一种用于红外小目标检测的非凸张量低秩近似（NTLA）方法。在我们的方法中，NTLA 正则化自适应地将不同的权重分配给不同的奇异值，以实现准确的背景估计。基于所提出的 NTLA，我们提出了非对称时空全变分（ASTTV）正则化，以在复杂场景中实现更准确的背景估计。与传统的全变分方法相比，ASTTV 利用不同的平滑强度进行空间和时间正则化。我们设计了一种有效的算法来找到我们方法的最佳解决方案。与一些最先进的方法相比，所提出的方法在各种评估指标方面都取得了改进。在各种复杂场景中的大量实验结果表明，我们的方法具有很强的鲁棒性和低误报率。代码可在 https://github.com/LiuTing20a/ASTTV-NTLA 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种非凸张量低秩逼近方法（NTLA）用于红外小目标检测，通过自适应权重分配和时空正则化提升背景估计精度。
AI.motivation: 传统低秩方法对不同奇异值采用相同权重，导致复杂场景下背景估计不准确，需区分奇异值重要性以提高检测性能。
AI.method: 设计NTLA正则化自适应分配奇异值权重，并结合非对称时空总变分（ASTTV）正则化，通过高效算法求解最优解。
AI.result: 在多种复杂场景下实验表明，该方法在检测精度、鲁棒性和误报率等指标上优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的NTLA-ASTTV方法有效提升了红外小目标检测性能，代码已开源供验证。

search_text: Non-Convex Tensor Low-Rank Approximation for Infrared Small Target Detection 红外小目标检测的非凸张量低阶逼近 Infrared small target detection is an important fundamental task in the infrared system. Therefore, many infrared small target detection methods have been proposed, in which the low-rank model has been used as a powerful tool. However, most low-rank-based methods assign the same weights for different singular values, which will lead to inaccurate background estimation. Considering that different singular values have different importance and should be treated discriminatively, in this paper, we propose a non-convex tensor low-rank approximation (NTLA) method for infrared small target detection. In our method, NTLA regularization adaptively assigns different weights to different singular values for accurate background estimation. Based on the proposed NTLA, we propose asymmetric spatial-temporal total variation (ASTTV) regularization to achieve more accurate background estimation in complex scenes. Compared with the traditional total variation approach, ASTTV exploits different smoothness intensities for spatial and temporal regularization. We design an efficient algorithm to find the optimal solution of our method. Compared with some state-of-the-art methods, the proposed method achieves an improvement in terms of various evaluation metrics. Extensive experimental results in various complex scenes demonstrate that our method has strong robustness and low false-alarm rate. Code is available at https://github.com/LiuTing20a/ASTTV-NTLA. 红外小目标检测是红外系统的一项重要基础任务。因此，许多红外小目标检测方法被提出，其中低秩模型被用作有力的工具。然而，大多数基于低秩的方法为不同的奇异值分配相同的权重，这将导致背景估计不准确。考虑到不同的奇异值具有不同的重要性并且应该区别对待，本文提出了一种用于红外小目标检测的非凸张量低秩近似（NTLA）方法。在我们的方法中，NTLA 正则化自适应地将不同的权重分配给不同的奇异值，以实现准确的背景估计。基于所提出的 NTLA，我们提出了非对称时空全变分（ASTTV）正则化，以在复杂场景中实现更准确的背景估计。与传统的全变分方法相比，ASTTV 利用不同的平滑强度进行空间和时间正则化。我们设计了一种有效的算法来找到我们方法的最佳解决方案。与一些最先进的方法相比，所提出的方法在各种评估指标方面都取得了改进。在各种复杂场景中的大量实验结果表明，我们的方法具有很强的鲁棒性和低误报率。代码可在 https://github.com/LiuTing20a/ASTTV-NTLA 获取。 本文提出一种非凸张量低秩逼近方法（NTLA）用于红外小目标检测，通过自适应权重分配和时空正则化提升背景估计精度。 Ting Liu,Jungang Yang,Boyang Li,Chao Xiao,Yang Sun,Yingqian Wang,Wei An cs.CV

authors_text: Yi Xu,Minyi Zhao,Jing Liu,Xinjian Zhang,Longwen Gao,Shuigeng Zhou,Huyang Sun
title: Boosting the Performance of Video Compression Artifact Reduction with Reference Frame Proposals and Frequency Domain Information
title_zh: 利用参考帧建议和频域信息提高视频压缩伪影减少的性能
abstract: Many deep learning based video compression artifact removal algorithms have been proposed to recover high-quality videos from low-quality compressed videos. Recently, methods were proposed to mine spatiotemporal information via utilizing multiple neighboring frames as reference frames. However, these post-processing methods take advantage of adjacent frames directly, but neglect the information of the video itself, which can be exploited. In this paper, we propose an effective reference frame proposal strategy to boost the performance of the existing multi-frame approaches. Besides, we introduce a loss based on fast Fourier transformation~(FFT) to further improve the effectiveness of restoration. Experimental results show that our method achieves better fidelity and perceptual performance on MFQE 2.0 dataset than the state-of-the-art methods. And our method won Track 1 and Track 2, and was ranked the 2nd in Track 3 of NTIRE 2021 Quality enhancement of heavily compressed videos Challenge.
summary: Many deep learning based video compression artifact removal algorithms have been proposed to recover high-quality videos from low-quality compressed videos. Recently, methods were proposed to mine spatiotemporal information via utilizing multiple neighboring frames as reference frames. However, these post-processing methods take advantage of adjacent frames directly, but neglect the information of the video itself, which can be exploited. In this paper, we propose an effective reference frame proposal strategy to boost the performance of the existing multi-frame approaches. Besides, we introduce a loss based on fast Fourier transformation~(FFT) to further improve the effectiveness of restoration. Experimental results show that our method achieves better fidelity and perceptual performance on MFQE 2.0 dataset than the state-of-the-art methods. And our method won Track 1 and Track 2, and was ranked the 2nd in Track 3 of NTIRE 2021 Quality enhancement of heavily compressed videos Challenge.
abstract_zh: 已经提出了许多基于深度学习的视频压缩伪影去除算法来从低质量压缩视频中恢复高质量视频。最近，提出了利用多个相邻帧作为参考帧来挖掘时空信息的方法。然而，这些后处理方法直接利用相邻帧，却忽略了视频本身可以利用的信息。在本文中，我们提出了一种有效的参考帧提议策略，以提高现有多帧方法的性能。此外，我们引入了基于快速傅里叶变换（FFT）的损失来进一步提高恢复的有效性。实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法在 MFQE 2.0 数据集上实现了更好的保真度和感知性能。我们的方法赢得了 NTIRE 2021 高压缩视频质量增强挑战赛的 Track 1 和 Track 2，并在 Track 3 中排名第二。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合参考帧提案和频域信息的方法，提升视频压缩伪影去除效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅利用相邻帧信息，忽视视频自身特征，导致修复效果受限。
AI.method: 设计参考帧提案策略选择最优参考帧，并引入基于快速傅里叶变换（FFT）的损失函数增强频域信息利用。
AI.result: 在MFQE 2.0数据集上取得更优的保真度和感知质量，NTIRE 2021挑战赛中包揽Track 1/2冠军并获Track 3亚军。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合优化时空信息与频域特征，有效提升了重度压缩视频的质量增强性能。

authors_text: Vinícius L. de Lima,Manuel Iori,Flávio K. Miyazawa
title: Exact solution of network flow models with strong relaxations
title_zh: 强松弛网络流模型的精确解
abstract: We address the solution of Mixed Integer Linear Programming (MILP) models with strong relaxations that are derived from Dantzig-Wolfe decompositions and allow a pseudo-polynomial pricing algorithm. We exploit their network-flow characterization and provide a framework based on column generation, reduced-cost variable-fixing, and a highly asymmetric branching scheme that allows us to take advantage of the potential of the current MILP solvers. We apply our framework to a variety of cutting and packing problems from the literature. The efficiency of the framework is proved by extensive computational experiments, in which a significant number of open instances could be solved to proven optimality for the first time.
summary: We address the solution of Mixed Integer Linear Programming (MILP) models with strong relaxations that are derived from Dantzig-Wolfe decompositions and allow a pseudo-polynomial pricing algorithm. We exploit their network-flow characterization and provide a framework based on column generation, reduced-cost variable-fixing, and a highly asymmetric branching scheme that allows us to take advantage of the potential of the current MILP solvers. We apply our framework to a variety of cutting and packing problems from the literature. The efficiency of the framework is proved by extensive computational experiments, in which a significant number of open instances could be solved to proven optimality for the first time.
abstract_zh: 我们解决了具有强松弛的混合整数线性规划 (MILP) 模型的解决方案，这些模型源自 Dantzig-Wolfe 分解并允许伪多项式定价算法。我们利用它们的网络流表征，并提供一个基于列生成、降低成本的变量固定和高度不对称分支方案的框架，使我们能够利用当前 MILP 求解器的潜力。我们将我们的框架应用于文献中的各种切割和包装问题。该框架的效率通过大量的计算实验得到了证明，其中首次解决了大量开放实例以证明最优性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于网络流特征的框架，用于求解具有强松弛的混合整数线性规划模型。
AI.motivation: 现有MILP求解器在处理通过Dantzig-Wolfe分解得到的强松弛模型时效率不足，需开发更高效的求解框架。
AI.method: 结合列生成、约简成本变量固定及高度不对称分支策略，利用网络流特性构建求解框架。
AI.result: 在多个切割与包装问题上通过计算实验验证，首次证明了大量开放实例的最优解。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效提升了MILP求解器对强松弛模型的处理能力，为相关问题提供了新方法。

authors_text: Yuan Gan,Yawei Luo,Xin Yu,Bang Zhang,Yi Yang
title: VidFace: A Full-Transformer Solver for Video FaceHallucination with Unaligned Tiny Snapshots
title_zh: VidFace：具有未对齐微小快照的视频脸部幻觉的全变形求解器
abstract: In this paper, we investigate the task of hallucinating an authentic high-resolution (HR) human face from multiple low-resolution (LR) video snapshots. We propose a pure transformer-based model, dubbed VidFace, to fully exploit the full-range spatio-temporal information and facial structure cues among multiple thumbnails. Specifically, VidFace handles multiple snapshots all at once and harnesses the spatial and temporal information integrally to explore face alignments across all the frames, thus avoiding accumulating alignment errors. Moreover, we design a recurrent position embedding module to equip our transformer with facial priors, which not only effectively regularises the alignment mechanism but also supplants notorious pre-training. Finally, we curate a new large-scale video face hallucination dataset from the public Voxceleb2 benchmark, which challenges prior arts on tackling unaligned and tiny face snapshots. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first attempt to develop a unified transformer-based solver tailored for video-based face hallucination. Extensive experiments on public video face benchmarks show that the proposed method significantly outperforms the state of the arts.
summary: In this paper, we investigate the task of hallucinating an authentic high-resolution (HR) human face from multiple low-resolution (LR) video snapshots. We propose a pure transformer-based model, dubbed VidFace, to fully exploit the full-range spatio-temporal information and facial structure cues among multiple thumbnails. Specifically, VidFace handles multiple snapshots all at once and harnesses the spatial and temporal information integrally to explore face alignments across all the frames, thus avoiding accumulating alignment errors. Moreover, we design a recurrent position embedding module to equip our transformer with facial priors, which not only effectively regularises the alignment mechanism but also supplants notorious pre-training. Finally, we curate a new large-scale video face hallucination dataset from the public Voxceleb2 benchmark, which challenges prior arts on tackling unaligned and tiny face snapshots. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first attempt to develop a unified transformer-based solver tailored for video-based face hallucination. Extensive experiments on public video face benchmarks show that the proposed method significantly outperforms the state of the arts.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了从多个低分辨率（LR）视频快照中产生真实高分辨率（HR）人脸幻觉的任务。我们提出了一种纯粹的基于 Transformer 的模型，称为 VidFace，以充分利用多个缩略图中的全方位时空信息和面部结构线索。具体来说，VidFace 可以同时处理多个快照，并综合利用空间和时间信息来探索所有帧中的面部对齐，从而避免累积对齐错误。此外，我们设计了一个循环位置嵌入模块，为我们的变压器配备面部先验，这不仅有效地规范了对齐机制，而且还取代了臭名昭著的预训练。最后，我们从公共 Voxceleb2 基准中策划了一个新的大规模视频人脸幻觉数据集，该数据集挑战了处理未对齐和微小人脸快照的现有技术。据我们所知，我们是第一个尝试开发针对基于视频的面部幻觉的统一的基于变压器的解算器。对公共视频人脸基准的大量实验表明，所提出的方法明显优于现有技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VidFace模型，通过全Transformer架构从多个低分辨率视频快照中生成高分辨率人脸。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理未对齐且小尺寸的视频人脸快照时存在对齐误差累积和预训练依赖问题。
AI.method: 设计纯Transformer模型VidFace，整合多帧时空信息并采用递归位置嵌入模块，无需传统预训练。
AI.result: 在Voxceleb2数据集上显著优于现有算法，首次实现视频人脸超分辨率的统一Transformer求解。
AI.conclusion: VidFace通过端到端时空信息整合和面部先验建模，为视频人脸超分辨率任务提供了新范式。

authors_text: Bahjat Kawar,Gregory Vaksman,Michael Elad
title: SNIPS: Solving Noisy Inverse Problems Stochastically
title_zh: SNIPS：随机解决噪声逆问题
comment: Thirty-Fifth Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS), 2021
comments: Thirty-Fifth Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS), 2021
abstract: In this work we introduce a novel stochastic algorithm dubbed SNIPS, which draws samples from the posterior distribution of any linear inverse problem, where the observation is assumed to be contaminated by additive white Gaussian noise. Our solution incorporates ideas from Langevin dynamics and Newton's method, and exploits a pre-trained minimum mean squared error (MMSE) Gaussian denoiser. The proposed approach relies on an intricate derivation of the posterior score function that includes a singular value decomposition (SVD) of the degradation operator, in order to obtain a tractable iterative algorithm for the desired sampling. Due to its stochasticity, the algorithm can produce multiple high perceptual quality samples for the same noisy observation. We demonstrate the abilities of the proposed paradigm for image deblurring, super-resolution, and compressive sensing. We show that the samples produced are sharp, detailed and consistent with the given measurements, and their diversity exposes the inherent uncertainty in the inverse problem being solved.
summary: In this work we introduce a novel stochastic algorithm dubbed SNIPS, which draws samples from the posterior distribution of any linear inverse problem, where the observation is assumed to be contaminated by additive white Gaussian noise. Our solution incorporates ideas from Langevin dynamics and Newton's method, and exploits a pre-trained minimum mean squared error (MMSE) Gaussian denoiser. The proposed approach relies on an intricate derivation of the posterior score function that includes a singular value decomposition (SVD) of the degradation operator, in order to obtain a tractable iterative algorithm for the desired sampling. Due to its stochasticity, the algorithm can produce multiple high perceptual quality samples for the same noisy observation. We demonstrate the abilities of the proposed paradigm for image deblurring, super-resolution, and compressive sensing. We show that the samples produced are sharp, detailed and consistent with the given measurements, and their diversity exposes the inherent uncertainty in the inverse problem being solved.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们引入了一种称为 SNIPS 的新颖随机算法，该算法从任何线性逆问题的后验分布中抽取样本，其中假设观察结果受到加性高斯白噪声的污染。我们的解决方案融合了朗之万动力学和牛顿方法的思想，并利用了预先训练的最小均方误差 (MMSE) 高斯降噪器。所提出的方法依赖于后验得分函数的复杂推导，其中包括退化算子的奇异值分解（SVD），以便获得用于所需采样的易于处理的迭代算法。由于其随机性，该算法可以为相同的噪声观测产生多个高感知质量样本。我们展示了所提出的图像去模糊、超分辨率和压缩感知范例的能力。我们表明，生成的样本清晰、详细且与给定的测量结果一致，并且它们的多样性暴露了正在解决的逆问题中固有的不确定性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SNIPS的随机算法，用于解决线性逆问题中的后验分布采样问题，特别是在存在加性高斯噪声的情况下。
AI.motivation: 传统逆问题求解方法在处理噪声观测时难以有效捕捉解的不确定性，且难以生成多样化的高质量样本。
AI.method: 结合Langevin动力学与牛顿法，利用预训练MMSE高斯去噪器，并通过奇异值分解推导后验分数函数，实现可迭代的随机采样算法。
AI.result: 在图像去模糊、超分辨率和压缩感知任务中生成锐利、细节丰富的样本，样本多样性反映了逆问题的内在不确定性。
AI.conclusion: SNIPS算法通过随机性有效处理噪声逆问题，为多种视觉任务提供了高质量且多样化的解决方案。

authors_text: Giang Nguyen,Daeyoung Kim,Anh Nguyen
title: The effectiveness of feature attribution methods and its correlation with automatic evaluation scores
title_zh: 特征归因方法的有效性及其与自动评估分数的相关性
comment: NeurIPS 2021; 10 pages of Main text; 28 pages of Appendix
comments: NeurIPS 2021; 10 pages of Main text; 28 pages of Appendix
abstract: Explaining the decisions of an Artificial Intelligence (AI) model is increasingly critical in many real-world, high-stake applications. Hundreds of papers have either proposed new feature attribution methods, discussed or harnessed these tools in their work. However, despite humans being the target end-users, most attribution methods were only evaluated on proxy automatic-evaluation metrics (Zhang et al. 2018; Zhou et al. 2016; Petsiuk et al. 2018). In this paper, we conduct the first user study to measure attribution map effectiveness in assisting humans in ImageNet classification and Stanford Dogs fine-grained classification, and when an image is natural or adversarial (i.e., contains adversarial perturbations). Overall, feature attribution is surprisingly not more effective than showing humans nearest training-set examples. On a harder task of fine-grained dog categorization, presenting attribution maps to humans does not help, but instead hurts the performance of human-AI teams compared to AI alone. Importantly, we found automatic attribution-map evaluation measures to correlate poorly with the actual human-AI team performance. Our findings encourage the community to rigorously test their methods on the downstream human-in-the-loop applications and to rethink the existing evaluation metrics.
summary: Explaining the decisions of an Artificial Intelligence (AI) model is increasingly critical in many real-world, high-stake applications. Hundreds of papers have either proposed new feature attribution methods, discussed or harnessed these tools in their work. However, despite humans being the target end-users, most attribution methods were only evaluated on proxy automatic-evaluation metrics (Zhang et al. 2018; Zhou et al. 2016; Petsiuk et al. 2018). In this paper, we conduct the first user study to measure attribution map effectiveness in assisting humans in ImageNet classification and Stanford Dogs fine-grained classification, and when an image is natural or adversarial (i.e., contains adversarial perturbations). Overall, feature attribution is surprisingly not more effective than showing humans nearest training-set examples. On a harder task of fine-grained dog categorization, presenting attribution maps to humans does not help, but instead hurts the performance of human-AI teams compared to AI alone. Importantly, we found automatic attribution-map evaluation measures to correlate poorly with the actual human-AI team performance. Our findings encourage the community to rigorously test their methods on the downstream human-in-the-loop applications and to rethink the existing evaluation metrics.
abstract_zh: 在许多现实世界的高风险应用中，解释人工智能 (AI) 模型的决策变得越来越重要。数百篇论文提出了新的特征归因方法，讨论或在工作中利用了这些工具。然而，尽管人类是目标最终用户，但大多数归因方法仅根据代理自动评估指标进行评估（Zhang et al. 2018；Zhou et al. 2016；Petsiuk et al. 2018）。在本文中，我们进行了第一个用户研究，以测量归因图在帮助人类进行 ImageNet 分类和斯坦福狗细粒度分类以及图像是自然图像或对抗性图像（即包含对抗性扰动）时的有效性。总体而言，令人惊讶的是，特征归因并不比向人类展示最接近的训练集示例更有效。对于细粒度的狗分类这一更艰巨的任务，与单独的人工智能相比，向人类呈现归因图不仅没有帮助，反而会损害人类人工智能团队的表现。重要的是，我们发现自动归因图评估措施与实际的人类人工智能团队绩效相关性较差。我们的研究结果鼓励社区在下游人机循环应用程序上严格测试他们的方法，并重新考虑现有的评估指标。

AI.tldr: 评估特征归因方法在辅助人类完成图像分类任务中的有效性，并分析其与自动评估指标的相关性。
AI.motivation: 现有特征归因方法多依赖自动评估指标，缺乏对人类用户实际效果的验证，需直接测试其在人类-AI协作中的表现。
AI.method: 通过用户研究，对比特征归因地图与训练集示例在ImageNet和Stanford Dogs分类任务中的辅助效果，分析自然与对抗样本场景下的表现差异。
AI.result: 特征归因方法效果不优于展示训练集示例，细粒度分类任务中甚至降低人类-AI团队表现，自动评估指标与实际效果相关性低。
AI.conclusion: 应推动在人类参与的应用场景中验证方法有效性，并重新评估现有自动指标的合理性。

ai_content_json.result: 特征归因方法效果不优于展示训练集示例，细粒度分类任务中甚至降低人类-AI团队表现，自动评估指标与实际效果相关性低。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 应推动在人类参与的应用场景中验证方法有效性，并重新评估现有自动指标的合理性。

tldr: 评估特征归因方法在辅助人类完成图像分类任务中的有效性，并分析其与自动评估指标的相关性。
motivation: 现有特征归因方法多依赖自动评估指标，缺乏对人类用户实际效果的验证，需直接测试其在人类-AI协作中的表现。
method: 通过用户研究，对比特征归因地图与训练集示例在ImageNet和Stanford Dogs分类任务中的辅助效果，分析自然与对抗样本场景下的表现差异。
result: 特征归因方法效果不优于展示训练集示例，细粒度分类任务中甚至降低人类-AI团队表现，自动评估指标与实际效果相关性低。
conclusion: 应推动在人类参与的应用场景中验证方法有效性，并重新评估现有自动指标的合理性。
search_text: The effectiveness of feature attribution methods and its correlation with automatic evaluation scores 特征归因方法的有效性及其与自动评估分数的相关性 Explaining the decisions of an Artificial Intelligence (AI) model is increasingly critical in many real-world, high-stake applications. Hundreds of papers have either proposed new feature attribution methods, discussed or harnessed these tools in their work. However, despite humans being the target end-users, most attribution methods were only evaluated on proxy automatic-evaluation metrics (Zhang et al. 2018; Zhou et al. 2016; Petsiuk et al. 2018). In this paper, we conduct the first user study to measure attribution map effectiveness in assisting humans in ImageNet classification and Stanford Dogs fine-grained classification, and when an image is natural or adversarial (i.e., contains adversarial perturbations). Overall, feature attribution is surprisingly not more effective than showing humans nearest training-set examples. On a harder task of fine-grained dog categorization, presenting attribution maps to humans does not help, but instead hurts the performance of human-AI teams compared to AI alone. Importantly, we found automatic attribution-map evaluation measures to correlate poorly with the actual human-AI team performance. Our findings encourage the community to rigorously test their methods on the downstream human-in-the-loop applications and to rethink the existing evaluation metrics. 在许多现实世界的高风险应用中，解释人工智能 (AI) 模型的决策变得越来越重要。数百篇论文提出了新的特征归因方法，讨论或在工作中利用了这些工具。然而，尽管人类是目标最终用户，但大多数归因方法仅根据代理自动评估指标进行评估（Zhang et al. 2018；Zhou et al. 2016；Petsiuk et al. 2018）。在本文中，我们进行了第一个用户研究，以测量归因图在帮助人类进行 ImageNet 分类和斯坦福狗细粒度分类以及图像是自然图像或对抗性图像（即包含对抗性扰动）时的有效性。总体而言，令人惊讶的是，特征归因并不比向人类展示最接近的训练集示例更有效。对于细粒度的狗分类这一更艰巨的任务，与单独的人工智能相比，向人类呈现归因图不仅没有帮助，反而会损害人类人工智能团队的表现。重要的是，我们发现自动归因图评估措施与实际的人类人工智能团队绩效相关性较差。我们的研究结果鼓励社区在下游人机循环应用程序上严格测试他们的方法，并重新考虑现有的评估指标。 评估特征归因方法在辅助人类完成图像分类任务中的有效性，并分析其与自动评估指标的相关性。 Giang Nguyen,Daeyoung Kim,Anh Nguyen cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.HC
